Hello,
On March 31, I am facing my first federally-mandated fundraising deadline of the year. **After midnight March 31st, both my Republican opponents and I will be required by law to file a report with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) saying how much we’ve raised and from how many donors to win this critical House seat.**
This is our first FEC report of the year, and our fundraising numbers will be closely scrutinized by everyone.
**In 2022, our race was the closest race in the country. After the recount was finished, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.** But with Lauren Boebert now carpetbagging in another district, the Super PACs are raising millions to attack me. This race just got a lot harder.
This is our final opportunity to show my Republican opponents, every political pundit, and the Democratic and Republican establishment that we will win this critical House seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress.
**We’ve set a huge goal of raising $500,000 online before this first important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit it.**
**[I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before my first federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline – to help me win this critical House seat, replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, and restore some sanity to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81106822/461396669/1610638071?refcode=em20240316pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=18c2974e-f1e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGMyOTc0ZS1mMWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ue90IPUN4HHJnvshJfRdmmiJDrtu_36DyUgFZ2jq8YY=)**

name: DECISION 2024
subject: Has President Trump LOST your support?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, we’re getting worried.

You haven’t been responding to our emails, and we think you might have **given up on President Trump and his mission to Make America Great.**

_We don’t want to think you’ve joined the socialist Democrats, but right now, we’re assuming the worst._

body:
hardly anyone stepped up...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21006%2E4449941%2ESX8jvG)
---
| **_WE TOLD YOU_** Jamie Raskin isn’t mincing words: []() **_WE TOLD YOU_** if we don’t show a HUGE public wave of support for the bills in Congress to reverse _Citizens United_ , we’ll lose our chance to end dark money.

**_WE TOLD YOU_** if we lose our chance now, it might never come again!

But, hardly anyone stepped up and **we’re still $2,852 short of our goal to fund our work.** | [Look, with just 7 hours until our deadline, we’re counting on your $7 (_3X-MATCHED_) DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/39639?t=7&akid=21006%2E4449941%2ESX8jvG)
---
_Trump and the MAGA GOP are THRILLED to see efforts to overturn _Citizens United_ get thwarted_ – he knows the Dark Money is his one-way ticket back to the White House!

**We need you now more than ever** – our very democracy is at stake with Trump so close to another win against the will of the American people.

We’re practically begging: [**Chip in $7 before our extended deadline passes to fund our overturn _Citizens United_ campaign and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/39639?t=8&akid=21006%2E4449941%2ESX8jvG)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you,

– FFR

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdkefe892cqckljfkao4lrlp8u9tg0uvc66a9du8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or4clh2bs)

| | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrl0d9tbmejejil3kp809kamso7snim84bhtvaoo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or4clh2bs)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpig6mprmhsai59tom41dh4dc0d8ug6qcvacufbg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or4clh2bs)**

name: American Briefing
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4i8h88va6ama7po6ameq3rnif97kq8c0jphigio_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9pr0c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgdhs8ogu3fanbe041f94vp3586532qn6k7n4n60_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9pr0c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm3ci314n3rmu4elrtkcno73rk8d8f413v52gf8o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9pr0c3h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

name: Jim Justice
subject: I need you to unite with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
body:
With under two months left until the primary election, there is ZERO TIME TO SPARE.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1pf6erv4jnu0iorm257ad9dck4kdcqtrj5c6k40_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

This race is coming down to the wire.

With just under two months until election day, there is **ZERO TIME TO SPARE**. I need every single one of my supporters to unite together and help spread our America First message.

[**The Democrats and Never -Trumpers are on a mission to divide us and squander our message, but we can't let that happen.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsuaav2tdugtsns758v4mks1d0sfl1lgd2ve01eg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)

**I'm calling on YOU to be 1 of 100 patriots to make a donation to our team NOW.** I know you believe in our America First message, Fellow Conservative, so I'm counting on you to help us spread it far and wide.

[**BE A SUPPORTING PATRIOT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4r2b731rcuevbbsd1q0dljb6p44a1pnfntmuk3g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)
**Can I count on you, Fellow Conservative?**

[**BE A PATRIOT - DONATE NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1dsumd2o6u025mlk2vut5qb6fgcikreietvkgho_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)

Sincerely,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z90gufu8gpnful6lsb0qcbjqik059a4cost91vrg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[** Join **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu71o8nu2qf12ue4leq33if9cc3n12b8cbetmk08_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or3c9h2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zibpr7bpv0qerordktjrsuvg5j1v09idndal2rro_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z71a4ktoii08df709msdl9gc9vjaqbs5r4jl0e3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z46a2as95m0oa7cil5mqg33mt69urj3ajuaccgu8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdhm9or2c1h2bs)

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j6%2bMt43USGGz5R5wSxcQOg&sysid=1)**

name: Eric Hovde
subject: $14 MILLION
disclaimer_text: paid for by Chuck Schumer
body:
This is the Democrats going all in to defeat me and defend one of their most vulnerable Senate seats in the Country.

|

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm3i2g2cgfm1tvoqal3cfdejm05t06t8s2hef768_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative, I need you to see this.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuv79vn5o8c075q4g4qqk8knifedg8eotpufdub0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
We have the Swamp’s full and undivided attention. **Schumer’s Senate Majority PAC is investing over $239 MILLION in targeted Senate Races across the country -- with over $14 MILLION targeting me!**

I don’t need to tell you this isn’t chump change. This is the Democrats going all in to defeat me and defend one of their most vulnerable Senate seats in the Country.

[**If we don’t act immediately,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zec0ilv1071ilaccli4a6190bpegg1mfdnjbueso_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs) every ad on TV, radio, and the internet will soon be bought and paid for by Chuck Schumer.

[**We need your immediate help to get our ads on the air before the Democrats can drown out our winning message. Will you pitch in $20, $50, $100 or more right now?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgmvr0ej98tdo0f0dfgtqnq4gudae26lab1l5no8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)

| [**RUSH OVER $20**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo6p3cfevt157s9rmbebpvtvr4rs3hn1i3hplrno_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH OVER $50**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhdofqsol4ppe2r0d618n1staiteql50943otang_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH OVER $100**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb0q9ae91mhifji935dlpt03ll6pvmogaat8uctg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
---
[**RUSH OVER MORE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkukbf1e94fbvfiuakhrgdaau15av17u2d6b8p38_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
---

We sent Schumer, Tammy Baldwin, and Democrats nationwide a message in just the first 20 days of our campaign. Thousands of donors stepped up to retire career politician Tammy Baldwin.

Democrats wouldn’t be spending over **$14 million** this early if they weren’t in serious jeopardy of losing Wisconsin.

That means our work has just gotten started. [**Help me keep up the pressure by donating today so we can keep up with the millions of dollars in attack ads that are about to hit me.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zldv5ce9u7crhge2hm1asn2offnbsb3b1ne59sa8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)

Sincerely,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqjglh4q7goolnpg2fhktdeou7n1t2hmsorgtka0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
Eric Hovde
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**STOP BIDEN & BALDWIN
DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3223o4pt02e35nahm51qoue4onff292cu48v9po_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)
---

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

[** Join **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z14jktvjkdfdhgkph6304cj2nua82v3l9cbn9l20_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)

---
[**CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5jumr6iqktorcc2cfi73s1fho1bl0r6puv549tg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0c3h2bs)

body:

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1nfcmlq8aepci56q15iuj8mcbb1o3eu94a69co_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0cth2bs)

---
| | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrirbmaj9arli0hhp5900mnevglv26d37rjk5ofg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0cth2bs)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt79bokcnt3bq357nomdmkjq8pnqlgcsr5b4k3h0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0cth2bs)**

name: Jim Justice
subject: I need you to unite with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
body:
With under two months left until the primary election, there is ZERO TIME TO SPARE.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhr00gj3ts2985arvu77g2limrlti2kmm7mqns9o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

This race is coming down to the wire.

With just under two months until election day, there is **ZERO TIME TO SPARE**. I need every single one of my supporters to unite together and help spread our America First message.

[**The Democrats and Never -Trumpers are on a mission to divide us and squander our message, but we can't let that happen.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8co4ove49ol9dt4kn3uco1cdsbp0emun49ot1l8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)

**I'm calling on YOU to be 1 of 100 patriots to make a donation to our team NOW.** I know you believe in our America First message, Fellow Conservative, so I'm counting on you to help us spread it far and wide.

[**BE A SUPPORTING PATRIOT**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zki82rli0fnb0n34tucul4odp4klmgjtt7qmtj5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)
**Can I count on you, Fellow Conservative?**

[**BE A PATRIOT - DONATE NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgg23nqcaln5fdvtfherpedrta3pl3hrdbqv2gp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)

Sincerely,
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zonh2ehiarn2ghu00jed8osjvpno4mn21c3ei848_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[** Join **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqftp6i64qarmknvjkjij5325m42e4bn1fgam2e0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj4c3h2bs)

---

| Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
Mark dedicated his life to helping others.

Dear Friend,

They're trying to ruin a great man...

Between the anger and tears, that's what keeps going through my mind when I think about the unfair attacks on my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, as his trial date quickly approaches on March 18th.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrh7e8ti1uu4o4pd117tkbh9rjjf0kmeodm6es0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.

Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.

But Mark worked in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage and smeared Mark as a racist. The corrupt media repeatedly LIED about Mark to trash his reputation.

Now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. **[That's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb45h3d1an2m7p1fvkifc20e0f2k8opv7a8cpmg8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)**

But first, please let me explain what happened...

On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.

Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.

Mark's arrest team had a plan in place to capture the suspect in his vehicle. So they pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But he floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape.

My husband and another officer exited their vehicle. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But the suspect refused Mark's commands to show his hands.

With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw the suspect reach into the center console and pull his hand up.

Mark thought the suspect had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire and felt something hit his shield and push him backward.

**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**

Thankfully, the suspect survived and no one else was injured. But because he is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target my husband.

Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that the suspect "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.

Then on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison. His trial is scheduled to begin on March 18th.**

**[Now I hope you can see why I'm turning to you for help today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqjg26eeq6cda6omfbnpi465j00va7qaoh67hqog_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)**

Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).

We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.

This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.

They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!

But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.

Now I must ask if you're one of those people...

**[Will you please help my husband Mark fight to clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu444tfla9p87hjnd78t60uqrf0i93juo0n4l2t8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)**

Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.

Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend the next 10 YEARS behind bars away from our family.

With the trial just around the corner, there is no time to waste. **[So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmm21jke2j76jst6mpsfbf0lj6kj8kv0q3n2g4jg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)**

Any gift amount you can give today is truly a blessing. No matter what, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.

Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.

With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner

P.S. This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.

Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. And is trial is scheduled to begin soon on March 18th. **[Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zab55ni7ruk10odmequ7g9fs93ui66tin1r4hno0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjmcoj0s9h2bs)** Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

| | Friend, It’s official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I’m humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31889%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=COilF3coplpRAsvj1meC2w&sysid=1)** There’s no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31880%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Qp%2b1mkxLLwhnuOq8mQbFQ&sysid=1)**

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696444%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LjJcvfkblnIBSDwD3TBoKA&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7ECym%2bp7k%2bNgqda1qtMAlg&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iX2Hfbr%2fXhcGLRgI4DaK1A&sysid=1)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UVXjigRGooQtb011SeMbqQ&sysid=1)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mgvSZGBrGugpBuh0SUX%2fvQ&sysid=1)**

American Update

name: American Action News

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

| | | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvMkQJUVOBg-HHrwUVxRdOgo6inGEyLJBybn7-YWDdurSzuTHx_fezzf_FlJOZf4WFhrvyJ6rbw9fMWSZAwe5Xq8JU8heK22lMhIGr7s4xgu64DoaYQDlnDsN0N3GaN8BzYUsKhMjnBUYpzCcY7RnArJdGo87ysCgBuv0pb9aFbVGdSKCMyAJq0Imbv2daMO1zEy1Mm37e04YSo_r0uXx1tpWhXkRehJ6qoQ7U_-RClM8NoSeGoVFHjZSJaGnp5fG-7JJLijxFhLL7cDNxAfOqczCvDbeSWi3t8VjWLaQ5iLM6--frf_-Ir9--QE9gHFW-wbWgTk5CcPJCe3o07cU_wN46qylUWmH-EPekeWfhIR2n3t5_D3oeIzbR8o5VTcIq-YlpPxMpv17h78CAAD__3FenC4 "Lara Trump")

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvMkQJUVOBg-HHrwUVxRdOgo6inGEyLJBybn7-YWDdurSzuTHx_fezzf_FlJOZf4WFhrvyJ6rbw9fMWSZAwe5Xq8JU8heK22lMhIGr7s4xgu64DoaYQDlnDsN0N3GaN8BzYUsKhMjnBUYpzCcY7RnArJdGo87ysCgBuv0pb9aFbVGdSKCMyAJq0Imbv2daMO1zEy1Mm37e04YSo_r0uXx1tpWhXkRehJ6qoQ7U_-RClM8NoSeGoVFHjZSJaGnp5fG-7JJLijxFhLL7cDNxAfOqczCvDbeSWi3t8VjWLaQ5iLM6--frf_-Ir9--QE9gHFW-wbWgTk5CcPJCe3o07cU_wN46qylUWmH-EPekeWfhIR2n3t5_D3oeIzbR8o5VTcIq-YlpPxMpv17h78CAAD__3FenC4 "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

name: Lara Trump
subject: It’s official. I’m the new Co-Chair of the RNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwYPAWLk46WUpx0UkpUqJZjL0jYYwA793jRz4lVZqkHn3zzzf_zzf3hhQpbd9xDxPV6kp17emqx8gjFuTHupInjA4EaC4Ul9ZBt0wDyHEduzBJK4UxNw2ye0zLGFDBIORd6_U2INzsOBi9ilFZeUfZ0XTtEUpaYbXV0Nu7gsWu433VGhVKpsWZF2yhp1RpCdUfR85HpEa-9kfZujg9WsuVqRcGM4O5Bn-W0H9QKmHp_bEzmFvAnV8SVAOD-cuklXPPvCTP_QOp8Hzhai4XXihtTL22cgYG5my787hnpC0x9fr7Yu3eX_i3H--yl1IZpV2T2kg1GC7tYBiY8OkaLf8BfOUcqYXUrvAnp1r5n_8wMJ9nev496Mq05A-KkaqxTIttR4qXd9f-vcFfAQAA__-b-5rB "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwYPAWLk46WUpx0UkpUqJZjL0jYYwA793jRz4lVZqkHn3zzzf_zzf3hhQpbd9xDxPV6kp17emqx8gjFuTHupInjA4EaC4Ul9ZBt0wDyHEduzBJK4UxNw2ye0zLGFDBIORd6_U2INzsOBi9ilFZeUfZ0XTtEUpaYbXV0Nu7gsWu433VGhVKpsWZF2yhp1RpCdUfR85HpEa-9kfZujg9WsuVqRcGM4O5Bn-W0H9QKmHp_bEzmFvAnV8SVAOD-cuklXPPvCTP_QOp8Hzhai4XXihtTL22cgYG5my787hnpC0x9fr7Yu3eX_i3H--yl1IZpV2T2kg1GC7tYBiY8OkaLf8BfOUcqYXUrvAnp1r5n_8wMJ9nev496Mq05A-KkaqxTIttR4qXd9f-vcFfAQAA__-b-5rB "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Red, White, and Blue
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWwpYyBiNj

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWwpYyBiNj

Hello,
Are you
worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I
am.

That's
why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little
Patriots Program.

The
Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that
teaches the REAL history of America.

We
provide this curriculum free of charge for parents, grandparents,
guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are
also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a
tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that
helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have
big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your
help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's
why I am emailing you today.

I have
written a brand-new children's book, Red, White, and Blue: Our
Flag Matters to Me and You, to teach kids why we stand for our
American flag and the freedoms it represents.

I wanted
to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the
proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our
Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and
cartoons that show the history of America.

This is
the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children
the best possible resources.

Your gift
of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll
also receive a copy of Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to
Me and You with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben
Carson

and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=peK0CFrYmb1Tupld7i7GtA&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vnXVKypTLW%2fhOF9yGPTxHg&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PnAM5X0rrkDjC0pYeb26PQ&sysid=1)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31892%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BrBrNYsamdBUIdQUSTzzzQ&sysid=1)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31893%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KMCykxoRfrbCF27BINGFwg&sysid=1)**

Your America News

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries.

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk749050i4kcs7e6cvn5npn4on80rf6lrc9k3f68_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd2q6vac6kjec7cab0bv3s815ebtiu4ti901vkro_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs)

I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zml3poqhgfm3gg9q2p2g253069vdcd700khrmu58_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs)

SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpjfc7bdigmn8tpcjv25i3uid3t808r758mckva8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgq7es2mmgkppihah1r5taaplrs7hg990lh8u6u8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs)

The Woke and radically leftwing Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It's the same with our kids' literature.

[You can be the reason why kids are saved from dangerous woke ideology. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring school fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziv7mfnh6v6iaduk9i617lh6ia4r20evoidv63io_rp22sh2s8i6ep30cdjm1or4c3h2bs)

John Rich

subject: It’s official. I’m the new Co-Chair of the RNC.

body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGP2zAMhX-NvMkQKUWyBw8HHLylKLp0FGhbTlhIiiHLueu_L3xopy5ZCT6-9_H9vPorceR8-0YpDCX5svv69PtMUUYqJB_ryjNT9KjQSKUlOI_NMtgeXQdNGMCBsk6Bw-Y-hMkE7PUywao61D1Mk3Nrv1joetIGGh7OO0qDU52xyrar6btldRZX6imsKIwqYTumyDPlRL8ehevvNofaxOFe67YL_SZwFDjuYT5KaD84l7C08yMJHGugJM_wvAeB4xdBLUfaZMmznO_ERW6nXI_llBfON6HfazmCQHvU5GdKG_EtC_3-N6nx39_kjyu0ANr2F1_BWNAXK8FdrEAbPn3l5fX9L5dHriHX0_opS5L_niLQfh75-d-8KcOyfXCMvFsnjLol4ngyN_Xl0v4EAAD__8T6lck "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAQhH8N7rDYBcO5cPGkJ3cviqKTUiIOsI2EOQuv7-7nRz4lVZqk3vl2dmZ_ftkvl3Iq8ze3xoEq2bpbetjdu8yzq47fpyn55LJFgYoLycFYbMKgDAapmziAAaGNNADNMvRKO4EieK2FMt1NuAgXH3w3ge-DlE0azj1CghG90oBtH-UUvAn-Aigvk2BKuBwr7S0tscbtuOXkXaHo1tbf1yYPC9G2M_nBcGQ47tEfNbbPVGoMp4LheIr5GSHtkeH4zkH1WDdei-d-cany7cTlWE-8pjIz-Un1iAz1Qav1bt1cmguTn7_vVfb7B7_-uEILIA2iJVAaZKc5mE4z1PFlKYX_AN4-90Kx0Gn-4FSJ_2mHoX4d5fH3oKlD2J4p57Rrw5SYV5fyuxn69__9CgAA___qmJqQ "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAQhH8N7rDYBcO5cPGkJ3cviqKTUiIOsI2EOQuv7-7nRz4lVZqk3vl2dmZ_ftkvl3Iq8ze3xoEq2bpbetjdu8yzq47fpyn55LJFgYoLycFYbMKgDAapmziAAaGNNADNMvRKO4EieK2FMt1NuAgXH3w3ge-DlE0azj1CghG90oBtH-UUvAn-Aigvk2BKuBwr7S0tscbtuOXkXaHo1tbf1yYPC9G2M_nBcGQ47tEfNbbPVGoMp4LheIr5GSHtkeH4zkH1WDdei-d-cany7cTlWE-8pjIz-Un1iAz1Qav1bt1cmguTn7_vVfb7B7_-uEILIA2iJVAaZKc5mE4z1PFlKYX_AN4-90Kx0Gn-4FSJ_2mHoX4d5fH3oKlD2J4p57Rrw5SYV5fyuxn69__9CgAA___qmJqQ "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbQwEBCchopsLLrkQNXbDWLIxMmbQ_f1qZmejTTbtfnqqqn-36YbOu239g4H6xacpHVOYp-XiOaZ8JrKTAKE4SF41kyxsD1VnlSqor5oKdFODFMW9N4a00C10bSewrrQFULY2BLKtkaq2cP3TA7JqoFNaNSXaGZEsdYjQQmeYAvSUcrkkIhsDbta7mVL-n2iPKZcmhsL395z3g8lfTIxMjG_2wmzuZaLHozSRiXGmdXXbypeY-IWZEg8z3-OOTI5nDtMRz2SIyeEbyIR-AtkwOYy__wr-lfr9CGTdGZgcXrbPm8Gwo1s3JocwM6ExxHPLTA6iLlJv98t57w7dMAVrQOdfTfIP1v4IAAD__x1thpk)

[ ](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbQwEBCchopsLLrkQNXbDWLIxMmbQ_f1qZmejTTbtfnqqqn-36YbOu239g4H6xacpHVOYp-XiOaZ8JrKTAKE4SF41kyxsD1VnlSqor5oKdFODFMW9N4a00C10bSewrrQFULY2BLKtkaq2cP3TA7JqoFNaNSXaGZEsdYjQQmeYAvSUcrkkIhsDbta7mVL-n2iPKZcmhsL395z3g8lfTIxMjG_2wmzuZaLHozSRiXGmdXXbypeY-IWZEg8z3-OOTI5nDtMRz2SIyeEbyIR-AtkwOYy__wr-lfr9CGTdGZgcXrbPm8Gwo1s3JocwM6ExxHPLTA6iLlJv98t57w7dMAVrQOdfTfIP1v4IAAD__x1thpk) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbQwEBCchopsLLrkQNXbDWLIxMmbQ_f1qZmejTTbtfnqqqn-36YbOu239g4H6xacpHVOYp-XiOaZ8JrKTAKE4SF41kyxsD1VnlSqor5oKdFODFMW9N4a00C10bSewrrQFULY2BLKtkaq2cP3TA7JqoFNaNSXaGZEsdYjQQmeYAvSUcrkkIhsDbta7mVL-n2iPKZcmhsL395z3g8lfTIxMjG_2wmzuZaLHozSRiXGmdXXbypeY-IWZEg8z3-OOTI5nDtMRz2SIyeEbyIR-AtkwOYy__wr-lfr9CGTdGZgcXrbPm8Gwo1s3JocwM6ExxHPLTA6iLlJv98t57w7dMAVrQOdfTfIP1v4IAAD__x1thpk)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbQwEBCchopsLLrkQNXbDWLIxMmbQ_f1qZmejTTbtfnqqqn-36YbOu239g4H6xacpHVOYp-XiOaZ8JrKTAKE4SF41kyxsD1VnlSqor5oKdFODFMW9N4a00C10bSewrrQFULY2BLKtkaq2cP3TA7JqoFNaNSXaGZEsdYjQQmeYAvSUcrkkIhsDbta7mVL-n2iPKZcmhsL395z3g8lfTIxMjG_2wmzuZaLHozSRiXGmdXXbypeY-IWZEg8z3-OOTI5nDtMRz2SIyeEbyIR-AtkwOYy__wr-lfr9CGTdGZgcXrbPm8Gwo1s3JocwM6ExxHPLTA6iLlJv98t57w7dMAVrQOdfTfIP1v4IAAD__x1thpk)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbQwEBCchopsLLrkQNXbDWLIxMmbQ_f1qZmejTTbtfnqqqn-36YbOu239g4H6xacpHVOYp-XiOaZ8JrKTAKE4SF41kyxsD1VnlSqor5oKdFODFMW9N4a00C10bSewrrQFULY2BLKtkaq2cP3TA7JqoFNaNSXaGZEsdYjQQmeYAvSUcrkkIhsDbta7mVL-n2iPKZcmhsL395z3g8lfTIxMjG_2wmzuZaLHozSRiXGmdXXbypeY-IWZEg8z3-OOTI5nDtMRz2SIyeEbyIR-AtkwOYy__wr-lfr9CGTdGZgcXrbPm8Gwo1s3JocwM6ExxHPLTA6iLlJv98t57w7dMAVrQOdfTfIP1v4IAAD__x1thpk)**

I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I guarantee Bill Clinton still remembers me! And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. In Justice, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Freedom Liberty Report PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5sSk-D8P4pqwEIvtBGVKgA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5sSk-D8P4pqwEIvtBGVKgA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5sSk-D8P4pqwEIvtBGVKgA~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

| | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries.

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46152694324b4593a30250664e90543c&_e=D1rco516y9fHHK4H3ySiJF6C_BIFpuwTVBXdtHwd7AyCWadhkU1IV960OyRLm3bvR51L2fA1KjOxzRVT-ez70JyBngkZwMnbSWkwrR80UcagroiaORZyIYql1pqMyGCOR-nal6wyM-657ZlyVebFDjG33lfPLSW2CKFQjJlpafb9MfFJgjoDlDl4uitfA8h_iSX0rwmA7ygCV16uviiZD-uNAojyA8oBN6FXo0TTdIp2frNsk7NT0sHbqK22pBPNJiSVeHPyjsn6qz_K3Sb9Md7w-m_WZRbTDd1YHcETBB7YmIaW5R03Ee0vK-StmcGJ19ZEMHEeYZ_m-uWL85Hede5QV1clizqRVDkcZmPXVFRR8cTHCX1_W9MI8LFa9qiP)[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46152694324b4593a30250664e90543c&_e=D1rco516y9fHHK4H3ySiJF6C_BIFpuwTVBXdtHwd7AyCWadhkU1IV960OyRLm3bvR51L2fA1KjOxzRVT-ez70JyBngkZwMnbSWkwrR80UcagroiaORZyIYql1pqMyGCOR-nal6wyM-657ZlyVebFDjG33lfPLSW2CKFQjJlpafb9MfFJgjoDlDl4uitfA8h_GCbiYWMdgzblpKzeOTaGFzudCxhxzV7KT1FDk5nNwIvr_GMzEleE9nW5UcVN2nDvsnkEjdR00j62wHUnE5P4JnUQe8J9EWgvLBOved5p39LOB4Et3tfhpI7x2WecWmUmTEyEnO7NTDUQQ8XpjXwrOKeCjd3NeJzcDZ2CEfHtgcjYCcPUv8NYGLgDo6_eJxfT)

I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46152694324b4593a30250664e90543c&_e=D1rco516y9fHHK4H3ySiJF6C_BIFpuwTVBXdtHwd7AyCWadhkU1IV960OyRLm3bvR51L2fA1KjOxzRVT-ez70JyBngkZwMnbSWkwrR80UcagroiaORZyIYql1pqMyGCOR-nal6wyM-657ZlyVebFDjG33lfPLSW2CKFQjJlpafbaXfUktJhl0AvH5oUJM1JHR1y-x4gQ8NnpTI0TGCvmJ_-JpzYy3WbiFk86U6Ugc9FHdk5V9W-NOrfE4dOTBhe3ZeFlgoL8jB31-eS_5gE9Se9CnOJEUmwUO8F3L9eDN5PLl0kGuEgJt_1l2_ot7EjucnNv-h7spw0vAk2UjzaA1aaP0rdsXcJCJPIIvBKNSvk%3D)

clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries. It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. The Woke and radically leftwing Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich P.S. Here's a photo of Kirk Cameron and I. Together, we are supporting SkyTree Book Fairs to promote wholesome, family-friendly books to kids in schools. subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=813ff65bbdc647fab8b74ab2b77faea5&_e=eq-jD-AA5qBWITNNY7zbn6XqtC78eQ83giyAfvbUWCkFAbBXSslyz5jPWFnZE526zCnI71nITkjEr-5pNAzdynB0eQ0y_zbF1Q09nYDWKm1rY9clCsFqOj6EEKDQYhk71eVb-IdhpW40MLnoiZRAwSSuCG0uOuWPswV3s381lC0U4GtJz7qW9bDjbOQ8Kh2O2FXkxBx-Iy0phZ2OL-NXoj1PolPgwYf7q_3wpjsTc4jjpLhPXWRGzchbZNLK3gDiSxqVD0wJc9XrsM0zZOGfpxazNdixiLwRO7xke4heKaGhI53_3Qjb9_ZRGABPXIHFS_Xy80d8JxI0aPrKX7CkiKSnMyPmUWp_m0QJ4OVMFtiK9BsIo_VA82ReGjKqsUfhrDeBKwc68gMwwNcdP90pig%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Freedom Lover is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22b0665af161486693ae4dc5577f6d7d&_e=J2MmRxwRhdu7TiLxrWzzCKvEvS_94z3r2d5vtHFV1Shz3mj9yi9ISurz33YWAlrVMDfV6c3EZPvnT4uAMr-M5Jr76dBGzMVSuLZMIYp-NHvug3Mps8gMl1Y3_x_50LQun5nxQK78-OMfGynqJ_rA10yqC_fUv454vOaHsTo1qWM4_uejbeKYHkUcbgzFVV3pnutv9DwVW7msRB_d9qLpnyWKvmFGV-FflXPYWAn-Hk_ZkDPHpLRv4nIHxQbD29I0o6OUXdwsDfKx2concl0OIJ0rgMeSKmpM9Jm-g8hHaZD19g47_tadG5NvQmHeQVJt8CC9EGD5dqbJ4m7mEQL0qYEBwMQTX7Onos-C73bLtYpbIJeQj6H8S5OdyQhSkvzbuFMQ_TLL_bZMsUqVVHeeuA%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22b0665af161486693ae4dc5577f6d7d&_e=J2MmRxwRhdu7TiLxrWzzCKvEvS_94z3r2d5vtHFV1Shz3mj9yi9ISurz33YWAlrVMDfV6c3EZPvnT4uAMr-M5Jr76dBGzMVSuLZMIYp-NHvug3Mps8gMl1Y3_x_50LQun5nxQK78-OMfGynqJ_rA10yqC_fUv454vOaHsTo1qWM4_uejbeKYHkUcbgzFVV3pnutv9DwVW7msRB_d9qLpnyWKvmFGV-FflXPYWAn-Hk_ZkDPHpLRv4nIHxQbD29I0qmKD8BskSXNYyvcC3o77IKi0OyZUv9qse7hTcCzNq4KWR5TkSU2U2tlw7WKx_y85fQ83PO4qFg7zwUd_7X6HvBVP34FpPsP24mwWS3iLSS-ha5vIbd8CltEhnedRaLsdA6rUYBFYwTLzOHw-VrlTpw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22b0665af161486693ae4dc5577f6d7d&_e=J2MmRxwRhdu7TiLxrWzzCKvEvS_94z3r2d5vtHFV1Shz3mj9yi9ISurz33YWAlrVMDfV6c3EZPvnT4uAMr-M5Jr76dBGzMVSuLZMIYp-NHvug3Mps8gMl1Y3_x_50LQun5nxQK78-OMfGynqJ_rA10yqC_fUv454vOaHsTo1qWM4_uejbeKYHkUcbgzFVV3pnutv9DwVW7msRB_d9qLpnyWKvmFGV-FflXPYWAn-Hk_ZkDPHpLRv4nIHxQbD29I0zBpPiVAue5hTXj-jcdXtfRIZE0P5hgobTG0ymQWYFytIn7KIx-RL093ZwRrhSUNmKMse034oi61nIUOUs1DoGYeygkuzTqIIQHBJ1e_NBIXaoFiKfS6uiL4GjXVT0gIVSOjDGIhWfawmDh_3YLS-Sg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
