#### **We need better Representation in the Alaska Republican Party. Jerry Ward was President Trump Alaska Campaign Manager, if President Trump Appointed Jerry Ward, who is also an Alaskan Native and a Vietnam Veteran. One of Jerry Ward's goals is to eliminate**[**#rankedchoicevoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65f727eeb0dba30f303f39a0&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2Frankedchoicevoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65f726a2ac4b56030a0c7471&l=en-US&s=VSGquiWUooEq_IiXRVRXmnnvkNA%3D)**we need a GOP Chair who will fight for Alaskans. The GOP to this day has not helped us. Let's elect leadership who will fight for Alaska.**

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|

#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | | | Celebrating Our Repeal of Fairbanks, these two ladies led Fairbanks. They made sure we had thousands of signatures more than we needed. In many of their districts we were over 480% of the required signatures, most in the State. In some districts they turned in nearly 3,000 signatures for a goal of 500 in a district. They were relentless and they supported me since Day 1. | | We will be at the District 31-36 Republican Convention in Fairbanks Today. We are going to Update 150 Fairbanks Republicans on Our Fight Against you are in District 31-36 make sure to attend 1201 Hoselton Rd, Fairbanks, AK Pay for your ticket here 1, 8, 25, 26, 27, 28, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36 Convention is Tomorrow March 16th. If you need to know what your district is, go to this link scroll to the bottom and type in your address and it will tell you who your State Senator and State House of Representative is, whatever district your State House of Representatives is, is your district number. Search on your district convention. | Sign Up To Join this Fall, We plan to take him Silver Salmon Fishing, We plan to Take Him on a Glacier Tour, and We plan on going to the Alaska State Fair. If you would like to stay updated on Our Plans, Want to Meet Scott Presler, or if you would like us to come to your group or community event, please reach out and we will see what we can schedule. Planning Mid to Late August for him to be in Town. Dates Coming Soon, Stay Tuned. | We ran a poll for 7 days, here are the results | Who’s Team are You on? Team Alaska or Team Soros WE DID IT!!!, We are in Scott Presler might be coming to Alaska to help us GOTV for our Repeal of Rank Choice Voting | | There are some that feel I am being too mean to the GOP Leadership. I do not think so, I think they should be accountable for their inaction (No Assistance on the Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting). The Arizona GOP, Idaho GOP, Hawaii GOP all invited me with Open Arms, The Alaska GOP was nonexistent. I am not talking about local GOP groups, or individuals. I am discussing the Alaska GOP Leadership. Why the obvious disdain for Citizen Driven Politics? We received more help from other State’s GOP. The Alaska GOP Leadership did not help us, let’s get a real leader. Jerry Ward Out of all the candidates running to be GOP Chairman, Jerry Ward was essential to our success, we support Jerry Ward for Chairman of the Alaska GOP. Learn how to be a delegate and vote in your district for Jerry Ward for GOP Chairman. | | We need better Representation in the Alaska Republican Party. Jerry Ward was President Trump Alaska Campaign Manager, if President Trump Appointed Jerry Ward, who is also an Alaskan Native and a Vietnam Veteran. One of Jerry Ward's goals is to eliminate need a GOP Chair who will fight for Alaskans. The GOP to this day has not helped us. Let's elect leadership who will fight for Alaska. | | | We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality. Press Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEAlaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting Anchorage, Alaska– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans."This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger)."We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state."We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon. | | We Did The Impossible We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024 The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Then "Article Four from Virginia" Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

Picture it, Peter. President Donald J. Trump getting sworn in on January 20, 2025 -- the start of another four year term filled with chaos and division. Four long years. We're sorry to put that thought into your head, but it's important we all come to terms with the fact there is a very real chance it happens. In just over two weeks, we close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of the year. Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden...and you. **Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate.** _And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. We're sorry to put that thought into your head, but it's important we all come to terms with the fact there is a very real chance it happens. In just over two weeks, we close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of the year. Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden...and you. Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate. And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. President Biden needs you. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. The Biden Campaign

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsW3UlBitN
Join Team Cruz to help us DEFEAT THE LEFT here in Texas! Read
more >>>

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osW3UlBitN

⚠️
NEW POLL: IT'S A TIED RACE FOR THIS SEAT

We Need
EVERY Conservative Patriot on Board! >>>

JOIN
TEAM CRUZ

Friend,

I've been
saying it for months. The latest numbers confirm it.

I am the
National Democrats' #1 target and a new poll shows it's a TIED
RACE between me and far-left Democrat Colin Allred at 44-44!

The left
is already prepared to pour as much as $100 million into Texas to
beat me.

These
latest poll results will only embolden them to double down.

Here at
Team Cruz, we're leading the charge to Keep Texas Red, take back
the Senate, and SAVE AMERICA from these radicals responsible for
the downward spiral we're all living through today.

We can
defeat the left and stop the insanity in Washington.

But to
make it happen, we need EVERY conservative patriot across America
on board!

You can
become an official member of Team Cruz and receive regular
updates HERE >>>

JOIN
TEAM CRUZ

If you're
not familiar with far-left Congressman Colin Allred, here's what
you need to know:

He
has voted to DEFUND Operation Lone Star, the Texas state program
launched to secure the border and stop illegal immigration.

He
has used his position in the U.S. House to help an organization
that hosts drag shows for children receive $1 million in federal
taxpayer money.

He
secured another $1 million in taxpayer money for a radical group
that teaches children as young as four that America is a "white
supremacist" nation.

And
he voted "NO" on a package passed in the House to help Israel
fight back against the Hamas terrorists. In the past, he voted
against a measure to condemn the anti-Israel Boycott, Divestment,
Sanctions (BDS) movement.

I've been
leading the charge to expose the left's corruption and their
weaponization of our justice system. These radicals will DESTROY
our great nation if we don't stop them, and they will say and do
anything to silence me.

I hope to
count on your support in this fight. It's important that we keep
you updated.

Take a
moment now to join Team Cruz and help get the job done to KEEP
TEXAS RED!

For
Liberty,

Ted Cruz

DONATE
TO FUEL OUR FIGHT

815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

Major news for you today, Patriot!

**A years-long investigation finally revealed that President Trump was right:** Obama illegally set the CIA and other agencies to recruit foreign governments to spy on Donald Trump and his campaign.

I had to share this news with my most diligent supporters because we need to **expose the corruption ASAP!**
| [ **EXPOSE THE CORRUPTION** ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0e66664b1703490b80ed9f2ccd37c59e&_e=s2mhGhKvxKsMno3NItcLl7Ka4WhUBBP8by6O-aJ0nNOyvlChZZ20rDFm-Kx7daBNyaKhb-GHgJcakXckpESUgkB9kSmvZ15H1N3_lyQrzqpR_6BwDSfeJBi2HFVnCvqQZXsOey3EEQzmbm0FFvLf7QRYtiawjmhpqcQKJNsBrLauKNGVl_HxyKV4mJFE6OFi_Zfq0lTQTq0N5dp9dw9bwbfYXb8WjiwILJAyM9PCex9yYrJpbvMz4wc-QQRnT7o3972wIPGniP4MIzcKmogNUCT6JcHI2beDt8txWvEPFjz3hzFflmgmZHfdRX6r24EDE8P14we5YqFnSJ2vHTmeeCCwWc5kcdA-Hlbh83u-claq6Ljp0v50SS11mNNcpLjt)

Essentially, Obama said "sic em" and set the CIA on Trump, but there are **top-secret documents** with proof that the spying and election interference goes beyond what we initially thought.

I can't rest easy knowing how far the Radical Left will go to stop ALL Republicans. From the President of the United States to hardworking everyday patriots like you, the radicals will not cease until they strip us of all of our God-given rights.

We have to expose their illegal and unconstitutional corruption before it's too late. **We 're only just now learning how deep their schemes run, but I know for a fact that this is only the beginning...**

If they can do this to a duly elected President, they'll infringe on the rights of anyone, so we have to fight back today to save our country tomorrow. Our rights, our future, everything depends on the actions we take right now.

[**I cannot emphasize enough that this cannot wait, Patriot, I need you in this fight right now.**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0e66664b1703490b80ed9f2ccd37c59e&_e=s2mhGhKvxKsMno3NItcLl7Ka4WhUBBP8by6O-aJ0nNOyvlChZZ20rDFm-Kx7daBNyaKhb-GHgJcakXckpESUgkB9kSmvZ15H1N3_lyQrzqpR_6BwDSfeJBi2HFVnCvqQZXsOey3EEQzmbm0FFvLf7QRYtiawjmhpqcQKJNsBrLauKNGVl_HxyKV4mJFE6OFi_Zfq0lTQTq0N5dp9dw9bwZ0pYrKC6n33q783bTqAgLqjGKvLy7j-p7GIAXmZpWIXS5S1oUsBLC7aYwWzZvMTO9NWqdkNJ6PzUa4AIbPqS0e6DQNxqy90RqkEN_ZkDGbQgGebGdCAdVGey28WPRylAGYhJ6gpkupEu0kGCJhkPx9VEGPWnag5_WT7VP2WZQu0)

body:
RE: 3, 2, 1

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81123888/461463732/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.03.17_b1_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjEyM2FhNy02NmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obGLuNhJuzBcp-OqB9OenJ88vCDvGwG1JgkykUFhnpk=)

Team, I just wanted to make sure you saw this note from my campaign manager.

**Here’s the deal:** Once the polls close Tuesday night, my opponent will become the official Republican nominee – _which means he’ll start getting the support of the Republican establishment._

**We know from 2022 that National Republicans are willing to spend anything – _even millions of dollars_ – to defeat me and flip OH-01 red and _we cannot let that happen._**

**I hate asking, but to win in November we’re going to need all the support we can get.[So, will you chip in $10 today to help me reach my $15,000 primary goal and start the general election out strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81123889/461463733/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.03.17_b1_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjEyM2FhNy02NmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obGLuNhJuzBcp-OqB9OenJ88vCDvGwG1JgkykUFhnpk=)**

Appreciate you,

Greg

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jenna Kaufman via Landsman for Congress**
Date: Sat, Mar 16, 2024
Subject: 3, 2, 1 Hi there, it’s Jenna, Greg’s campaign manager, here.

There’s no time to waste with the primary election right around the corner, so allow me to cut right to the chase: [**We only have 3 days left until the polls close, and then we head into the general election. clean_body: RE: 3, 2, 1 | = Team, I just wanted to make sure you saw this note from my campaign manager. Here’s the deal: Once the polls close Tuesday night, my opponent will become the official Republican nominee – which means he’ll start getting the support of the Republican establishment. We know from 2022 that National Republicans are willing to spend anything – even millions of dollars – to defeat me and flip OH-01 red and we cannot let that happen. I hate asking, but to win in November we’re going to need all the support we can get.= Appreciate you, Greg \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jenna Kaufman via Landsman for Congress Date: Sat, Mar 16, 2024 Subject: 3, 2, 1 Hi there, it’s Jenna, Greg’s campaign manager, here. ---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81125668/461468429/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3592-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQxNTIwYy02OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e43szmzXATKgnKacLB7PWYmyNt1omZI9mmbKB-AUbgY=)
Friend,

I grew up in Brooklyn as the son of an exterminator and a stay-at-home mom, and a descendant of victims of the Holocaust. My friend Jacky Rosen grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran.
Today, I have the great privilege and responsibility of serving as the first Jewish Senate majority leader in our nation’s history, and Jacky is the only Jewish woman currently serving in the U.S. Senate.
**Don’t ever tell me that things can’t change.**

Our humble origins and shared Jewish faith are at the core of what motivates our work together in the Senate. Every day, we’re fighting to make progress on the real issues Americans face: lowering everyday costs for families, combating hate and discrimination, and restoring reproductive freedom.
But the GOP has a different vision for America, which is why they’re trying to defeat Jacky and enact their toxic agenda.

Right now, Republicans are targeting Jacky’s seat in battleground Nevada as the key to Senate control. Mitch McConnell personally selected an extreme GOP opponent to run against her, and he just set a new fundraising record. Donald Trump has been campaigning aggressively in Nevada to rally support from his MAGA base.
**We can’t let the only Jewish woman serving in the Senate stand against the full force of the GOP alone. But with polling showing Jacky tied neck and neck with her opponent right now, she needs all the help she can get to fight back. That’s why I’m personally reaching out to ask for your support:**
**[Will you please join me in supporting Jacky's reelection campaign by giving $5 or more now? Every dollar will make a critical difference in keeping Nevada blue, defending our Senate majority, and ensuring that Jacky and I can both continue making progress for the American people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81125669/461468430/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3592-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQxNTIwYy02OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e43szmzXATKgnKacLB7PWYmyNt1omZI9mmbKB-AUbgY=)**
Thank you for your support, friend.

Chuck Schumer
Senate Majority Leader
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=pdByBcX0OOs30MAQhLvKkd2gzcL3oc3R3Mrze%2B4qXcFrm6%2BnK9dpDStPkApBVQict5BrBVXhIc0HQL9Cd2ttT137vbnbihr6qEdVj52NBSZWOXGV4nhmrmXo1uiMqIeKkeY3%2FOA7cP3FcyU8Hm4YkgFrSlL%2ByxZQtK%2FoFDhMPOfJBt9cSKj6cgc%2BXp7og9KnHD4Mz%2BKhWNCZOOAikLM%2BSpMHL84Pixdhuk3ndCg5X8dRhcTlnr1iNBz80Gubba6uocf64TmtEFJ%2BKQkqT79q1gW21DZZrvuP2RPKZyLf5TWLteHPXZzlGhA%2FyigTIMig6Rd7Vf8HUoMA379fJt2izQ49aLw2S3QD%2FyDLjxysSiS06ByvfRevwPC6VcY501MYllGV46CdWWh%2Bcp%2FVZvnKexzyKXHqmHxLQqk%2FarnhA98%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsymlEBiNC

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osymlEBiNC

Dear
Fellow Patriot,
If you
opened this email because you remember my playing days with the
Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

Having
you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey
Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we
battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees...
...well,
as they say, "Those were the days."
But this
email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought
I'd be writing to you.

Today,
I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a
seat in the United States Senate.
As of
March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff
in November.
Democrat
policies have brought America to its knees.
There's
fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime,
homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding
and for the first time causing more people to leave California.
Joe
Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one
bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to
say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and
dependent.
And
that's why I'm running for Senate.
We
Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic
malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.
And I
believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values
at the heart of everything we do.
But there
is no way I can pull it off without you.
Will you
rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?
I've
lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell
you -- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never
seen before.
They are
hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters
in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of
California...
I know we
can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.
I'm
fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake
-- I'm not just taking the field for Californians.
When we
win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical
Adam Schiff...
...we
start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country
desperately needs.
Thank you
and God Bless,

Steve
Garvey

Republican for United States Senate

DONATE

PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE

PO Box
532389
Los
Angeles, CA 90053-2389

subject: I'm feeling lucky

body:
wearing green for good luck
| | |

I don't know about you, friend, but I'm feeling lucky today! 🍀
Whether it's talking to voters who are sick of extremist Republicans sowing division in their communities, or the polls showing that this race is statistically tied, I've never been more confident that Florida is ready to flip blue this fall.
But even though St. Patrick's Day is one of my favorite holidays, I can't afford to take today off to celebrate with a green beverage. **Not when we're only two weeks out from our first major FEC deadline of 2024. **
See, as soon as our fundraising numbers go public, Rick Scott's team will pore over them for _any_ signs of weakness. If we fall short of our goals, they'll know their investments to defeat us are working — _so we can't waste time chasing rainbows._
**That's why this St. Paddy's Day, I'm wearing green for good luck in building a big enough "pot of gold" to take on Rick Scott's massive fortune, and flip Florida blue.**

clean_body: wearing green for good luck | | | I don't know about you, friend, but I'm feeling lucky today! 🍀 Whether it's talking to voters who are sick of extremist Republicans sowing division in their communities, or the polls showing that this race is statistically tied, I've never been more confident that Florida is ready to flip blue this fall. But even though St. Patrick's Day is one of my favorite holidays, I can't afford to take today off to celebrate with a green beverage. Not when we're only two weeks out from our first major FEC deadline of 2024. See, as soon as our fundraising numbers go public, Rick Scott's team will pore over them for any signs of weakness. If we fall short of our goals, they'll know their investments to defeat us are working — so we can't waste time chasing rainbows. That's why this St. Paddy's Day, I'm wearing green for good luck in building a big enough "pot of gold" to take on Rick Scott's massive fortune, and flip Florida blue. We can't afford to be in a pinch (sorry, I had to!) ahead of this critical goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so lucky to have you on my team. Donald Trump is the Former White Supremacist-in-Chief. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sUHflvf-mm9Yx5PwXWYLME6oHpLR6F6YTBKAZR1YuJJYZ36XxrpqtYvG-2kcTFvVhAG_oIzAaxzSKcasbYqj-sop4ewOIhTMC2nnThwp33To4S0K3ZWbKZvLUV-fCd4SQjh17OCA_diYGt7Y6BxaHf8O1rBb90Scj_y9vN7dsUz19wo59boMa0kGnL8WzNnjZ01zuDjxdV5h4bGnH25qIwH_xT84DH24y3t5-NFXa_dtbfqepQZ_hhLecFlQbPziBtjx7vIDGJ8W0PKo15QsMBA/44q/iKTqbFIwR9q3JuyYJKEU4A/h0/h001.ondMkOYlBRx-qkkVKZAEkZjn4Eicha37HWy5qxygKSM)

Peter, **I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Donald Trump is the former White Supremacist-in-Chief.** _Why?_ Because this is the same man who led a deadly, white supremacist attack against our democracy on January 6th. The _same_ man who used racist rhetoric when he referred to COVID-19 as the “Chinese virus” and “kung flu.” The _same_ man who defended white nationalists taking to the streets with tiki torches in Charlottesville, Virginia. The list of Trump’s racist remarks is already more than a mile long and keeps getting longer every time he speaks. Now, Republicans are working around the clock to make sure he’s re-elected in November while his right-wing billionaire donors meddle in Democratic primaries like mine. **Make no mistake:** white supremacy is the single greatest threat to our freedoms and democracy and Donald Trump is the face of that movement. If we fail to reject Trump in November, the foundation of our democracy will be at risk, and communities like Missouri’s 1st Congressional District will be the ones to suffer the most. **[Peter, join me today in our fight against bigotry, racism, and hate in _all_ its forms. I can’t do this work without you, so please consider chipping in anything you can right now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu2opHxbrdLylj8Xz4KZ1hRY9Bj1CaqijIXCDlo6e7EAbvNvmX3fymGr_NsibNTzEBZW_nE6azR7HYhfyzDjupRwyHmf2SSohjXaLqk606WcxSP-7BpTmZz6HiU4tqF_pw0WfpLAwNWt7pDsYJTNyXW96tqOWpKrvakc834rAcWJ-fsiHTVrO1w_ZOoMlyRHEz035xgjUehDnG2Eor2Nn2T0290S9UYhI_Pg7t3PmbD5sxCYd8ZBu59BpQRfqAsFd83Qs1Oq2FFvShA5jqdDKWpimmBr1UfPWWOYIHUgrxqlGQw6bu08DpBU0EZykUk4Mn47ZQsEm2LhXd7F3obJ3QhRBULVYNSNu2VcfOdaTkmHOQ04o1hnX-Ku8kAMqCi0yo/44q/iKTqbFIwR9q3JuyYJKEU4A/h1/h001.OZOTjG8t9oPgFLYX9jqBVTf55xEgd-S3bcSS0-ZwYVc)**

As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty on a mission to save lives; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice.

clean_body: Donald Trump is the Former White Supremacist-in-Chief. | | Peter, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Donald Trump is the former White Supremacist-in-Chief. Why? Because this is the same man who led a deadly, white supremacist attack against our democracy on January 6th. The same man who used racist rhetoric when he referred to COVID-19 as the “Chinese virus” and “kung flu.” The same man who defended white nationalists taking to the streets with tiki torches in Charlottesville, Virginia. The list of Trump’s racist remarks is already more than a mile long and keeps getting longer every time he speaks. Now, Republicans are working around the clock to make sure he’s re-elected in November while his right-wing billionaire donors meddle in Democratic primaries like mine. Make no mistake: white supremacy is the single greatest threat to our freedoms and democracy and Donald Trump is the face of that movement. If we fail to reject Trump in November, the foundation of our democracy will be at risk, and communities like Missouri’s 1st Congressional District will be the ones to suffer the most. If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Cori Bush | | As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty on a mission to save lives; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice. Now, Cori is running for re-election to continue doing the most for everyone, starting with those who have the greatest need. | | | PAID FOR BY CORI BUSH FOR CONGRESS | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cori Bush for Congress, please .

body:
Republicans know they have a problem with young voters. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdegodPYxmvaDThnhv11KVE9pk68ydviGpOfxccQzbJqrMfTUfDvA08tiHv1iCGbpTz1oH7fL3AtZQVEyv_9wpchbgkhPE8x_aB5r4Ln7qU_1hXOmzzZbdIKYHg-6cPNpOsuzTm-7jJ07kI8Nmbq86Ta3ORxQKE95ySAlqPgf4vhWS09fGmDPXIo8n339aEzgPa-5dyxbzI-RKinI-4qYMsDFmfqG2eHO2xd1qTBKm-HtCyyp5PaCsPyKdOskvxRngkpz1Y_uvqRqFmZhfNhmgbrltf8bdrDObVkhtJlz0K1y9RaEeokEZLnO3fryuIBDWTGHdxt2POunUuk83_e4nO0/44q/IVrp2oVDQkOk0-elw-S36A/h0/h001.Z6XQlXIArBYOORj3C4IXsuOTct22Yjm8Rus5pB7SGuo)
| | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsaJXQ-IVJRDsq3j0Op0zzX7gDDKKQYs-IqzOzulxqi_Q7f1lmZmZ5bt5doH8TNpYlGBmYQU2VRaGVIQUipt6Q1OAqMAAqbegH9KoLPSIj7dIcKPnVczj9nWZ4SMfbRbbNBaDMtyDNFbP6Nwpc8yscSMfnqDb_TnGjvrmhwZrroE1NNz8DseRrI5Uv1HQjj80OWXNAN2N_-IK09IJ_xMoe0zQ4J2GvyAw38f72F0RS211HDUgg6EBySiIZaaatDXAkyYo8Z9XjmZlKozZXEd_bRh2D9Fr-NSB1chx7ZoiOrUSarvbCbHPrBmq8ZDkukgSpYl8CpC-xLnnmAQGSSE73LcFjKaWmDI2CjA1GNp7i-OyFs668_Oumoy5llQgjqXK_aW64RLsD8mJL5_DzqA1tT/44q/IVrp2oVDQkOk0-elw-S36A/h1/h001.BzIz5ril-Pz9VrRoxpLYZY_yHGXl7AGylxsyzU4Z7pY)
Peter,

**Republicans know they have a problem with young voters.** It’s why they’ve spent so much time and effort trying to stop us from voting, whether it’s through restrictive voting laws designed to stop college students from casting ballots or their outrageous proposals to raise the voting age.

But they’re starting to wake up to the fact that whether they like it or not, young people _will_ vote if they’re motivated to turn out.

**So the GOP is changing tactics.** ALEC Action — the campaign arm of the American Legislative Exchange Council, which pushes for the passage of ultra-right-wing bills in state legislatures across the country — is teaming up with Run GenZ to boost young “conservatives” who are running for office.

Seem like a familiar strategy?_We thought so too._ [ **Will you split $10 or any amount you can between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC? Every donation helps us double down on our strategy to elect _progressive_ young leaders instead. ** ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsaJXQ-IVJRDsq3j0Op0zzX7gDDKKQYs-IqzOzulxqi_Q7f1lmZmZ5bt5doH8TNpYlGBmYQU2VRaGVIQUipt6Q1OAqMAAqbegH9KoLPSIj7dIcKPnVczj9nWZ4SMfbRbbNBaDMtyDNFbP6Nwpc8yscSfdp7FACQMd0ZE4MYE2zwJkbOTxzIygBIUPJ-7GfWBTGJ1WuJGWFi_g_aFGIzpaqEmc_rt24CpU4Xyro1Eue_U1A2t2CxjGQtgQ5-NFU0k04OU9iKysVOeDYTXIGgOCVnu02uq4vwvZ_mTk13ChwpOcNpBfsZH6q7eshbuVD0DVhLz1OdtAb6S9r2KyEHbGvu8U9cxxR3rd0kF8wsLuQAvHwnXQw16SOGXpMrl6yfpT3447qHNKK9n1c4dOJOuSkQ/44q/IVrp2oVDQkOk0-elw-S36A/h2/h001.pxQ3w_i7KCpSYplgYyFSiqnbzyaDmgNLLU9iQW3Gy4I)

But let’s be real for a second. The fact that the Republican Party is nearly entirely dominated by old, out-of-touch white dudes isn’t the real source of their problem with young voters (though it certainly doesn’t help).

**Republicans have a young voter problem because of their platform.** Young people today have grown up amidst near-constant mass shootings across the country, including in our schools. We see the evidence of a changing climate before our very eyes, and we know the impact it could have on our future.

But despite all this, Republicans have consistently fought to make it _easier_ to access **dangerous guns** and stood in the way of common-sense gun safety laws that could keep young people safe in school. And they continue to deny the reality of **climate change** in the face of overwhelming evidence.

Plus, while young people today are more pro-choice and pro-equality than ever, Republicans across the country have made it their mission to chip away at **LGBTQ rights** and pass draconian **abortion bans,** often with no exceptions whatsoever.

So MAGA is welcome to put a fresh young face on their horrible old policies — but that won’t change the fact that young voters are overwhelmingly opposed to their agenda.

**In contrast, Leaders We Deserve is working to elect young leaders who will fight for young peoples’ priorities, not against them. But we’re a grassroots organization that takes no corporate funding, so we’re counting on your support to do it.**

[ **If you want to expose the GOP's latest astroturfed effort to target young people as the sham it is, split $10 or anything you can right now to help us elect the leaders we really deserve on Election Day:** ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsaJXQ-IVJRDsq3j0Op0zzX7gDDKKQYs-IqzOzulxqi_Q7f1lmZmZ5bt5doH8TNpYlGBmYQU2VRaGVIQUipt6Q1OAqMAAqbegH9KoLPSIj7dIcKPnVczj9nWZ4SMfbRbbNBaDMtyDNFbP6Nwpc8yscSjgR87frcsyJixhSNk68GJ3XJjgW1JK59Cv-E2mrYw2P5a_SY_N7_0BO13ZfHETvwTInJmgzz3J0pePyZvrYgO_bct9AIvIpNmcZQ6brljq5QxskJab2ZZLwC_15Er9W25TB6Jb6e-oRB3nZlTGMBWIE_SBB8XdTUWMAC_lTmEcSYatat5lPNW4UY_Eao1mhh9MxvAWQyDzLd1VVk846lk2V31AKB9D99dWCqGdZ9uSbAD5WdVyBf_QFJlItgPfFi/44q/IVrp2oVDQkOk0-elw-S36A/h3/h001.BWJ5Wso89dsNCu2u5YIEJ2s3bHOfB_sAhlg67ykE1Yw) Thank you for your support,

David Hogg
President & Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPoGmLCwLeFXUxgz9_YqFaswjEdJvtTcQbjlWrF02jJbNOaKIUt23KtRP0oVfOdhf-WEmSygfDHczC8zmte-GRfoNI7aBm_frBb4HS1HyhO-g4TeV95oC4lvGFDsCiP0lxVMENeoTqr9M26yFaAZA_hZRAzIXSBSLADfeNp0-j7EwfqCTLHz9kSb83nIgOWL6K84z4OTnm3uujf-hGpzh3JLRHJGGzinY1X7PBnecED9lMcgZ-Rm1hWAwjXevKboFxBaUMnnHO_-EVY_GJZiSghblNe6fOYtTB4HojldJldoI5H6kKyHVLsEX64d1ri80Fg/44q/IVrp2oVDQkOk0-elw-S36A/h4/h001.ou8gBh2bjbjfqOHfUj-q9b8YvXngUKck-FskFZHleNs) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: Republicans know they have a problem with young voters. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Republicans know they have a problem with young voters. It’s why they’ve spent so much time and effort trying to stop us from voting, whether it’s through restrictive voting laws designed to stop college students from casting ballots or their outrageous proposals to raise the voting age. But they’re starting to wake up to the fact that whether they like it or not, young people will vote if they’re motivated to turn out. So the GOP is changing tactics. ALEC Action — the campaign arm of the American Legislative Exchange Council, which pushes for the passage of ultra-right-wing bills in state legislatures across the country — is teaming up with Run GenZ to boost young “conservatives” who are running for office. Seem like a familiar strategy?We thought so too. But let’s be real for a second. The fact that the Republican Party is nearly entirely dominated by old, out-of-touch white dudes isn’t the real source of their problem with young voters (though it certainly doesn’t help). Republicans have a young voter problem because of their platform. Young people today have grown up amidst near-constant mass shootings across the country, including in our schools. We see the evidence of a changing climate before our very eyes, and we know the impact it could have on our future. But despite all this, Republicans have consistently fought to make it easier to access dangerous guns and stood in the way of common-sense gun safety laws that could keep young people safe in school. And they continue to deny the reality of climate change in the face of overwhelming evidence. Plus, while young people today are more pro-choice and pro-equality than ever, Republicans across the country have made it their mission to chip away at LGBTQ rights and pass draconian abortion bans, often with no exceptions whatsoever. So MAGA is welcome to put a fresh young face on their horrible old policies — but that won’t change the fact that young voters are overwhelmingly opposed to their agenda. In contrast, Leaders We Deserve is working to elect young leaders who will fight for young peoples’ priorities, not against them. But we’re a grassroots organization that takes no corporate funding, so we’re counting on your support to do it. Thank you for your support, David Hogg President & Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC explained
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We launched a coalition of 20+ progressive groups united to demand the
Democratic Party reject AIPAC, but you might be wondering, who is AIPAC
anyway?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240317.PwS6XR&refcode=em20240317-33814&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=33814%2E1203867%2E1chJGh ]If you already know the deal about AIPAC and want to fuel our work to
stop their dangerous influence in Washington, chip in here.

Otherwise, here’s an explainer on AIPAC and why we’re taking them on:

AIPAC stands for the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a lobby
group founded in the 1950s to build bipartisan support for Israel in
Congress.

For most of AIPAC’s existence, it didn’t get involved in elections. They
didn’t need to. But following the groundbreaking elections of AOC, Rashida
Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, and Ayanna Pressley, Congress for the first time had
members willing to speak out for Palestinian human rights. The Democratic
base began to shift on the issue, recognizing Israel’s apartheid rule over
Palestinians.

As a result, in 2021 AIPAC formed its own PAC and Super PAC known as
United Democracy Project (UDP) that waded into Democratic primaries,
spending millions against progressive, pro-peace candidates like Summer
Lee and Ilhan Omar.

Let’s be clear: AIPAC’s campaign spending is a sign of weakness.
Unconditional support for Israel’s far-right government has been
significantly weakened, particularly among Democratic voters. AIPAC’s
tactic of last resort is to threaten to spend millions of dollars to
silence anyone who may speak out for Palestinian human rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240317.PwS6XR&refcode=em20240317-33814&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=33814%2E1203867%2E1chJGh ]That’s why it’s so important that we have the Squad’s back. We can’t
let AIPAC’s fear tactics work. Chip in now to help us reject AIPAC and
re-elect the Squad in 2024.

So where does AIPAC’s funding come from? While they claim to be
bipartisan, AIPAC is fueled by massive donations from millionaires and
billionaires, including right-wing megadonors who’ve donated to Donald
Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Nikki Haley. The same people trying to re-elect
Trump are bankrolling AIPAC’s primaries against the Squad.

AIPAC’s dark money influence is widespread: last cycle, only 33 out of 535
members of Congress did not receive money from the group's network. Who
AIPAC targets, however, is a narrow group of candidates and elected
officials. AIPAC’s Super PAC exclusively spends against Democrats in
primaries — particularly young, Black and brown progressive champions like
the Squad. In fact, more than 85% of the money UDP (AIPAC’s Super PAC) has
spent has been against candidates of color.

Not only that, but AIPAC has ardently endorsed and contributed to 109
Republican insurrectionists who denied the 2020 election results, as well
as more than 200 anti-abortion Republican extremists. They recently
congratulated retiring Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell on a job
well done for his decades of work stonewalling progress, stacking the
SCOTUS with Republicans, and pushing a far-right agenda.

All in all, AIPAC is a right-wing organization, and it’s our job to build
a movement to expose their right-wing agenda to all voters so that they
are rejected by the Democratic Party, following the same path as other
lobby groups like the NRA.

That fight starts now. AIPAC and its affiliates are going all-out to try
and take down the Squad and any other Democrat who expresses support for a
ceasefire and peace in Gaza. Last year, they announced plans to spend an
unprecedented $100 million in this year’s elections. They’ve already run
attack ads against Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, and Cori Bush while
hand-picking their primary opponents.

Enough is enough. It is time for the Democratic Party as a whole to do
what’s right and stand up against AIPAC’s threat to our democracy.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We launched a coalition of 20+ progressive groups united to demand the Democratic Party reject AIPAC, but you might be wondering, who is AIPAC anyway? [ ]If you already know the deal about AIPAC and want to fuel our work to stop their dangerous influence in Washington, chip in here. Otherwise, here’s an explainer on AIPAC and why we’re taking them on: AIPAC stands for the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a lobby group founded in the 1950s to build bipartisan support for Israel in Congress. For most of AIPAC’s existence, it didn’t get involved in elections. They didn’t need to. But following the groundbreaking elections of AOC, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, and Ayanna Pressley, Congress for the first time had members willing to speak out for Palestinian human rights. The Democratic base began to shift on the issue, recognizing Israel’s apartheid rule over Palestinians. As a result, in 2021 AIPAC formed its own PAC and Super PAC known as United Democracy Project (UDP) that waded into Democratic primaries, spending millions against progressive, pro-peace candidates like Summer Lee and Ilhan Omar. Let’s be clear: AIPAC’s campaign spending is a sign of weakness. Unconditional support for Israel’s far-right government has been significantly weakened, particularly among Democratic voters. AIPAC’s tactic of last resort is to threaten to spend millions of dollars to silence anyone who may speak out for Palestinian human rights. [ ]That’s why it’s so important that we have the Squad’s back. We can’t let AIPAC’s fear tactics work. Chip in now to help us reject AIPAC and re-elect the Squad in 2024. So where does AIPAC’s funding come from? While they claim to be bipartisan, AIPAC is fueled by massive donations from millionaires and billionaires, including right-wing megadonors who’ve donated to Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Nikki Haley. The same people trying to re-elect Trump are bankrolling AIPAC’s primaries against the Squad. AIPAC’s dark money influence is widespread: last cycle, only 33 out of 535 members of Congress did not receive money from the group's network. Who AIPAC targets, however, is a narrow group of candidates and elected officials. AIPAC’s Super PAC exclusively spends against Democrats in primaries — particularly young, Black and brown progressive champions like the Squad. In fact, more than 85% of the money UDP (AIPAC’s Super PAC) has spent has been against candidates of color. Not only that, but AIPAC has ardently endorsed and contributed to 109 Republican insurrectionists who denied the 2020 election results, as well as more than 200 anti-abortion Republican extremists. They recently congratulated retiring Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell on a job well done for his decades of work stonewalling progress, stacking the SCOTUS with Republicans, and pushing a far-right agenda. All in all, AIPAC is a right-wing organization, and it’s our job to build a movement to expose their right-wing agenda to all voters so that they are rejected by the Democratic Party, following the same path as other lobby groups like the NRA. That fight starts now. AIPAC and its affiliates are going all-out to try and take down the Squad and any other Democrat who expresses support for a ceasefire and peace in Gaza. Last year, they announced plans to spend an unprecedented $100 million in this year’s elections. They’ve already run attack ads against Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, and Cori Bush while hand-picking their primary opponents. Enough is enough. It is time for the Democratic Party as a whole to do what’s right and stand up against AIPAC’s threat to our democracy. [ ]We’re fighting back against AIPAC’s attacks on the Squad while pushing for ALL Democratic candidates to reject their dark money once and for all: will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to support our Reject AIPAC campaign? [ ]Contribute $5 We’ve defeated AIPAC and its millions of dollars of right-wing megadonor money before — now more than ever, we need to do it again, and we need to put an end to their interference in our Democratic elections. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: The latest bigoted attack on Ilhan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The unfortunate reality is that this is just the beginning of the type of rhetoric Ilhan's going to face in this campaign.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1025%2E791427%2E3YXwO9)

**We wanted to make sure you saw this, team:**
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar24.3mFzHz&refcode=em240317-1-t1&t=2&akid=1025%2E791427%2E3YXwO9)
In the latest bigoted and Islamophobic attack against Ilhan, this past week CNN pundit Scott Jennings called her a "public relations agent for Hamas," without a single bit of resistance from the rest of the panel, or any apology from the network.
Blatant Islamophobia and racism are all too common for people who look and worship like Ilhan. And at a moment when Islamophobia across our country and the world is at an all-time high, _the normalization of this hate must be condemned unequivocally._
The unfortunate reality is that this is just the beginning of the type of rhetoric Ilhan's going to face in this campaign.
Groups like AIPAC and their United Democracy Project super PAC are preparing to spend _millions_ against progressive women of color like Ilhan, and bigoted attacks are standard in their playbook.
**We need to be ready to fight back against this kind of hate, and the only way we'll have the resources to compete with the right wing's dark money is if we're all in this together.**
**[That's why we're asking: Can you chip in $3 or any amount you can to stand with Ilhan and our campaign today? It's so important that we show Ilhan this movement has her back.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar24.3mFzHz&refcode=em240317-1-t1&t=3&akid=1025%2E791427%2E3YXwO9)

I'm very lucky to have you in my corner.
-Dr. Bob

Democrat, MI01

clean_body: [] Happy St. Patrick's Day [] ^ Our beloved Brynn is now a teenager. Time flies. Could you wish my campaign a little luck with a donation today [] ? Your contributions make a big difference in helping us succeed. I believe in campaign-finance reform so we're not looking for a pot of gold, just a whatever you can chip in. CONTRIBUTE [] Friends Here are some interesting lesser-known facts about St. Patrick. St. Patrick wasn't Irish. Slavery was what brought St. Patrick to Ireland. St. Patrick used the shamrock to explain the Holy Trinity while preaching. A fourth leaf is where we get luck. St. Patrick wore blue, not green. St. Patrick probably didn't drive all the snakes out of Ireland. St. Patrick's wasn’t his given name. St Patrick's Day is held on the day he passed away. St. Patrick isn't technically a saint. * The tradition of drinking to celebrate St. Patrick's Day is said to have started with the saint himself, who announced that everybody should have a drop of the hard stuff after an innkeeper was less than forthcoming with a bottle of whiskey. Regardless of the real history, St. Patrick lived a fascinating life and today's holiday is a welcome sign of spring. To all who celebrate or those with Irish heritage, we wish you a very happy St. Patrick's Day. I'm very lucky to have you in my corner. -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 CONTRIBUTE [] [] Or, send a check to FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

Happy St. Patrick’s Day!
As we celebrate the greenest day of the year, we wanted to send you a note to remind you that we're going to need more than luck to make a difference at the ballot box this year.
We need strong Democratic leadership from top to bottom, and with your support, we can sham-ROCK the vote in favor of progress. This election season, let's join forces to elect Democrats who are committed to making positive changes in our community and our country. Here’s how we’ll make it happen:
🌈 Luck won't cut it - we need your action!
It's not enough to cross your fingers and hope for the best. Get involved, volunteer, and be prepared to vote this year. Together, we can turn the tide and create a more inclusive and prosperous future. Check your voter registration status here. [https://www.ncsbe.gov/registering/checking-your-registration]
🌟 Four-leaf clovers and Democratic victories!
Let's plant the seeds of change and watch them grow into a garden of success for our community. Your support is the fertilizer that will make it happen! Click to follow and share Wiley’s pro-democracy posts. [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC]
🍀 Irish we could count on your support!
Join us in the effort to sham-ROCK the vote and elect Democrats who will work tirelessly to make our community even better. Together, we can find the gold at the end of the rainbow and create a brighter future for all Americans.

Friend,

When I came to America from the socialist, violence-ridden Iraq, I never would have envisioned that the same policies that destroyed my home country would begin to be prominent in the United States.

That's what we're getting with Ilhan Omar and the "squad." They take orders from Washington insiders and advance the globalist agenda. It is almost as if they are intentionally trying to rip apart our country. Communism has failed all around the world. Why would it work here?

**Protecting the values our founding fathers built upon our land should be our top priority.**

I am running for Congress because I understand what is at stake. I want to give back to the country that allowed me to live the American dream.

****Will you help me defeat Ilhan Omar?****
******THE FUTURE OF OUR COUNTRY DEPENDS ON IT**** **
****DONATE BELOW // FIRE ILHAN!****

clean_body: This is our last chance. | Friend, When I came to America from the socialist, violence-ridden Iraq, I never would have envisioned that the same policies that destroyed my home country would begin to be prominent in the United States. That's what we're getting with Ilhan Omar and the "squad." They take orders from Washington insiders and advance the globalist agenda. It is almost as if they are intentionally trying to rip apart our country. Communism has failed all around the world. Why would it work here? Protecting the values our founding fathers built upon our land should be our top priority. I am running for Congress because I understand what is at stake. I want to give back to the country that allowed me to live the American dream. **Will you help me defeat Ilhan Omar? **THE FUTURE OF OUR COUNTRY DEPENDS ON IT **DONATE BELOW // FIRE ILHAN!** | Thank you! Dalia Al-Aqidi Candidate for Minnesota's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Dalia for Congress.

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6a4cdc9ed4f14d36b818cc2bd79553a3&_e=fS4Erp0hcwGpU8RuHDiMzwmA5v22zAM33OZsb4z9uaC_1JhBNSMYs0eNtyW9dbpfpPOyIoVCyVluJ2Gq3827NfMMkPvCYU8WTGuKdZCxmMOY_PS5f_bBWodT57h6FVmQLkfnLSDkeMz9_j5jNUYX3IxKdQVuT9-rBlAnKl8ntaLJy_GP6aa4x8Yug4W4gRM0VYxrhQDdWnHwjOWYX0nbcwRsx5PKsvuGHTLhOEVpupt0TiAKR9hh8TxTS3gZwwlV178aw179FxUVYoz9CkfT7jncsGQZRz2LLW6tKuGc5F-I1yXuy2GS4izxSriQ2uAiuXU4vacbKhLT_Cf6blR_iURSPjdDsBiA1y_Cc9d3nN5ucOPminKll8xiRoDpiI_IjAVb0DLRBia7nBlEZHFdkA%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6a4cdc9ed4f14d36b818cc2bd79553a3&_e=fS4Erp0hcwGpU8RuHDiMzwmA5v22zAM33OZsb4z9uaC_1JhBNSMYs0eNtyW9dbpfpPOyIoVCyVluJ2Gq3827NfMMkPvCYU8WTGuKdZCxmMOY_PS5f_bBWodT57h6FVmQLkfnLSDkeMz9_j5jNUYX3IxKdQVuT9-rBlAnKl8ntaLJy_GP6aa4x8Yug4W4gRM0VYxrhQDdWnHwjOWYX0nbcwRsx5PKsvuGHTLhOEVpupv5OMhzE2DtOL_oAdSHIHgL31MGPwdIrSR7Cp13ZN-ZE704_SJEt43WfCiNOrlZfkKf5GKPg8fcyxAXq4g9sWa0-NaBjDUna9UymQdR33-PaiM91YKohZMtIpeu9gCMHmYGNP8dxSDEa9OKZ_-IdOpc9dcUTxUJjYjQiIteDpIdrw%3D%3D)**

body:
Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative priorities moving through the Missouri Senate on March 14, 2024. | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
March 17, 2024
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ef7e11f0f7&e=a088917f89)
---
Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative priorities moving through the Missouri Senate on March 14, 2024.
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=81f16781d4&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a2d7d64937&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0159b5d568&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Senate approves wide-ranging omnibus education bill** The Missouri Senate on March 12 ended a two-day Democratic filibuster of legislation seeking to expand the state’s private school voucher program by transforming it into an omnibus bill containing numerous provisions intended to bolster public education – and convince Democrats to stand down, even though they still voted against it.

Senate Bill 727 started as a 12-page bill limited to expanding Missouri’s voucher program, which the Republican-controlled legislature first created in 2021. Those provisions would double the annual cap on the tax credits used to fund the program from $50 million to $100 million and allow students statewide to participate, instead of just those living in more populous cities or counties. It also would expand eligibility to kids from families with incomes of up to 400 percent of what it takes to qualify for the free and reduced lunch program, or about $220,000 a year for a family of four.

The Senate ultimately expanded the bill to dozens of provision spanning to 167 pages. Some key additions call for significantly increasing basic state funding for local public school districts and boosting minimum starting teacher pay from $25,000 to $40,000 a year. It also would financially reward districts that continue to hold classes five days a week and require local voter approval for districts in more populous cities and counties to switch to a four-day schedule. Another additional provision, though one Democrats opposed, would authorize charter schools in Boone County. Charter schools currently can operate only in Kansas City, St. Louis or in unaccredited districts.

The Senate on March 14 voted 19-10 to advance the measure to the House of Representatives, where its fate is uncertain. If the House were to make substantial changes to the legislation, it could jeopardize its chances of reaching a final vote in the Senate.
---
|
---
| **House votes to eliminate Missouri's corporate income tax**
Corporations would pay no state income taxes under legislation the Missouri House of Representatives granted first-round approval on March 12. The bill would cost the state an estimated $884.39 million a year in lost revenue once fully implemented in 2028.

The substantially reduced revenue collections that would result from eliminating the corporate income tax would be in addition to the billions the state has already forgone due to multiple large tax cuts the Republican-controlled General Assembly has enacted over the last decade, including a $2 billion income tax cut lawmakers approved just 18 months ago.

Although an influx of federal pandemic relief funds in recent years has so far masked the financial consequences of the tax cuts, that is ending with flat revenue collections expected for the upcoming 2025 fiscal year and revenue declines likely coming soon. Additional major tax cuts would greatly exacerbate the situation.

Down from a high of 6.5 percent, Missouri’s corporate income tax rate currently stands at 4 percent. Under House Bill 2274, the tax would be completely phased out over three years. Starting on Jan. 1, 2025, the rate would drop by one percentage point per year until being zeroed out as of Jan. 1, 2028. A second vote is required to advance the bill to the Senate.
---
|
---
| **House endorses limiting STL earning tax on remote work**
The Missouri House of Representatives on March 11 granted preliminary approval to legislation aimed at stopping St. Louis from imposing its local earnings tax on people who work remotely from outside the city for companies located in the city. A second vote is required to advance the bill to the Senate.

St. Louis and Kansas City are the only Missouri municipalities authorized to impose a 1 percent earnings tax on people who either live or work in their cities. While both cities historically had exempted remote work conducted elsewhere from being subject taxation, St. Louis changed its policy during the pandemic and sought to levy the tax on non-city residents working remotely.

The issue is currently being litigated, with St. Louis losing at the trial level. The Missouri Court of Appeals Eastern District recently heard arguments in the case but hasn’t yet issue a ruling. House Bill 1516 would specify that remote work performed from outside the city cannot be taxed, and effectively preempt an appellate ruling in the city’s favor moving forward.
---
|
---
| **2024 SENATE BILLS**
[**SB 790**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a65eadcc1e&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor

[**SB 791**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=44db50eb3c&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness

[**SB 792**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=af3b4b501a&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act

[**SB 883**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2c943dcdf8&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[**SB 884**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a2269dd1e9&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance

[**SB 885**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6320e8e3f3&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts

[**SB 965**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a4c81a6215&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services

[**SB 966**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d94301d9b6&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services

[**SB 967**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6255428a89&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts

[**SB 1039**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5f2141c959&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council

[**SB 1041**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=04d32d1988&e=a088917f89)\- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits

[**SB 1097**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=244d7526b5&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[**SB 1098**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=36914fe602&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees

[**SB 1147**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b8ab75bcbe&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[**SB 1148**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=83032aef46&e=a088917f89) \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public defenders

[**SB 1149**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=014e380ffc&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to delinquent property taxes

[**SB 1191**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=637ed26990&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[**SB 1192**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f431a9e87f&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to grants for nonprofit organizations at risk for terrorist attacks

[**SB 1193**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=1b652bd485&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 1215**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=91c2106914&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4d8c486046&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=55e8efe870&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2cf8d23964&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.
---
|
---

If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call _866-211-9966_. [Beyond Housing](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=157293ba88&e=a088917f89):

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---

| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=1acc4c99c2&e=a088917f89).
