clean_body: Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative priorities moving through the Missouri Senate on March 14, 2024. | | | | | | | Capitol Report March 17, 2024 | | Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative priorities moving through the Missouri Senate on March 14, 2024. | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Senate approves wide-ranging omnibus education bill The Missouri Senate on March 12 ended a two-day Democratic filibuster of legislation seeking to expand the state’s private school voucher program by transforming it into an omnibus bill containing numerous provisions intended to bolster public education – and convince Democrats to stand down, even though they still voted against it. Senate Bill 727 started as a 12-page bill limited to expanding Missouri’s voucher program, which the Republican-controlled legislature first created in 2021. Those provisions would double the annual cap on the tax credits used to fund the program from $50 million to $100 million and allow students statewide to participate, instead of just those living in more populous cities or counties. It also would expand eligibility to kids from families with incomes of up to 400 percent of what it takes to qualify for the free and reduced lunch program, or about $220,000 a year for a family of four. The Senate ultimately expanded the bill to dozens of provision spanning to 167 pages. Some key additions call for significantly increasing basic state funding for local public school districts and boosting minimum starting teacher pay from $25,000 to $40,000 a year. It also would financially reward districts that continue to hold classes five days a week and require local voter approval for districts in more populous cities and counties to switch to a four-day schedule. Another additional provision, though one Democrats opposed, would authorize charter schools in Boone County. Charter schools currently can operate only in Kansas City, St. Louis or in unaccredited districts. The Senate on March 14 voted 19-10 to advance the measure to the House of Representatives, where its fate is uncertain. If the House were to make substantial changes to the legislation, it could jeopardize its chances of reaching a final vote in the Senate. | | House votes to eliminate Missouri's corporate income tax Corporations would pay no state income taxes under legislation the Missouri House of Representatives granted first-round approval on March 12. The bill would cost the state an estimated $884.39 million a year in lost revenue once fully implemented in 2028. The substantially reduced revenue collections that would result from eliminating the corporate income tax would be in addition to the billions the state has already forgone due to multiple large tax cuts the Republican-controlled General Assembly has enacted over the last decade, including a $2 billion income tax cut lawmakers approved just 18 months ago. Although an influx of federal pandemic relief funds in recent years has so far masked the financial consequences of the tax cuts, that is ending with flat revenue collections expected for the upcoming 2025 fiscal year and revenue declines likely coming soon. Additional major tax cuts would greatly exacerbate the situation. Down from a high of 6.5 percent, Missouri’s corporate income tax rate currently stands at 4 percent. Under House Bill 2274, the tax would be completely phased out over three years. Starting on Jan. 1, 2025, the rate would drop by one percentage point per year until being zeroed out as of Jan. 1, 2028. A second vote is required to advance the bill to the Senate. | | House endorses limiting STL earning tax on remote work The Missouri House of Representatives on March 11 granted preliminary approval to legislation aimed at stopping St. Louis from imposing its local earnings tax on people who work remotely from outside the city for companies located in the city. A second vote is required to advance the bill to the Senate. St. Louis and Kansas City are the only Missouri municipalities authorized to impose a 1 percent earnings tax on people who either live or work in their cities. While both cities historically had exempted remote work conducted elsewhere from being subject taxation, St. Louis changed its policy during the pandemic and sought to levy the tax on non-city residents working remotely. The issue is currently being litigated, with St. Louis losing at the trial level. The Missouri Court of Appeals Eastern District recently heard arguments in the case but hasn’t yet issue a ruling. House Bill 1516 would specify that remote work performed from outside the city cannot be taxed, and effectively preempt an appellate ruling in the city’s favor moving forward. | | 2024 SENATE BILLS \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council \- Modifies provisions relating to legal representation for certain court proceedings involving children \- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public defenders \- Modifies provisions relating to delinquent property taxes \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates provisions relating to grants for nonprofit organizations at risk for terrorist attacks \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies eligibility for appropriations from the Waterways and Ports Trust Fund | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: We did it! Wisconsin now has fair maps.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Republicans rigged the state. But democracy is back.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f1d417e-627f-4b32-9e51-2586f041f554/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. The long, dark night of ultra-partisan gerrymandering is over, and a new day for democracy now dawns in the Badger State. Recently, a new set of state legislative maps were signed into law for Wisconsin. These maps are graded “A” for fairness by the head of the nonpartisan Princeton Gerrymandering Project. The current maps scored an F. With the stroke of a pen, Wisconsin went from a “democracy desert” to, well, a democracy. This was all possible because of you. [I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91b740bc-e437-4443-9f62-c7d5e1b909fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but I want to tell you how we got here: Wisconsin’s gerrymandering crisis began in 2011, when Republican lawmakers drew legislative lines that guaranteed even landslide election losses wouldn’t cost them their majorities. The result was one of the most egregious, extreme partisan gerrymanders in American political history. In 2012 and 2018, Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly voted for Democratic majorities in the legislature but Republicans won huge majorities of the seats. In 2020 and 2022, Democrats won major statewide victories, but Republicans won near-supermajorities. All the while, Republican politicians in Wisconsin have used their power to restrict access to the ballot, remove authorities that voters had entrusted to statewide elected officials like the Governor and Attorney General, and smash the freedoms of workers to organize and advocate for themselves. For thirteen years, the democracy-proof legislature has been laying siege to democracy itself. But those statewide victories added up. In 2018, 2020, and 2023, voters built a new progressive majority on the State Supreme Court. By electing Governor Evers and preventing GOP supermajorities, they stopped hard-right maps from being signed into law. And last year, a civic uprising prevented Republicans from impeaching Janet Protasiewicz. In December, the Supreme Court ruled that Wisconsin’s legislative maps were unconstitutional. This wasn’t easy. This team had to knock on doors, call phones, chip in, share our views with friends and online—year after year, election after election, never giving up even when it felt like all was lost. But we did it. Today, the work doesn’t end. The candidate recruitment process now goes into overdrive. And at the same time, we remain vigilant in case Republican politicians in Madison and their allies once again, through the courts or any other strategy, attempt to thwart majority rule. Today, we commit to doing the work, ending the malign speakership of Robin Vos, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate, and paving the way towards a Democratic state Senate majority in 2026. I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask. The number of competitive legislative seats will triple so we’ll need triple the support, Peter. [Can you chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us organize voters in every corner of Wisconsin where Democrats have the chance to win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab4665ea-9d74-46f3-beab-a23a81312bbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e6e17fa-a57b-4ee7-81da-8983852cd75e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | This is a story with millions of heroes. Supporters like you and Blue Amp Action are some of them. From all of us at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, please know you have our boundless gratitude. In solidarity, Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b0ca164-681f-4eb1-94e6-4c1ab0e37d16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_em_op_wisdems24031718?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Patty
subject: let's keep making history >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Don't ever let anyone tell you that you can't make a difference
| | |
---
Peter,
If there's any advice I want you to take, it's to**never let anyone tell you that you can't make a difference.**
A lot's changed since I first got to D.C. Back then, I was one of only six women in the Senate, and often the only one in my committees, where I had to bring up issues facing families and communities – **otherwise, no one would.**
I mean, there wasn't even a women's bathroom next to the Senate floor – _because there hadn't been enough of us to warrant one._
Now that it's Women's History Month 2024, I think back on those days and am floored by how much both the Senate and the world have since changed.
**So the question that remains is: Where do we go from here?**
As a grandmother to young girls, I want to ensure the world is as open to them as it was for me.
That means ensuring they can make their own reproductive health decisions. Providing opportunities to get an education without drowning in debt. Building an economy where they can compete on an equal playing field and get equal pay for equal work. **Showing them that if they believe in themselves, work hard, and dream big, they can become whoever they want to be.**
But the only way that happens is by saving and expanding our blue Senate majority this November –**and Peter, your urgent support tonight will make _all the difference_ for our future success. **
**_[So in honor of Women's History Month, will you please rush $5 or more now to help me defend our majority and elect more Democratic women to the Senate who will safeguard the progress we've won, and continue fighting to build a future where](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81133550/461486965/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk239-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJmMGViYi02ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj7JTuuiR4a92FAl3ZKhtRwHbTdHbAoJW-6eEIIINtY=) all of us can dream big?_**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81133551/461486966/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk239-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJmMGViYi02ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj7JTuuiR4a92FAl3ZKhtRwHbTdHbAoJW-6eEIIINtY=)

Thanks for all you do – and happy Women's History Month.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81136455/461492860/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWYxMDI2NS03M2U0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu9iPd94F8HKU_h5aQ5T6_UQtTqypdiG6G4pQLzQJW8=&emci=5528e25e-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=69f10265-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=13185894) [**Derek, will you support Chris’s grassroots campaign by responding to our Priorities Survey? It’ll take just a couple of minutes to complete, but it means a lot to our campaign →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81136456/461492864/-763652326?refcode=email_031724_surv&utm_campaign=email_031724_surv&source=email_031724_surv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWYxMDI2NS03M2U0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu9iPd94F8HKU_h5aQ5T6_UQtTqypdiG6G4pQLzQJW8=&emci=5528e25e-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=69f10265-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=13185894)

Chris’s race is expected to be one of the closest in the country – and it’s critical to hold this seat so we can take back the House.

Now that we’re in 2024, and our campaign is kicking into high-gear, we want to make sure we’re connecting with folks to turn out the vote in this critical election – and Chris wants to make sure he’s talking with you about the issues you care about most! [**We’re reaching out to some of our top supporters asking if you’ll take just a few minutes to share your thoughts with us. Chris first ran for Congress because he cared about giving a voice to the people of PA-17 in Washington. And since then, that’s exactly what he’s done.

But we know that over time, people’s priorities change. And as we inch closer and closer to election day, Chris wants to make sure that his campaign is responding to the issues that folks like you care about most!

Chris knows this campaign isn’t just about him, but it’s about the people. To best represent you in Congress – and to win this critical race – we need your input.

[**Share your thoughts on this race and your priorities with Chris by responding to our survey today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81136461/461492873/-763652326?refcode=email_031724_surv&utm_campaign=email_031724_surv&source=email_031724_surv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWYxMDI2NS03M2U0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu9iPd94F8HKU_h5aQ5T6_UQtTqypdiG6G4pQLzQJW8=&emci=5528e25e-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=69f10265-73e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=13185894)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I created the Rooted in Community PAC to train and support grassroots activists, candidates, and groups that are focused on meeting theircommunities’ needs.
body:
Building a future where everyone feels safe and has their needs met. | | |
---
Friend, My colleagues in the House of Representatives are again pushing to send billions of taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military as it commits genocide. Meanwhile, many of our communities in the U.S. still don't have clean water, most families are living paycheck to paycheck, and everyday people can’t afford healthcare or housing. **The American people are demanding their representatives stop investing in war and instead invest in our communities.** I agree: Serving my community is why I ran for office. I just secured over $17 million in federal funding for 15 community projects in my district, marking over $52 million in community project funding over the last three years. This year’s investments will help get the lead out of our pipes, provide affordable housing and home repairs, support storm recovery and decrease pollution, help build new centers for seniors and workforce development, and more. My team and I also just hosted a community town hall and constituent services fair, where we helped residents one on one and connected them to the resources they need. To regularly support constituents with everyday challenges as they navigate federal bureaucracy—such as college debt, veterans’ services, immigration issues, and Social Security benefits—my team runs multiple Neighborhood Service Centers throughout our district. **We all deserve elected leaders who fight for their constituents’ needs and who act as public servants. We all deserve thriving communities where everyone feels safe and has their needs met.** **That’s why I created the Rooted in Community PAC:** to train and support grassroots activists, candidates, and groups that are focused on meeting their communities’ needs. During 2022’s election year, we ran free trainings for community organizers and candidates and we donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. This critical election year, we’re supporting movement groups and candidates in my home state of Michigan and across the country. [**Can you chip in to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today? Together, let’s invest in candidates and organizations that are helping to build a better future where we can all thrive and we’re truly represented by our political leaders.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2ejlGDudZAjIkYY4eQl2z1IzNBM5FQefE2lz73gfd3HNIb2ClxrrN8MegX6XA4I-XG09VEJw31zahg18tBh-8rq0voty8KcDF8_MVz6nBshZbjqURTiNWezsmZDGSndmM9rOslbIVjsYQWBjXRzDBmvmYu1XzYYHIf1qGXsdMYWTjulcS8oqBPTeJ5GcdFSUWiz9BIb5mEMzU7wQI4HsFtWlMKRLSsUqWTWtlLNnMXA5Q0seMFtQN5F3fNQA_uzDh8_0zTYrA-Xl1-9ZdOySX41IFIuzkWxMq9LgLj_DKs4ufgC6E211hgEEhLGm8dNJa1lFd0yCQ34FR3GfXWybqLYPbtS38J2EtnT3bTMv0aSNia7GTSwacYjl3ZfKwAye8DfpG3__SovZQjw0239Heg2_FaOEGQLySDPBJgvpv3ZaTPGVjdZBsvgRlrkhqPsyPAidnh6Aq-2KUs_VOKQ1qCjhGNLGzjL0MA7oJNOoBzsfEI-sPjpxwdJXyQwZh5T44SxdO3k2LywFAbglJy3WtzNCfGuRDmYByhTU_B2l4meWAC75UYOiD4Gp6jS_ABb7nDtFsMcZz9JP5fBeBzKGL68O9QPPZTjdgJVzuHkPL6mCkbIptwwydoreHEgSnbI8/44q/Spb-CspsSFCfFTc4rzN-CA/h0/h001.F0Od0lHv8HPC9dzNoAlqfh0VngBJaX7dFoOYu842V6k) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2ejlGDudZAjIkYY4eQl2z00JNg6xokqQ4lwZS1sNCE8xk_iGYt3ursqJ_THsrLR3Z3A0lRO3Nk0Ye9BQHE06qhjGKvNLzQMOsy8pyrquQEPL52dYEucIE9IY7kGxAVn9rHWM5MV-59wSu-TG5iLyDTCGKaYnUibww7XF4Plf145oHl6FJWQ1ZDNOUNN0Lt87yCjNUEyhBNbxupMQIgawS1RbZ1AarNVk8HWA1Efhozn9UUezq8UBjFAMJU38UbubScSFSHBkDC4tGgXjWiQhmNk8Ktck1DGT7szxKY2RjeDKSfadORNo2wh5fSDIOyAIMUDL8eteAXrYYPJibzFngr9wJzP5DjHT0ug6msXD83XJF62BNK_E7LXG0l3H3cfQO6nSFI3JcMCtwpr5UEUdDDpcw2hh2cw9jlK1RHTmWdfuyCViABLm2sUMcNncqALwL8aeGkl5djw0U313cHJ3Kjb264c25dadOzn7X46DqL_y59CU_kscTscj-PbdL8TTLFIZBlZSDBQEmo_PklhgEIIOvqgqEO0SS-LtGVC9rh9Gl8p2Ovt0_Ulv5Tr8NqNcwrv9A0N_uMuq3j96GDGDDsZywvq9t6hqW30cKnMkeRXcS3UfLfwbQXdJ4eyvwMyhtsTFyPkwr3wYJhvBG2fQHspL0i_5LJM2RDEiWLHpzxw/44q/Spb-CspsSFCfFTc4rzN-CA/h1/h001.NwKtE58DXtllYwsofI62lTUoKaQnFprKkzCc4oItKAs)

clean_body: Building a future where everyone feels safe and has their needs met. | | | Friend, My colleagues in the House of Representatives are again pushing to send billions of taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military as it commits genocide. Meanwhile, many of our communities in the U.S. still don't have clean water, most families are living paycheck to paycheck, and everyday people can’t afford healthcare or housing. The American people are demanding their representatives stop investing in war and instead invest in our communities. I agree: Serving my community is why I ran for office. I just secured over $17 million in federal funding for 15 community projects in my district, marking over $52 million in community project funding over the last three years. This year’s investments will help get the lead out of our pipes, provide affordable housing and home repairs, support storm recovery and decrease pollution, help build new centers for seniors and workforce development, and more. My team and I also just hosted a community town hall and constituent services fair, where we helped residents one on one and connected them to the resources they need. To regularly support constituents with everyday challenges as they navigate federal bureaucracy—such as college debt, veterans’ services, immigration issues, and Social Security benefits—my team runs multiple Neighborhood Service Centers throughout our district. We all deserve elected leaders who fight for their constituents’ needs and who act as public servants. We all deserve thriving communities where everyone feels safe and has their needs met. That’s why I created the Rooted in Community PAC: to train and support grassroots activists, candidates, and groups that are focused on meeting their communities’ needs. During 2022’s election year, we ran free trainings for community organizers and candidates and we donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. This critical election year, we’re supporting movement groups and candidates in my home state of Michigan and across the country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. I’m honored to serve you in Congress, and I promise to keep pushing our government to divest from death and instead invest in the life-affirming programs our communities desperately need. In solidarity, Rashida | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I’d like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

**[But if you only have a minute, all I’ll ask is that you donate $5 _(matched to become $15)_ to help defend our Senate majority and make a difference for our _real_ president’s Democratic agenda.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17582?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240317-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240317-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=13921%2E9716520%2E8Au8ui)**

**I’ve said before that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. $5 may not sound like a lot, but I’ve seen time and time again that each of us pitching in a little will make a BIG difference together -- and right now, my friends at the DSCC need that exact kind of help from Democrats like us.**

Here’s why: Republicans are just two seats away from retaking the Senate, and they’re willing to spend millions to erase our _razor-thin_ Democratic majority. The future of our country could be decided by critical races in battleground states like Nevada, Ohio, or Pennsylvania.

We can’t leave anything to chance. Everything from health care to climate change is on the ballot and Democrats simply can’t win without your support to **out-raise** , **out-organize** , and **out-campaign** the Republicans.

name: Powered By People
subject: Our volunteers in action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
With no online or automatic voter registration in our state, we’ve deployed thousands of Volunteer Deputy Registrars (VDRs) to help Texans register to vote before the critical 2024 elections. **Take a look at some of our amazing VDRs in action this week!**
From the St. Patrick’s Day Parade in Houston...
To the Spring Break Kite Festival in Laredo...
To Traders Village Market in San Antonio...
Our volunteers are going anywhere and everywhere they can find eligible but unregistered Democrats to bring into our elections.
In a state that makes it harder to register to vote and cast a ballot than any other, this is the work that’s critical to fighting voter suppression and ensuring every Texan can participate in our elections.
With just months to go before the most important election of our lifetimes — one where our democracy itself is on the line — we need to significantly ramp up this work in the weeks ahead.
[**Will you make a donation of $3 to help us recruit and train more VDRs to register new Democratic voters?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240317.ZnU-6E&refcode=ema20240317-239521&t=1&akid=239521%2E444211%2EhZ7zCM)

We can’t thank you enough for supporting this work. It wouldn’t be possible without you!
— Powered by People

clean_body: With no online or automatic voter registration in our state, we’ve deployed thousands of Volunteer Deputy Registrars (VDRs) to help Texans register to vote before the critical 2024 elections. Take a look at some of our amazing VDRs in action this week! From the St. Patrick’s Day Parade in Houston... To the Spring Break Kite Festival in Laredo... To Traders Village Market in San Antonio... Our volunteers are going anywhere and everywhere they can find eligible but unregistered Democrats to bring into our elections. In a state that makes it harder to register to vote and cast a ballot than any other, this is the work that’s critical to fighting voter suppression and ensuring every Texan can participate in our elections. With just months to go before the most important election of our lifetimes — one where our democracy itself is on the line — we need to significantly ramp up this work in the weeks ahead. We can’t thank you enough for supporting this work. It wouldn’t be possible without you! — Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: They call it a free market. I call it a cartel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — many Missourians spend weeks or months trying to get the drugs they need. They pay more for them too, if they’re lucky enough to get them at all. Big Pharma bankrupts and kills us, and Washington lets them get away with it.
**They call it a free market. I call it a cartel.** Please let me explain:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44616?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)
Just three wholesalers control about 90% of drug distribution for pharmacies. A handful of giant overseas corporations control 80% of our drug supply chain. And now we have drug shortages for everything from cancer drugs to Adderall.
**Everyday people suffer, some even die, but Big Pharma will still get record profits** — that's what monopoly power looks like.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44616?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)
The facts are clear on this: We CAN make these essential drugs in America and get them to those who need them. But Big Pharma chooses not to.
**To their top executives and biggest elite shareholders, record-breaking profits matter more than the shortages that cost Americans their lives and livelihoods.**
And, of course, there’s a reason our politicians haven’t already done something big about these drug shortages. Money.
That's why my campaign doesn’t take a cent from Big Pharma executives. And it's the reason I’m fighting to ban stock ownership for members of Congress, judges, and regulators (including fake “blind” trusts).
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44616?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)
Skyrocketing prices and record shortages for essential drugs are more than just cause for concern — that’s a CRISIS. Congress MUST act. If Big Pharma won't get us the drugs we need, America needs to start making them ourselves.
**That’s why when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I'll file legislation to change Big Pharma's incentives.** I’ll fight to make sure that when Big Pharma fails to deliver essential drugs to the Americans who need them, they won't just have to worry about bad press or long lines... They'll risk losing that market to a new Made-In-America competitor with generic prices.
With my plan, America will find, build, or modify the facilities necessary to make the essential drugs Big Pharma is failing to deliver (right now, 30% of American pharmaceutical manufacturing sites are already at or below 50% utilization). Then we’ll find the businesses and workers to run them on contracts that put patriotism over extreme profits.
**We’ll have American-made drugs that Americans can actually afford.** And we'll make them in places like Missouri, where we need good jobs and we already have the bio-pharma infrastructure to get it done.
**When we cut through the corporate corruption and political phoniness that’s gripping Washington, there is so much we can achieve for Missouri and our entire country** — creating jobs, getting people the medications they need at a price they can afford, and building up the American workers and businesses that make our nation strong.
**[So Peter, will you help me take this fight to the U.S. Senate by adding a donation of $10 or any amount you think is best toward my campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs so that when I’m elected, I’ll always work for real people like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44616?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44617?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44616?refcode=em20240317-5064&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)
---
Peter, unlike Josh Hawley, I’m not afraid to call these companies out for what they are: **A dangerous cartel that’s exploiting everyday Americans.**
When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’ll work to do more than just break up Big Pharma and make sure Americans can access the life-saving drugs they need — I’ll fight to see these corrupt corporations prosecuted for what they've done to us.
And I can promise you this: **I’ll fight like hell against any corrupt politician who gets in my way — in OUR way.**
Thanks for always standing with me,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240317-5064-footer&t=12&refcode2=5064_614464_7B_NNm&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=5064%2E614464%2E7B_NNm). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=358f315113394261bc7788707bbe832f&_e=ChGzwoggXiKiKJzp189UVFmyhVUarJAJnr3eHfUaB_moVr0NE83wJGdOUwHwLuDhwUpihEHHBN-LuYleXuK2EQVhmFXQX_xXtDZDOSgJv1bmDjcz4us-4aLQ1I7TGEE3v41ky7BaKNAiJ4U_TDYWkmp9UOoxIlwdglx9VzndzWl_Esas_KEDINbTWLp2FGRMYd5hQc--YVrZVfRCXsaME4xzpfgj0HZnVBDIzkBzEMhJtqc8xIiGHfaLMfZQ6sv5sWxQmKsBguKMVxiEYXlfPgku2GV7rFE_T8AirYPDtrvL6IhR3ZzbGSHmTbBjYvWGbZJb8rM5p8d0mY0cph4qHFiYjUj9ijn2D9kZyYNFYr0gJfkqhdQ0KPFQVqAe4VNeoxOm-SkYLMNWv7J33HIf6Q%3D%3D "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

They've spent time and money trying to convince Floridians that Democrats haven't been working for them, and now that Jared is disproving their lies, they're eager to defeat him. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Enjoy your St. Patrick's Day! \- Team Moskowitz | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. #
Happy St. Patrick's Day, Peter!
I hope your day is filled with all of the Irish soda bread you desire, plenty of good luck, and if you're in Chicago – enjoyment of the river being dyed green!
My love for St. Patrick’s Day came from my father, who was Irish-American. He taught me that the holiday was a way to celebrate your heritage and embrace your roots. As a family, it was one of our favorite times of the year. And for me, that hasn't changed.
Just take a look at this headline – I still get a kick out of it to this day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81138783/461497243/1907121275?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.17_B1_SPD_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjFlMGYwMi03NmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xoeLIjK6zwI3XiAw_ua-1uc9iKhA7L0fkEyGpvbuYU=)
But just because I have Irish in my blood doesn't mean I'm willing to leave everything up to luck. Especially not when it comes to holding our Senate majority in November.
We have quite a few Democratic incumbents who urgently need our support to hold their seats. On top of this, we have a serious shot at growing our majority if we commit to uplifting Democrats running for Republican-held seats.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump is campaigning across the country to match what we raise. He wants the presidency and a Republican Congress – and he'll do whatever he can to get it.
[**Defeating the MAGA agenda come November will take more than luck, Peter, it'll take a groundswell of grassroots support. Can I ask you to chip in $10 or more to help us keep our Senate majority, protect the White House, and retake the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81138784/461497244/1907121275?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.17_B1_SPD_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjFlMGYwMi03NmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xoeLIjK6zwI3XiAw_ua-1uc9iKhA7L0fkEyGpvbuYU=)

Peter, we’ve reached the point of this campaign where every single interaction with a voter could make all the difference. Without the necessary resources, we risk falling behind our opponents and we’ll fail to reach as many voters as possible in this final stretch.

My opponents have bigger pockets than me, but with your help, we can level the playing field and make sure we can spread my message for a fair and just Pennsylvania as far as possible.

It’s so clear to me that we have the most dedicated, energized, and fun ground game in this race... = These volunteers are out across the state canvassing neighborhoods, making phone calls, and engaging with voters to make sure Team Keir shows up in full force on April 23. name: Jon Tester
subject: diddly squat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—**but it’s more personal for me.**

Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them.

I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet and I can’t do it without your help.

[**I hate asking for your hard-earned money, but if you can throw a couple bucks toward my reelection campaign, I’d really appreciate it. Your donation will be split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us win this race.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64425?t=6&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64425?t=7&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
---
Over $120 million has already been spent or reserved in Montana’s Senate race and it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me.

Montana and rural America deserve better. I’ll do anything in my power to keep delivering on the issues that matter most, but without your help, Mitch McConnell will buy this seat right from under us. So, I’m reaching out to my top supporters to ask:

[**Will you stand with us by making a split contribution of any amount today? We’re up against mountains of outside spending, so when I say any amount helps, I mean it.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64425?t=8&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64426?t=9&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64427?t=10&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64428?t=11&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64429?t=12&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64430?t=13&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW)
Always grateful for your support,

Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13498%2E878179%2EFDDdfW) to request fewer emails. subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
Thanks to your incredible support, I'm thrilled to share that we've reached our mid-month fundraising goal. Your generosity and dedication have truly made all the difference.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81141374/461503466/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFhYTdmMC03OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xhOzXlJ4dXkMbvCg-ZTpLyqvRtTRdRcALb2stwkU18M=)

Peter:

I just wanted to take a moment to send you a heartfelt thank you.

Thanks to your incredible support, I'm thrilled to share that **we've reached our mid-month fundraising goal.** Your generosity and dedication have truly made all the difference.

I'm so proud of the grassroots team that we've built together. **Each and every one of you plays a vital role in helping us take back IA-01 for everyday Iowans.** Your commitment to our campaign inspires me every day, and I'm honored to have you by my side.

With your support, we've built momentum that will carry us all the way to Election Day and beyond. **I'm fired up and ready to fight for the people of Iowa.**

Thank you again for everything you do,

Christina

**Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. She's running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress because she believes everyone deserves a fair shot.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Christina's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81141381/461503495/180180251?refcode=em24_240317_mmty_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240317_mmty_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=0e1aa7f0-78e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFhYTdmMC03OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xhOzXlJ4dXkMbvCg-ZTpLyqvRtTRdRcALb2stwkU18M=) | [DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81141382/461503497/180180251?refcode=em24_240317_mmty_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240317_mmty_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=0e1aa7f0-78e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTFhYTdmMC03OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xhOzXlJ4dXkMbvCg-ZTpLyqvRtTRdRcALb2stwkU18M=)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Limited-edition St. Patrick’s Day button
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
Happy St. Patrick’s Day, Peter.
Last week, I celebrated early by marching on Parade Day in Scranton.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
As a Scranton native, I may be partial, but I believe it’s one of the best parades in the Nation. I got to see Pennsylvanians come together from all walks of life to celebrate their community and St. Patrick’s Day – and at the end, I enjoyed a post-parade beer.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
[**In honor of today being St. Patrick’s Day, my team is releasing a limited edition St. Patrick’s Day button. For today only, if you donate $5 or more, we’ll send you your very own.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
[**We’re going to need a lot more than luck to win this election, which is where you come in Peter. Pitch in $5 or more today to help defend this critical battleground seat and get your very own St. Patrick’s Day button.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)
**[Get Your Button ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&refcode2=2358_552475_3zdxs6&akid=2358%2E552475%2E3zdxs6)**
Top o’ the morning to ya.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

I know you already get so many emails from me and my team, so I will keep this short. I just wanted to reach out and wish everyone a happy St. Patrick’s Day. Unlike many other cultural holidays, St. Patty’s is one of those fun ones where it really doesn’t matter if you’re Irish or not. It’s just a great time to dress up in green and go have a party with friends. So whatever you’re doing to day – whether you’re going to a party, to a bar crawl, or just staying in and enjoying the day – I hope you stay healthy and safe. And if you see any rainbows, don’t chase them. It seems unlikely that there would actually be gold at the end of it. name: Giffords.org
subject: It’s not about luck ☘️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When it comes to our movement for gun safety, the progress we’ve made has nothing to do with luck.
#

Today is St. Patrick’s Day, and for many of us, luck is on the brain.
But friends, when it comes to our movement for gun safety, the progress we’ve made has nothing to do with luck. It’s only because of all of the hard work we’ve put in together over the past eleven years since GIFFORDS’ founding.
It’s not luck that since 2013, we’ve helped pass over 620 gun safety laws in states nationwide.
It’s not luck that right now, the NRA is the weakest it has ever been, and that its disgraced former CEO Wayne LaPierre was found liable for corruption last month.
It’s not luck that in 2022, President Biden was able to sign the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law—the most significant gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years.
These are victories that have come from years and years of researching and campaigning to cut through the partisan divide and make gun safety a WINNING issue. And we couldn’t do this work without the support of people like you.
But at the same time, it’s not bad luck that America leads the world in gun violence. For too long, a minority of lawmakers beholden to the gun lobby have blocked commonsense reforms. We’re turning the tide, but our fight is far from over.
Every day in our nation, people are still dying from gun violence. We know the solutions to save lives—like enacting universal background checks—but we need to keep up our fight to get our elected officials to take action.
[**So please, we don’t need luck today. We need you. Will you make a contribution of $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help us continue to build upon the progress we’ve made towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240317-1-30&t=1&akid=7775%2E3935704%2EE7OcFv)

| With just **38 bills** passed so far, the 118th Congress is on track to be the _least productive_ Congress in decades!

Hard-working Americans across the country are struggling with _increasing costs of housing and everyday goods, a lack of funding and resources for our public schools, and access to quality public services._

For too long, hyperpartisanship and political extremism have brought Congress to a screeching halt, and it’s time for a new generation of leaders who will work together to move our great country forward.

But to do that, Johnny O needs your help to keep this seat blue so that we can take back the House in November and get Congress back to work!

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

I am so grateful for our police officers.

As an American who believes in law and order,
truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants
who protect our communities.

Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women
by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave
officers know that we are grateful for their service and
sacrifice.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began
propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to
"defund the police."

I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom
denominator of our society and that the black community must
fight and scream and demand support for the people in our
community who are up to no good.

That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an
organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as
well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational
programs and acts of community service.

Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have
supported local officers, while so many others have turned their
backs on those who serve our communities.

To join these chapters and stand with police
officers, please sign the national petition today.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving
back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history
about the city's police force.

The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina -
paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director
showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token
of BLEXIT's appreciation.

If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must
support local heroes - please sign the national petition right
away.

While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to
think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast
majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to
stay the same or even increase.

We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police
radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American
culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who
fight for justice every day.

We must stop the deception that is harming urban
communities and demeaning police around the nation.

If you are an American, no matter what color you
are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the
way forward.

Join me in letting our police officers know that
you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to
keep our communities safe.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Candace Owens

Chair of BLEXIT

Powered by Turning Point USA

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

today@thefederalistwire.com

But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. ~~ US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

name: Tax the Rich Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's bill to Tax the Rich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Jeff Bezos is the world's richest man again, hitting a jaw-dropping $200
billion in wealth last week as he overtook Elon Musk.

But while Bezos, Musk, and their billionaire buddies get richer by the
second, regular families are scraping by. In our country, wealth
inequality is at its worst since the 1920s.

This is not a small problem. That’s why Bernie proposed a wealth tax on
the top 0.1% of income earners. It's bold, it's necessary, and it's about
time that millionaires and billionaires pay their fair share of taxes.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16151?source=email-20240317&t=1011&akid=5524%2E5885482%2Ea0fnJz ]Add your name to back Bernie's plan to Tax the Rich. It's our moment to
demand fairness and take a stand for every struggling family out there.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16151?source=email-20240317&t=1012&akid=5524%2E5885482%2Ea0fnJz ]ADD YOUR NAME

The current system lets CEOs pay themselves huge bonuses and spend money
on stock buybacks rather than invest in their workers — all while making
worse, more expensive products for us consumers. Millionaires and
billionaires buy new yachts while most Americans struggle to pay for
groceries, healthcare, and other essentials.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16152?t=1013&akid=5524%2E5885482%2Ea0fnJz ][IMG]

Bernie’s fight to tax the rich is about making the rich pay so we can fund
Social Security, public healthcare, the fight against climate change, and
so much more. Bezos, Musk, and the rest of the ultra-wealthy can pay a lot
more in taxes to make it happen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16151?source=email-20240317&t=1014&akid=5524%2E5885482%2Ea0fnJz ]Stand with Bernie: Tax the rich now! Support Bernie’s wealth tax on the
top 0.1% richest people in America.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: "It's a brave new world."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
This has only ever been about controlling women's bodies |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81144120/461513407/-1616752737?refcode=WTEFEO53_20240317_CRJohnsonRS_ALL&sourceid=1053215&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGY3OWVjYy03ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jiVuSC5ModT0bx572D14VH7Xuhonaf-7_9mmm31rd6U=) Peter,

When Speaker of the U.S. House Mike Johnson was asked whether he believes that the destruction of frozen embryos during the in vitro fertilization (IVF) process is murder, he responded, **"It's something that we've got to grapple with. It's a brave new world."** **[You can watch the interview for yourself here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81144122/461513409/-1616752737?refcode=WTEFEO53_20240317_CRJohnsonRS_ALL&sourceid=1053215&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGY3OWVjYy03ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jiVuSC5ModT0bx572D14VH7Xuhonaf-7_9mmm31rd6U=)** The "brave new world" of assisted reproductive technology has been helping Americans start families for more than fifty years. And you would think Mike Johnson, self-proclaimed defender of family values, would support it.

But of course he doesn't. And of course he doesn't understand the science behind the procedure, or the decades of medical research that made IVF possible. Because all Mike Johnson and his Republican cronies want is to control our bodies, take away our rights, strip us of our autonomy, and send us back to the dark ages.

Last month's Alabama Supreme Court ruling — that frozen embryos created through IVF are legally children and can therefore be protected as such — is the latest and most egregious attack on reproductive freedom since the end of _Roe v. Wade_. And with each of these attacks, it becomes more and more clear: **for Republicans, this has only ever been about power over women.** **_Peter, we can't let these people stay in power._ Every day that Mike Johnson remains speaker of the House is a day that our rights are under attack. clean_body: This has only ever been about controlling women's bodies | = Peter, When Speaker of the U.S. House Mike Johnson was asked whether he believes that the destruction of frozen embryos during the in vitro fertilization (IVF) process is murder, he responded, "It's something that we've got to grapple with. It's a brave new world." = The "brave new world" of assisted reproductive technology has been helping Americans start families for more than fifty years. And you would think Mike Johnson, self-proclaimed defender of family values, would support it. But of course he doesn't. And of course he doesn't understand the science behind the procedure, or the decades of medical research that made IVF possible. Because all Mike Johnson and his Republican cronies want is to control our bodies, take away our rights, strip us of our autonomy, and send us back to the dark ages. Last month's Alabama Supreme Court ruling — that frozen embryos created through IVF are legally children and can therefore be protected as such — is the latest and most egregious attack on reproductive freedom since the end of Roe v. Wade. And with each of these attacks, it becomes more and more clear: for Republicans, this has only ever been about power over women. Peter, we can't let these people stay in power. Every day that Mike Johnson remains speaker of the House is a day that our rights are under attack. body:

**Breaking news to no one, folks: The GOP is spreading lies again!**
In her response to the State of the Union, Sen. Katie Britt chose to weaponize Karla Jacinto Romero’s experience with human trafficking to criticize President Biden’s border security efforts.
But here’s the thing: This happened from 2004 to 2008. You know, when _Republican_ president George W. Bush was in office.
Now, Sen. Britt is backtracking and claiming she wasn’t trying to correlate Romero’s story with Biden’s border policies. But what else could she have been trying to do? This is someone’s life, not a piece of propaganda. By spreading these lies, Sen. Britt further contributes to the misinformation surrounding our border.

clean_body: | Breaking news to no one, folks: The GOP is spreading lies again! In her response to the State of the Union, Sen. Katie Britt chose to weaponize Karla Jacinto Romero’s experience with human trafficking to criticize President Biden’s border security efforts. But here’s the thing: This happened from 2004 to 2008. You know, when Republican president George W. Bush was in office. Now, Sen. Britt is backtracking and claiming she wasn’t trying to correlate Romero’s story with Biden’s border policies. But what else could she have been trying to do? This is someone’s life, not a piece of propaganda. By spreading these lies, Sen. Britt further contributes to the misinformation surrounding our border. | It’s time to take a stand and demand better from our elected officials. We can’t let blatant lies go unchecked, especially when they come from people in positions of power. We depend on them to be accurate; now we’re counting on YOU to make your voice heard. | Truthfully yours, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

subject: re: representing the entire Commonwealth

body:
To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81145366/461517951/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1OWI2NGEtODNlNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eE4MB1aZiiAtUvGOrAUIE7Gl5UUkslXiUOwTTYj3e30=)
---
| As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.

However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.

Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone!

Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in our campaign today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Our March fundraising deadline is coming up, and we need to keep up the momentum to hit our goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81145367/461517952/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1OWI2NGEtODNlNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eE4MB1aZiiAtUvGOrAUIE7Gl5UUkslXiUOwTTYj3e30=)

subject: Are you still with me, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I need to know
[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b710116b9b024783aec19af259952612&_e=7sBwpsCAjErAWl6swYDwHpTRW3dXpVaTfx6Ev9G_id7FugW7Gmo2p0K9_dHEOIGsjt0ZrUoAvtOY8FEHvYrM7IpE-SBiqedV8aKhkwoI3fi83JL6bag_HsUtwVNjuX1FpBr3A1FeCL0KHQ_UK3kwUoKsc4lsxdBcjGjwrfnzy2vSnzn9-i8S19uxdkvFTF_Y6jEa0yscN907CvZj1pDA49pPqfRQ0L55GCfgHYrlEZZMLAyKsbNxqfXkCkSkiHZ7YTtnWrc4SK2I9-_ZEBCU0poFjWOWO-ajCqCv9OfcYhQugqkz2lSkTLe0fWGzjx9VP63eUOJxq86lJTofJTwcIoqoiz9DxCMPW7LKrlt7_pxsfjk9CBRYbfNMi8TIsk6TWdimkTluqvL0Hk6Eiu1mnRQTLHdnhbWr2SgTft4mABHCG3-M4GcyWwAFbIxx0t3kREnjDoGCukg-hMEtPmTxew%3D%3D)

Friend,

I've got three words for the far-Leftists trying to take my seat and flip Texas blue: **_[Bring. It. Peter, every American should be FURIOUS!

Here are just a few things Biden, Schumer, and the Democrats want to spend YOUR federal tax dollars on: **[🔲](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=132bb6610d4a461b92a49d31a43a5b58&_e=olPKNRKRJnwA1HT3mxC-oVY2jZdQKeysyT4-k3kG6ND9MlXUcX3S-Aao_6OZL2NNz_Bu4Rb79UKHQnDw_nHMwt1_myJOcmQqTY5i_OC-wvHFJ_-81WHMLxddRtpW5c-mKO1KJBx6WZLBbN3Dam0twepIWhHfWvguyKrY9JPUMt4f0YZ1zfpkh8hGiBif_hUYC0KcI4C0SYVs75N2nzriufLTvCFnV8CnoBMb7mOKtg9X4EE6rzXD-b20sHnyevYaJB6MG7SBgTwppDefOdHQG6B9H3wEikLg84D9dYSHIdVHMgjI4HO0mK1AHl1l1M3DlM41G0B8jpyUsu18gO1qRVSLa7nTDEidwx8FZW94dI9G6MCJuqqVVvpA_BVnWZvC) An environmental justice center in NYC** **[🔲](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=132bb6610d4a461b92a49d31a43a5b58&_e=olPKNRKRJnwA1HT3mxC-oVY2jZdQKeysyT4-k3kG6ND9MlXUcX3S-Aao_6OZL2NNz_Bu4Rb79UKHQnDw_nHMwt1_myJOcmQqTY5i_OC-wvHFJ_-81WHMLxddRtpW5c-mKO1KJBx6WZLBbN3Dam0twepIWhHfWvguyKrY9JPUMt4f0YZ1zfpkh8hGiBif_hUYC0KcI4C0SYVs75N2nzriuXzyO-hKX3yqSJAdffJ7cOmV5jmIKthDE8Qk3mttBrzNeeCUX7Kp94dMeZ4RbRaKVMkxXjhzzE86iFsp78EnK6heL1nqkek-mwi5HIvPgo3JzV2BZNHcb75926gKqAgAolgfQ180HSAFFGjIdIlA7pMHQxfmHztUMYoWfw9bGpTq) A Thanksgiving parade in Michigan** **[🔲](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=132bb6610d4a461b92a49d31a43a5b58&_e=olPKNRKRJnwA1HT3mxC-oVY2jZdQKeysyT4-k3kG6ND9MlXUcX3S-Aao_6OZL2NNz_Bu4Rb79UKHQnDw_nHMwt1_myJOcmQqTY5i_OC-wvHFJ_-81WHMLxddRtpW5c-mKO1KJBx6WZLBbN3Dam0twepIWhHfWvguyKrY9JPUMt4f0YZ1zfpkh8hGiBif_hUYC0KcI4C0SYVs75N2nzriuQYD73T6MXcHFGaNKx98cjLh9KSKO2z7dMpa_2x_K4-ZMExOfXRUZ5XZc1VQP3XUd4ldGSmdZ2FR4ShBCpY6zVbnBHXXYaxvceH0wGsW7Sy50S76b8bmqDKAaJC4j7g9wD2HZcW5EZsgbqEBuBai90fjJfrNY7GaK1fZ9C3gScv2) A social justice center in San Francisco** These are just a few of the reckless earmarks the Left is trying to jam through the Senate.

Earmarks are the swamp’s way of wasting YOUR money for their pet projects. Millions of dollars... and they choose pet projects over securing our border or supporting our law enforcement.

And even as our debt tops $35 TRILLION and inflation has skyrocketed 18%, the establishment won’t give up these selfish spending sprees.

If we’re ever going to fix our economy, we need to end wasteful earmarks RIGHT NOW!

Whether you're a standing member of the Béyhive, a part of Swiftie nation, identify as a Houston Hottie, or you’ve over-drafted your account just trying to make it to a show, **junk fees are hurting Americans’ wallets.** According to Navigator Research, no matter partisan leaning, the majority of Americans support the _Junk Fees Prevention Act._ This legislation was introduced by the Biden Administration and Democrats in the House and Senate to put an end to hidden overdraft fees, early termination fees, late fees, concert and sporting event service fees, resort fees, and airline charges that keep families from flying together. But besides leprechauns, for me, St. Patrick's Day is also a reminder that America is _strongest_ when we embrace what makes us different — and celebrate those differences.
Early St. Patrick's Days were a time for community — where Irish immigrants and their descendants could celebrate their heritage and be proud of their ancestry. Today, almost everyone is Irish on March 17. 😉
Each of us brings a unique perspective on what it means to be American, and that great melting pot is richer when we remember that we aren’t great despite our differences, but, rather, because of them.
So, today and every day, let's raise a pint and appreciate our neighbors.
Tuebor and sláinte,
Callie
\--
Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District

clean_body: | = Dear Peter, Happy St. Patrick's Day! Last year, my kids put some $$ in their room, had my husband set up a trail cam, and anxiously waited to see if a leprechaun would appear. Here’s what we captured: | = It was all very exciting. (They weren’t as successful in phase two of their campaign, which was actually capturing it.) It’s not lost on me that with these fundraising emails, I’m the leprechaun chasing down some “gold” to fuel this campaign! Ha! (Our EOQ deadline is only a few weeks away!) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = But besides leprechauns, for me, St. Patrick's Day is also a reminder that America is strongest when we embrace what makes us different — and celebrate those differences. Early St. Patrick's Days were a time for community — where Irish immigrants and their descendants could celebrate their heritage and be proud of their ancestry. Today, almost everyone is Irish on March 17. 😉 Each of us brings a unique perspective on what it means to be American, and that great melting pot is richer when we remember that we aren’t great despite our differences, but, rather, because of them. So, today and every day, let's raise a pint and appreciate our neighbors. Tuebor and sláinte, Callie \-- Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=47ec8b460ac54de595df7f3722688da7&_e=YytTP36kzEFlZ2QqnrpZUdnxOD2EUeY0ZnZ3-e4UevqEz7TOry4K_UfjI0OEyFobJDbxncsfurkzJMxbFRn2L3Y_orlZKglBvLkNwy8zkS1lwZDiGh-qIFQSKsrJ9pq-yb1dDJcdVaRjOSHqPxqe9kEPFo0kwtSj_ZM7zS_x-OQYgKcdDYBQbCel7E7KTQUnNq9Bl--pYoSrkh21_RauMi8JHrJox_vTNqGulsPk37vbiXHNPUE-d2zzM0fkmaw_AJwYqQNPidOz5QAU0Iy7WRgflk2siMPGtC6uN42wcDX15ApMQLNNWyKqlOMEaWGHCAPbNG6Ko3dqrQCneJhGvixptVzSeVTF94FhKtHi358xjbZJhXR_znp0Q3ntSqGWVvJDA1gT08qWq5Q_Qxp_uw%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=47ec8b460ac54de595df7f3722688da7&_e=YytTP36kzEFlZ2QqnrpZUdnxOD2EUeY0ZnZ3-e4UevqEz7TOry4K_UfjI0OEyFobJDbxncsfurkzJMxbFRn2L3Y_orlZKglBvLkNwy8zkS1lwZDiGh-qIFQSKsrJ9pq-yb1dDJcdVaRjOSHqPxqe9kEPFo0kwtSj_ZM7zS_x-OQYgKcdDYBQbCel7E7KTQUnNq9Bl--pYoSrkh21_RauMi8JHrJox_vTNqGulsPk37tPFRKpa_MUetCVutobztMlfhx9vE12jsJnzdDfcjFpEv1JRw6I3sQuk_BxRhlS4EZAH5k-LJVxqfbyXB5Ug6mAQFk6i-5-v0uRUijcC9EtiN_8dqNyEVdp2fUI1WpfNdhmrKBrbncR-vTvHL2NTwqB6wGo-LAM9kjs_jv-AMMSRw%3D%3D)**

name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: Ted Cruz is a threat to our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Friend, it's Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and I'm reaching out because Colin Allred officially just became the Democratic nominee to run against and defeat Ted Cruz, and I need you to donate $20 to help him and Serve America win. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy.
Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent.
It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – but because if Colin wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right.
Colin can win this – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win.
That starts today with you, friend. Colin needs to raise $65,000 by midnight tonight so that he can stay on track to reach enough voters and win in November. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you donate $20 right now to power Colin and Serve America to victory and defeat Ted Cruz? With your help, we can finally give Texans the leadership they deserve and protect the future of our democracy. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you,
Chuck Schumer
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

Hi there, friend, did you see me on _MSNBC_ recently?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81146262/461520983/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk922-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA5NWI4YzUtODZlNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BuS0ISXL53uJG-gq0Xyvr7fYixVkyDlgYNIKX87RyZw=)
Brand-new polling shows our campaign is now leading Rick Scott's by 4 POINTS! The same data shows that Rick Scott's approval ratings are DEEP underwater. Independent voters are turning away from him in droves. And the majority of Floridians want to elect someone new. **This is incredible news for my state and for my campaign's momentum — but we still have a long road ahead of us.**
The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. **I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box.**
There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! _And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from._
