Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

body:
Your right to reproductive health care is fundamental.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81146706/461522768/-849459103?refcode=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzI4MmQyOS04OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eM_li-PwELVsPJqB5FHCkcIQECBXEGdOPLT4n7m4AMY=&emci=9253ede2-eae2-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Folks, as a young woman, I had an abortion. It’s not a secret. It’s not shameful. And I share it because I want the millions of other women who’ve made the decision to seek abortion care to know that they’re not alone. When I was 21, I found out I was pregnant. I was married and wanted to start a family, but a devastating medical diagnosis changed all my plans. My doctors told me I had an aortic aneurysm at risk of rupture. To treat it, I first needed to have an abortion. **That abortion saved my life.** My right to make the decision that was best for me, my health, and my future was protected by _Roe v. Wade_. Women in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states are now denied _any_ choice in their reproductive futures. It’s abhorrent. Let me be clear, the right to make our own reproductive health care decisions is fundamental. Women _cannot_ be equal if we don’t have control over our own bodies. When I get to Washington, I won’t hesitate to use every power available to demand a restoration of our reproductive freedoms at the federal level. We have to secure our rights and prevent radicals like Marsha Blackburn from enacting a national ban. **_[I’m asking you to make a small grassroots donation — just $3 or $5 — to help me fight for reproductive rights as Tennessee’s next Senator. Can I count on your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81146707/461522769/209297649?amount=3&refcode=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzI4MmQyOS04OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eM_li-PwELVsPJqB5FHCkcIQECBXEGdOPLT4n7m4AMY=)_** | [**DONATE $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81146708/461522770/209297649?amount=3&refcode=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.8c282d29-88e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzI4MmQyOS04OGU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eM_li-PwELVsPJqB5FHCkcIQECBXEGdOPLT4n7m4AMY=)

clean_body: Your right to reproductive health care is fundamental. | Folks, as a young woman, I had an abortion. It’s not a secret. It’s not shameful. And I share it because I want the millions of other women who’ve made the decision to seek abortion care to know that they’re not alone. When I was 21, I found out I was pregnant. I was married and wanted to start a family, but a devastating medical diagnosis changed all my plans. My doctors told me I had an aortic aneurysm at risk of rupture. To treat it, I first needed to have an abortion. That abortion saved my life. My right to make the decision that was best for me, my health, and my future was protected by Roe v. Wade. Women in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states are now denied any choice in their reproductive futures. It’s abhorrent. Let me be clear, the right to make our own reproductive health care decisions is fundamental. Women cannot be equal if we don’t have control over our own bodies. When I get to Washington, I won’t hesitate to use every power available to demand a restoration of our reproductive freedoms at the federal level. We have to secure our rights and prevent radicals like Marsha Blackburn from enacting a national ban. = | = = = With you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

| Peter,

Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but my public FEC fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of the month, and Republicans are already planning attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day.

My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority.

body:
Donald J. Trump
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cf668ba6e1be49b7ac34c8936aec93c9&_e=Thu10dtxsqPnzFiXXZ6RjbZ8zQfzMMk_vb6PGfibAUI3DxsnBil0TtUrTBUtfqiSnV3AFtzPBQBfFbz5Ta6IOc6HvwTzbzSfiZw2qLk3r58mXbIScD0-f7GSvYu7C_MGE2CMCU6hW1dYyr07Lt5U6lxIcX1bMEhATxle5C3Gq-n9MUoSSWPYDT_edCqV2OPvYrO6vHyzyObso7Mlm5ocj02lTGUFoYkiabeYdYPPLNp8ZRanum4X9ee6HMxWbFBJcRg9-KjsN6OFxJnQWYW4_n24uy0ErFGMcRZzqRaNlUjcCSccQsebCKSrL2rzdKTg2ryb4MAIYA1fT0h1W1-txAooxfrVxf4jwQ16HXXw0HAT_Im5zhvgLui5ToFbD51bGv6AxYDEmXLvDRdKYQ8XjuW1T3i76l0baybr4OSU-9huRL9YcImyelRZE84wLdf3)

Dear Friends and Fellow Patriots,

Please join me in congratulating our official candidate for the Republican party, Donald J. Trump, for officially meeting the delegate requirement!

We all know what’s at stake in this election, there has never been as consequential a presidential election in our lifetime. If we allow Joe Biden and the Democrats to maintain control of our country, the United States will cease to exist in the same way.

**[Join me in Congratulating President Trump now by showing your support and donating to help us win in November.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cf668ba6e1be49b7ac34c8936aec93c9&_e=Thu10dtxsqPnzFiXXZ6RjbZ8zQfzMMk_vb6PGfibAUI3DxsnBil0TtUrTBUtfqiSnV3AFtzPBQBfFbz5Ta6IOc6HvwTzbzSfiZw2qLk3r58mXbIScD0-f7GSvYu7C_MGE2CMCU6hW1dYyr07Lt5U6lxIcX1bMEhATxle5C3Gq-n9MUoSSWPYDT_edCqV2OPvYrO6vHyzyObso7Mlm5ocj02lTGUFoYkiabeYdYPPLNp8ZRanum4X9ee6HMxWbFBJcRg9-KjsN6OFxJnQWYW4_n24uy0ErFGMcRZzqRaNlUj5rvWquiDVP8FQEIgxAp6woROWplAvPlvXeszmB1CjT-2yjRety5TGm2XWSj_SQwTUIkrEtOnwGQZtqfP4_Rm6lydMnnhWOHn-J4yUBToUjtf-jewq1qrh0XfooQJrhMAVim81dZsQepgjhDlKnVW3)**

It has been my great honor to be elected as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee, and I vow to do everything in my power over the next eight months to ensure victory on November 5th!

There are three things we must do to win on election day: turn out the vote, protect the vote, and raise massive amounts of money so that we can compete with, and surpass the Democrats in every possible way.

**[Today, I am asking for you to give any amount you see fit in order to help our great movement and our official candidate, Donald J. Trump, achieve an incredible victory this November.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cf668ba6e1be49b7ac34c8936aec93c9&_e=Thu10dtxsqPnzFiXXZ6RjbZ8zQfzMMk_vb6PGfibAUI3DxsnBil0TtUrTBUtfqiSnV3AFtzPBQBfFbz5Ta6IOc6HvwTzbzSfiZw2qLk3r58mXbIScD0-f7GSvYu7C_MGE2CMCU6hW1dYyr07Lt5U6lxIcX1bMEhATxle5C3Gq-n9MUoSSWPYDT_edCqV2OPvYrO6vHyzyObso7Mlm5ocj02lTGUFoYkiabeYdYPPLNp8ZRanum4X9ee6HMxWbFBJcRg9-KjsN6OFxJnQWYW4_n24uy0ErFGMcRZzqRaNlUjwuWK7Zc7pEZr66mDgVB0CF5HgPGWVucDr4KUgPlp02lmXOC3klqJ0_M7jgP5tM-kCr2w4fyzu37JGI61L_JbEZXH91EUZvS3hz81J1lJa-o1EncdWT8uVEUWQ9kZpp1wDktWf0OmZ-ZobGd-PgvfZ) **

name: Josh Hawley
subject: America deserves better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Did you see Biden's State of the Union?| | | Peter,

I’m still thinking about Joe Biden’s State of the Union Address.

_Seriously, what WAS that?_

Joe Biden can barely stay awake. He can’t string a sentence together.

This man shouldn’t have the nuclear codes. This man shouldn’t be leading our country any longer. He has failed!

**President Trump is the only man who can save our country, and that’s why I’m proud to stand with him to TAKE BACK our MAGA Majority.**

body:
General Flynn Is Coming To Sheridan.Church America's General, Michael Flynn, will be coming to Sheridan.ChurchTulsa for the presumer of the NEW Flynn
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2754.1.043c86b6b3bf527879c04acca0fba2aa) |

## General Flynn Is Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2755.1.733a31fe0453e60f4719328b443a407c), will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2756.1.7809bea241d01d150f67c62149cb2a48)Tulsa for the presumer of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2757.1.5a8a7978514c9938217bb9fafa269703)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2758.1.7f21be7df9752fd27e25f9954d416442) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2759.1.0911daec3afc3e2272b1a7a7cd9b6ac8) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2760.1.d793c28fe31acf42a9716c385da20607) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2761.1.9278ed0a68d11c654f7ff48e099fd07b) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2762.1.87abc462bb2b42d06e4b4cc268b32b6d) **Other Upcoming Services/Events At Sheridan.Church:** **-Friday, March 29 @7pm | Tulsa:** Good Friday Service **-Sunday, March 31 @10am | Tulsa:** Resurrection Celebration **-Sunday, March 31 @6pm | OKC:** Resurrection Celebration **-Thursday, April 11 @6:30pm | Tulsa:** Mayor Rudy Giuliani | RSVP here: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2763.1.526fc2123fbe5eb3965dd3f1b2c22cbf) **Darryl Strawberry** , **Perry Stone** , **Bishop Darrell Hines** & **Dr. Randy Caldwell** are coming back to [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2764.1.949b971d851234d51cef556ba2154f72) in September for **IGNITE 2024**! View schedule here: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2765.1.205285592eeb3d2b038915938b5c0e32) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

## Rudy Giuliani Is Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2767.1.c797ec523a4c355354ff29f2b6193128)
---
Recently, **Roger Stone** joined me in Tulsa, OK for a special event in which he discussed the facts behind **the assassination of JFK** and took LIVE questions from the audience.
_That event was a HIT!_
I want to invite you to join me for another special _ONE NIGHT_ event with **America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani!**
Come here stories of how **Mayor Giuliani** _took down the Mafia_ , _cleaned up the streets of NYC_ , _handled 9/11 as Mayor_ and _served with President Trump_.
There will be a LIVE Q&A as well plus a VIP Meet & Greet.
**Date** : Thursday, April 11
**Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2768.1.dead599e5a05482f28655310adf875e2) 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
**MUST RSVP** to attend: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2769.1.13e16a9c9e39c75b833e5460030293c2)
| | [ April 11 w/Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2770.1.be300b831858a401c9eb35f075992479)

## Message From Rabbi Jonathan Cahn At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2771.1.bdcd0fca7351c2a3a44e63ee5b496a88)

## Jonathan Cahn Reveals Ancient Mystery About America's Future
---
Last week at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2772.1.1db45cc2fa2c268a6ae20318ada5c5fc), **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** revealed an _ancient mystery_ in the Bible about America's future. This is a **MUST** watch for every believer in America for the year 2024. Watch the message here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/UlLv66-b2ZY?si=2DiAB41YUCGUgB1i](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2773.1.51a0d8159ec86ce7dc4526e2ecceba18) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2774.1.4d498dd83d3ed502f2d0c524903e7e41), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2775.1.1ac4de997cc317f5d53a8d3b05dd471e), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2776.1.0be63fb8f9372681fb22532b8d520a05), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2777.1.14eef4b74efc3514b9cd9a51e884c993), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2778.1.cee5a4a6a4d31e46381ee5092e19cef7), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2779.1.09812aa3a6d882108137e2e4c20c8eb0)). ## The Second Coming Of Christ
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2782.1.7e28e4ca2c1736236b75e588faaf7821)
---
The **Second Coming of Jesus** is getting closer every day.
Did you know there is a crown in heaven for believers that are eagerly awaiting the **Second Coming**?
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2783.1.ba34d50699aaa40c1627472750bd0380), I preached a sermon from **Revelation 19** about the **Second Coming of Jesus**.
It will bless you!
Watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/u_NAkggodmU?si=mdcTWlMHWDflY_2a](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2784.1.fdfab6fd58fc20b7ba0d6f834b263818)
| | [ WATCH: The Second Coming ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2785.1.4748387f6d63db4bda1ad7d67ae2eaf4)

## The Gospel Of Matthew Pt. 1
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2786.1.0ec70a608e6153fc461092f4a8a2a348)
---
At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2787.1.30bc8fa5de2503f3f7c9ffc5e4ac03be) for our mid-week services, we just launched a brand new **verse-by-verse** study over the **Gospel of Matthew**.
In part 1, we look at the **messed up family line of Jesus**.
Not only will it shock you but it will encourage you!
Watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/s5RL8bafJbs?si=7hf91LhFn_peaihF](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7396348.2788.1.b134489534884c93718f7e172e8d5ece)

| | I’m sure you already know this, but it is going to be a tough fight to keep New Jersey blue.

From extremist Mary Jo Guinchard entering the race to Trump claiming he’d make “heavy play” in New Jersey this year, **it’s clear that we need to be prepared for floods of NRCC money and attack ads to come our way any day now.** I have zero doubt that this November is going to be our biggest challenge yet.

[We need to show these right-wing extremists that we are ready to fight for our Jersey Values, no matter what they may throw at us. name: John Carney
subject: The Luck of the Irish
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/vFV54C2aVEK9WVGszQGa1A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vFV54C2aVEK9WVGszQGa1A2]

Dear Friend,

As we paint the town green and celebrate the spirit of St. Patrick's Day, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and share why I love this holiday.

First and foremost, it gives everyone a chance to be surrounded by loved ones, enjoying the festivities, and reflecting on one part of the rich culture and heritage that make the city of Wilmington so special .

I’m reaching out to you today to ask for your support as I strongly consider running for Mayor. As Mayor, I would be committed to representing the interests of all residents, regardless of background or affiliation. But to do that, I need your help.

Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a meaningful difference in our campaign.

Sign up to join Team Carney! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vFV54C2aVEK9WVGszQGa1A2]

Make a contribution! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2]

So as you raise a glass today, I hope you'll also consider supporting our campaign with a contribution. Together, we can turn the luck of the Irish into a winning strategy for our city's future.

Thank you for your consideration, and happy St. Patrick's Day to you and your family!

Sincerely,

John

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Bocc_U1b_0qglk2TKfy3-Q2?unsubscribedata=tgdqkmAi%2B81h26zFEjfQIGvkqrOybnzcMXioXLf%2F%2FMmmc9eVpQPKgfAWhcnH7wt79XNPP1s7FPhj%2Bxf6Nki2%2F6mr0be5QG67wS%2FvFlo%2FogSKdM9gjCJXfkBW%2BhmvcC9CBJ%2FV3oS4Zut7zlGLdw0UBgYJ%2F5mxo7qoXP0x2uanfxplHNi1Fxs%2FG2P66mMN2aj8dDsdc1C1mpjIpOz16Yuuo8s3n8uVPpkGov4XTbJuI17cUsZ6b9m3MgkYE94bc9xwIY2J7pdJRNg0ukNa1K0ftwM%2FnVedEc8Vn5dTEttMLGCXSKCnrOawty6pA3aoB08noEzQVoKheC1lO8TsSXtUsRvem41V%2BKyrq2hmj%2Bo9h9IYlNpaVNAxKKIpwlVPevDiqnAdVmW0Py5XAgZ5spVyJYbvw8cFVzpD6TM3mxvlHeY%3D .

subject: Introducing our newest slate of endorsements 🥁
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We didn’t want you to miss this big news, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240317-1&t=1&akid=470%2E587540%2EWR7TcX)
Peter,
Last year, we made big waves when we elected Nadarius Clark to the Virginia Assembly. But that was just the start of a momentum that we’re planning to build on this year.
[**We just announced our slate of 2024 endorsements — can you pitch in $5 now to elect the leaders we deserve across the country this November?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&amount=5&refcode2=470_587540_WR7TcX&akid=470%2E587540%2EWR7TcX)
That’s why we’re doing everything in our power to elect **Sarah McBride** for the U.S. House in Delaware, **Christine Cockley** for the Ohio House, **Bryce Berry** for the Georgia House, **Ashwin Ramaswami** for the Georgia Senate, **Anna Thomas** for the Pennsylvania House, and **Anja Wookey-Huffman** for the Montana House.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&amount=5&refcode2=470_587540_WR7TcX&akid=470%2E587540%2EWR7TcX)
Supporting these candidates between now and November will take a lot of resources, which means it’s crucial that we meet all of our fundraising goals—starting with the **$24,000 goal** we’re hoping to reach by midnight.
[**Can you help us reach this crucial goal by pitching in $5 right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240317-1?refcode=em20240317-1&amount=5&refcode2=470_587540_WR7TcX&akid=470%2E587540%2EWR7TcX)

Thank you,
— Leaders We Deserve

Listen up y’all — Carville here.

I’m popping up in your inbox on behalf of my friends at DASS because, frankly, **I’m scared as all hell about the future of our democracy.** Listen, I’ve seen A LOT over my years in politics, but NOTHING compares to how CRAZY the GOP has become. Donald Trump, the moron who incited an insurrection against our Capitol on Jan. 6, is the FRONTRUNNER to be President - AGAIN! And he has the support of nearly the entire Republican Party! Election-denying Republicans at EVERY level of government are wholeheartedly embracing the Big Lie and conspiracy theories about our elections. **These folks don’t care about democracy, folks. They care about THEIR preferred candidate winning, even if they didn’t get the votes. That’s just NUTS.**

Luckily, my friends here at DASS are working to elect Democratic Secretaries of State, the folks who are in charge of running our elections, and will stop these extremists trying to undermine our democracy.

[We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines, friend. body:
don’t let this happen ever again...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64431?t=6&akid=13502%2E878179%2EdrcCvn) | [**WE NEED 500 DEMOCRATS TO COMMIT TO SUPPORTING DEMOCRATIC HEROES LIKE SHERROD BROWN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64431?t=7&akid=13502%2E878179%2EdrcCvn)
---
**WE TOLD YOU:** a new poll shows Sherrod Brown within the margin of error of losing his seat to any of his three potential Republican challengers.

**WE TOLD YOU:** Brown’s seat is expected to be one of the closest, most important races in 2024!

**WE TOLD YOU:** We missed our end-of-month ‘Battleground Senate Fund” by almost $1,500.

name: Team Pramila
subject: This country CAN exist for and serve everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila and her fellow Democrats are working towards a bright future and rejecting attempts to bring us back in time.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240317-3634-footer&t=1&akid=3634%2E420207%2E2RD5Cm)
Peter,
In his State of the Union address, President Biden laid out a roadmap for the country that was built on hope and an understanding that **this country _CAN_ exist for and serve everyone.**
In the last three years, Democrats have delivered lasting results and made advances towards a society that takes every member into consideration — especially given the obstacles that the GOP has thrown our way.
**Pramila and her fellow Democrats are working towards a bright future and rejecting attempts to bring us back in time.[Can you show your support for this bright future by making a $3 contribution to Pramila’s reelection campaign?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240317.55N_Rd&refcode=em20240317-3634&t=2&akid=3634%2E420207%2E2RD5Cm)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240317.55N_Rd&refcode=em20240317-3634&t=21&akid=3634%2E420207%2E2RD5Cm)**
Pramila has been proud to vote for bills spearheaded by the White House like the INVEST in America Act – which has brought over $2 billion in new investments to the state of Washington1.
While Democrats have been hard at work enacting policies that lift up every American, the GOP has been busy restricting our freedoms and cutting blank checks to the top 1%.
**If Democrats are going to continue to deliver for the American people, we must expand our representation in Congress.[Will you contribute $3 to help protect Pramila’s seat and ensure that we get one step closer to taking back the House in November?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240317.55N_Rd&refcode=em20240317-3634&t=22&akid=3634%2E420207%2E2RD5Cm)**

Together,
Team Pramila

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team called and informed me we missed our recent fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks this year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. body:
I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet, and I can’t do it without your help.

| Peter, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—**but it’s more personal for me.**

Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them.

I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet, and I can’t do it without your help.

[_**I hate asking for your hard-earned money, but if you can throw a couple of bucks toward my reelection campaign, I’d really appreciate it. Your donation will be split between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us win this race.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81149757/461533137/665036969?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0NzRmZGRlLTkyZTQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AfZUluHEoBoxDplwnHA7yN7cfmwWbK2hToGNYWpRspg=)

Over $120 million has already been spent or reserved in Montana’s Senate race, and it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me.

Montana and rural America deserve better. I’ll do anything in my power to keep delivering on the issues that matter most, but without your help, Mitch McConnell will buy this seat right from under us. So, I’m reaching out to my top supporters to ask:

_**[Will you stand with us by making a split contribution of any amount today? We’re up against mountains of outside spending, so when I say any amount helps, I mean it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81149759/461533139/665036969?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0NzRmZGRlLTkyZTQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AfZUluHEoBoxDplwnHA7yN7cfmwWbK2hToGNYWpRspg=)**_

I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet, and I can’t do it without your help. = | = Over $120 million has already been spent or reserved in Montana’s Senate race, and it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me. Montana and rural America deserve better. I’ll do anything in my power to keep delivering on the issues that matter most, but without your help, Mitch McConnell will buy this seat right from under us. So, I’m reaching out to my top supporters to ask: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = Always grateful for your support, Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. [Originally published in the Idaho Press Tribune on 3/17/24](https://substack.com/redirect/cf1bca91-0ed2-4b91-b7d0-c7e2924cf8d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Calvin Coolidge nailed it when he said:
Thanks for reading Brian Lenney (Nampa's Senator)! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..y-pwVKwesFpGpewsup801fA9T-NoC3gzwx4kTerp1_k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=142697406)
_**" It is much more important to kill bad bills than to pass good ones." **_
As Nampa's Senator, I've lived by these words, taking pride in shooting down lousy legislation rather than pushing through the so-called good ones.
In my tenure, I've seen my fair share of legislative drama.
Sure, I've led the charge on a series of "good bills" that have made waves and garnered praise--like my initiative to protect families from CPS investigations over vaccine decisions (S1029), my effort to eliminate DEI in higher education (S1357), and the bill to guarantee Idahoans will never be subjected to mask mandates again (H493). But let's be honest, showcasing the successes is a breeze when you have the luxury of selecting from the myriad of bills we evaluate every session.
But here's what you don't hear much about: the disastrous bills we kill before they get out of the Statehouse and wreak havoc on our state. And while some find their glory in "how many bills they pass," I beg to differ. Because simply "passing a bill" isn't a feat if it's a train wreck in disguise. Just in the past few years, I've watched legislators boast about snagging billions in ARPA funds, gloating over saddling our grandkids with federal debt, and expanding Medicaid to its breaking point (which is crumbling as we speak).
My point?
Stopping bad bills is crucial--it's the antidote to the bureaucratic beast's growth, the key to curbing reckless spending, and the only way to keep government truly limited.
This year's legislative session serves as a prime example. Just recently, we axed a bill (S1289) that would have made it prohibitively difficult and expensive for parents to remove obscene materials from libraries. We also torpedoed S1245, which was set to give multinational corporations such as Bayer legal immunity, protecting them from the fallout of any harm caused by their products in product liability lawsuits. Lastly, we derailed H393, an interstate compact bill that threatened to let states like California and Washington make rules that would act as statutory law here in Idaho.
These instances highlight just a few of the detrimental bills we've successfully neutralized in the Senate this year. But while it's satisfying to halt these train wrecks, regretfully, we can't erase the mess from past blunders.
Consider Medicaid expansion--Idaho's leap to broaden eligibility cost us dearly, ballooning from $1.6 billion to $3.1 billion in just five years, fuelling the unreal deficit increase. Or take SB 1393 from 2020, the failed "Idaho Health Data Exchange," which blew $93 million before going bankrupt and compromising our private medical data. And don't get me started on the "Syringe and Needle Exchange Act" (H180), a misguided attempt to turn Idaho into a needle swap haven, much like San Francisco. Thankfully, we're on track to repeal it with HB 617 this year, but the damage is already done.
As Coolidge wisely observed, some doors are better left closed from the get-go.
Thanks for reading Brian Lenney (Nampa's Senator)! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I really hate sending emails like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
This is one of the most meaningful things you can do to help Save America! | [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=c2dbe1efe65f4b60a7f30f02a493a801&_e=pvpK8aorX_wA_wuTTbaxr2FPWm3bMmJumY5rTgydjJ_xJ1aH139OK-T-XGIUpmWGOdqs9y3NYZ1_x4shpVwZNiRfie_x7mSjqEmY9vhmrn38-2MLhh2oYFkWEGYs9FFKCZEJN-MQkuTsG4TQRwc9NqOE5b0nzF6PhRsePw7aUc4jcx6XucgZOaD1jfLBmHnl1C6wVIMepGmUIKQekqcJ7tdAId4W6weJBCrYqvbr7KA65Cr4DtmDKkzUOGjGGU8cvRK2mtm_zTMc-qwDZ0kjPy4R7GD7VMICC_RGv3Spgl21i_9cWL8EPFXTPFOVtBRjNo2cvEFjj9bECepyrkGKyWdlPGDJ3j_bGpuX34XM_gspJzEJdzNiYytjPR35ECiO8deCACGdRGbuzt2Ul0uSwAicF2PfXDWGf6Al5Dfwv1c%3D)
---

Fellow American,

This is Speaker Mike Johnson - I really hate sending emails like this, but the future of our country is on the line. I need you to read this longer message through.

As you’re reading this, Joe Biden and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee are launching a HUGE fundraising mission to destroy one of my most vulnerable Republican candidates and take back the House majority.

_**At the very top of the list is an up-and-coming rockstar and GOP candidate, Rob Bresnahan Jr., who’s running in one of the MOST important House races in the country.**_

In 2020 and 2022, we came SUPER close to flipping Pennsylvania-08 red. Now that they see how strong of a candidate Rob is, the Left is spending millions trying to shut the lights off his campaign.

If the Democrats beat us in this MUST-WIN race in Pennsylvania, we might not be able to protect and GROW our House majority.

**[That’s why I’m asking for you to step up!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=c2dbe1efe65f4b60a7f30f02a493a801&_e=pvpK8aorX_wA_wuTTbaxr2FPWm3bMmJumY5rTgydjJ_xJ1aH139OK-T-XGIUpmWGOdqs9y3NYZ1_x4shpVwZNiRfie_x7mSjqEmY9vhmrn38-2MLhh2oYFkWEGYs9FFKCZEJN-MQkuTsG4TQRwc9NqOE5b0nzF6PhRsePw7aUc4jcx6XucgZOaD1jfLBmHnl1C6wVIMepGmUIKQekqcJ7tdAId4W6weJBCrYqvbr7KA65Cr4DtmDKkzUOGjGGU8cvRK2mtm_zTMc-qwDZ0kjP2cifiYsYKLebHfC745b2gumZ5VPZF0v8cteNJFCDu3cgBjezuESNSjw8EaM3564s8EEwBCIkxKyTCjaLc445S-5R3nrH_r-1PkszobcmmsFelkXMIWXfaV9KTVE9AKtUujkIfJ7gKJ25FdEDAQgC_4%3D)**

If we don’t get the support that he needs, BIDEN WINS! I’m humbly asking you to help before midnight tonight!

| [ **ACT BEFORE MIDNIGHT** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=c2dbe1efe65f4b60a7f30f02a493a801&_e=pvpK8aorX_wA_wuTTbaxr2FPWm3bMmJumY5rTgydjJ_xJ1aH139OK-T-XGIUpmWGOdqs9y3NYZ1_x4shpVwZNiRfie_x7mSjqEmY9vhmrn38-2MLhh2oYFkWEGYs9FFKCZEJN-MQkuTsG4TQRwc9NqOE5b0nzF6PhRsePw7aUc4jcx6XucgZOaD1jfLBmHnl1C6wVIMepGmUIKQekqcJ7tdAId4W6weJBCrYqvbr7KA65Cr4DtmDKkzUOGjGGU8cvRK2mtm_zTMc-qwDZ0kjPxTr7rwtHaSsE4lp7ocZF_V1yhDPiJlYemEwq1T_QIqQVWXE431YcmaJDXi1GTWW4fxb4aiFQQYY-XN78DPTZA2vZqJ80gU8AyRxK1yHP_saXR2y9wAIuVn2L49pFwxsp1WprT5W8LcrSPgJ1ukAGyQ%3D)
---

At the very top of the list is an up-and-coming rockstar and GOP candidate, Rob Bresnahan Jr., who’s running in one of the MOST important House races in the country. In 2020 and 2022, we came SUPER close to flipping Pennsylvania-08 red. Now that they see how strong of a candidate Rob is, the Left is spending millions trying to shut the lights off his campaign. subject: the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
we cannot sit on the sidelines
| | |
---
**_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. ** But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**
**Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?**

clean_body: we cannot sit on the sidelines | | | BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation. Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — that's 1 in every 5 Americans! Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us: Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:

# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2243%2E35263%2ECusMNG)
Peter, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—**but it’s more personal for me.** Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them. I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet and I can’t do it without your help. **[I hate asking for your hard-earned money, but if you can throw a couple bucks toward my reelection campaign, I’d really appreciate it. Your donation will be split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help us win this race.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2243%2E35263%2ECusMNG)** | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2243%2E35263%2ECusMNG)
---
Over $120 million has already been spent or reserved in Montana’s Senate race and it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me.
Montana and rural America deserve better. I’ll do anything in my power to keep delivering on the issues that matter most, but without your help, Mitch McConnell will buy this seat right from under us. So, I’m reaching out to my top supporters to ask:
**[Will you stand with us by making a split contribution of any amount today? We’re up against mountains of outside spending, so when I say any amount helps, I mean it.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2243%2E35263%2ECusMNG)**

BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 | mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20Bolick?=
subject: Week 10: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=52be5372eb&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

On Monday, we held a [joint press conference](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=56f261195f&e=a7ab36849c) with the House pertaining to the Border and the governor’s first veto of [SB 1231](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=63830ab81d&e=a7ab36849c). At the press conference, I highlighted two pieces of legislation I am spearheading and moving through the legislative process. One, [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d13343532b&e=a7ab36849c) is a concurrent resolution to send to the voters in November 2024 relating to sentencing that would put buyers and sellers of children who had been trafficked in prison for natural life. Two, [SCR 1042](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6d4e74eac3&e=a7ab36849c) is a concurrent resolution supporting the people and government of the State of Texas in its efforts to secure our Nation’s southern border. Also, we had a very packed agenda for the Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce after the Senate voted out my [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2d544ca4e2&e=a7ab36849c). In preparation of the passage of [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dcdc9816f2&e=a7ab36849c), I wrote several floor speeches for my fellow Republicans to give on the Senate floor while explaining their votes. The House recycled some of the same speeches I wrote for their members, too. It is worth noting SCR 1021 will receive a vote on Monday, March 18th in the House. From there, it will be sent to the voters this coming November.

On Tuesday afternoon, two more bills I sponsored cleared another hurdle in the respective House committees. [SB 1366](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=036702a03a&e=a7ab36849c) passed out of the House Committee on Commerce and [SB 1369](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b153c3649b&e=a7ab36849c) passed out of the House Committee on Education.

On Wednesday was [“Judges Day”](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7924a8ebec&e=a7ab36849c) at the Capitol. This is an annual tradition and always a fun bonding experience with another branch of government. The [Honorable Jennifer Perkins](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6857e7362b&e=a7ab36849c) was my shadow. In the morning, I had two bills being heard in the House. The first one was [SB 1630](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d355f3339f&e=a7ab36849c) in the House Committee on Judiciary, and the second bill was [SB 1367](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6e60698047&e=a7ab36849c) in the House Committee on Government. Later in the day, I headed to Senate Committee on Education.

Over in the House, [SB 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f326b2c68b&e=a7ab36849c) passed out of the House with bipartisan support, and now, heads to the governor’s desk to hopefully be signed into law. SB 1436 is a bill that keeps victims of voyeurism, stalking and aggravated assault safer by receiving lifetime injunctions against their convicted defendant. These victims deserve this protection, so they aren’t forced to be revictimized every two years by their abuser or stalker to continue their orders of protection. This bill was brought to me during the interim by Gina Godbehere and Jamie Balson with [Legal Services for Crime Victims in Arizona](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8511d492f1&e=a7ab36849c).

On Thursday, I joined the House’s Family Values Caucus at a [joint press conference](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a47eb8ef6f&e=a7ab36849c) to push back against the [baseless attacks](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6d1d1f55bf&e=a7ab36849c) from the state’s activist Attorney General concerning on our state’s crisis pregnancy centers. Her reproductive unit within the AG’s office has been misinforming the public about crisis pregnancy centers and the positive work the nonprofits do to support women and families.

The Republicans in the House and Senate stand for life, including ensuring resources are readily available for new mothers. Over the weekend, I received a shout out from the Arizona Right to Life in their recent [newsletter](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c581ddd95e&e=a7ab36849c). In 2022, I had the pleasure to tour [Choices](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=38df66564f&e=a7ab36849c) in Phoenix with a few other women. Choices, like other crisis pregnancy centers, offered free and low-cost maternity resources from ultrasounds to diapers to parenting classes for new parents.

Over in the House on Thursday afternoon, [SB 1364](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f168a71c63&e=a7ab36849c) passed unanimously and heads to the governor’s desk. In the Senate, we celebrated an early St. Patrick’s Day, and it was also “Pi(e) Day” at the Capitol. We received a special visit from the [Farm Bureau’s Women’s Leadership- Maricopa County](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=685996b54c&e=a7ab36849c). Not only did we learn about how invaluable Arizona’s agriculture is to our state’s economy, but we had a chance to sample some pie. Did you know Arizona agriculture is a $23.3 billion dollar boost to our economy? Next time you eat a salad or drink milk, say a little blessing of thanks for our farmers. Their job isn’t easy especially when there is a democrat serving as our governor or a democrat in the White House who wants to regulate their industry into oblivion.

On Friday, I took some time out of my morning to revisit the Arizona Counter Terrorism Information Center ([ACTIC](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0805a3aaae&e=a7ab36849c)). It is also worth noting ACTIC is in my legislative district. The last time I had been over there was before the 2022 legislative session while I was still serving in the House. I sponsored [two bills](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8fdd2b1681&e=a7ab36849c) that session after meeting with some of their staff and discussing ransomware and cyber-attacks. The later [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0c775b6833&e=a7ab36849c) was signed into law in March 2022. They are working with many local, state, and national partners to end human trafficking. Until they do, they work with many established survivor groups to give these victims shelter, food, and access to resources necessary to start their recovery process. They are also working with law enforcement as the Final Four comes to town If you are a witness to a crime, or would like to report a tip to ACTIC, you can do so [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9cd6f16d01&e=a7ab36849c).

Most people know the main reason I accepted the call to return to public service was to defend our state’s educational freedom. Just this legislative session twenty-six bills were introduced by the Democrats to put an end to the first-in-the-nation universal Empowerment Scholarship Account (ESA) program as well as its predecessor, the scholarship tax credit program. Over 75,000 Arizona school children benefit from an ESA – true educational freedom and autonomy for families. If I lose this Senate race, we will be in the minority and the Democrats will move to get rid of your educational freedom.

_Today, we really need your help to defend this State Senate seat._ Can you [volunteer](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=89343bb9ae&e=a7ab36849c) or [donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a6a3190277&e=a7ab36849c)?

We cannot do it on our own and it is going to cost a lot of money to hold this State Senate seat. We are going to need boots on the ground and reserves in our brigade. From making phone calls, sending text messages, writing post cards, delivering yard signs, installing 4x4 signs, and hosting events, we are going to need all hands on the deck to keep the legislative majority. If you would like to help, just reply to this email, and tell us how you can best help. Thank you so much for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

P.S. I try to send out my weekly updates on Saturdays. Yesterday, my husband and I tagged along with our son and his fiancée as they previewed a few wedding venues for their January 2025 wedding. Happy St. Patrick’s Day!

---
| P.S. Please consider making a donation to our campaign to save the State Senate today.

---
| |

**ICYMI**

_Poll Observers Still Needed for the Presidential Preference Election (PPE)_

Do you want to observe a polling place on the PPE? The GOP is looking to recruit and train poll observers for its election day infrastructure for the July and November elections. If you’d like to participate in an upcoming training, here is the last opportunity to do so:

**Monday March 18 th 7:00 PM**
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZMvduirrjwpEtKt9etxuFLIKRoVXLhK5gJp](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9eec2e0546&e=a7ab36849c "https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZMvduirrjwpEtKt9etxuFLIKRoVXLhK5gJp")

If you see anything at your polling place during Tuesday’s PPE, please call the Republican reporting hotline at 602-610-1224, or submit a report at [Protect the Vote](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c5a0fe5e77&e=a7ab36849c).

For more information, please contact Richard Stoppiello, Arizona Election Integrity State Director at 347-26-6192, or via email at [rstoppiello@gop.com](mailto:rstoppiello@gop.com)

_Presidential Preference Election_

If you are a registered voter on the Active Early Voting List, it is too late to mail-in your ballot. You either need to walk it into a nearby polling location, drop it off at the Recorder’s drop box, or you need to physically go to a polling location to either request an early ballot before Tuesday, or vote on March 19th in person.

On Election Day, polling places will be open from 6am to 7pm. I voted in person over the weekend and the poll workers said traffic had been light into the polling location and that they were expecting a surge of voters on Tuesday so please plan accordingly.

If you vote in person, please be sure to find the nearest [**voting location**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=673348b6f5&e=a7ab36849c) and vote.

_It Goes Too Far Campaign_

I am sure you have seen the paid circulators near retail outlets and public libraries over the past few months collecting signatures for the abortion initiative. Sadly, when asked most of them cannot explain what is included in the language. There are countless individuals circulating the “Arizona Abortion Access Act” to place on the November 5, 2024, Arizona ballot to allow unrestricted, unregulated abortion on demand. You can read it for yourself [**HERE**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7a11520a73&e=a7ab36849c).

To counter this extreme effort, a campaign called [**“It Goes Too Far”**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c08ae165ab&e=a7ab36849c) has been established. I recently attended a brainstorming meeting on their efforts, and here are some of my takeaways:
* This constitutional amendment if passed would amend the Arizona Constitution **and** cannot be adjusted by lawmakers to address any future concerns.
* The current safeguards and protections in place right now to protect girls and women seeking an abortion from an abortion clinic would be removed.
* If passed, it would remove the required medical doctor who is trained to handle and detect any complications.
* It prohibits punishment for people who take girls to get an abortion, so if a child is sex trafficked, her trafficker could take the victim to get an abortion to cover their crime, and her parents would never be notified, and they could not be prosecuted.

In 2022, the Arizona Legislature passed a 15-week (that’s almost four months) limit bill that was signed into law. If this initiative passes, it overturns the current 15-week abortion limit, while overturning the current common-sense regulations by allowing unregulated abortion on demand up until the moment of birth for the mother’s mental health, an undefined term that has included all factors related to the woman’s well-being, including stress or anxiety.

I agree with the counter campaign, this initiative **goes too far**. The way this initiative is drafted it no longer would require a medical doctor to perform or provide the abortion. The language would allow unqualified health care professionals to perform abortions, including chiropractors, podiatrists, and massage therapists, and so on.

_Important PC Information_

Precinct Committeemen can turn their nomination papers and nomination petitions in between March 2 - April 1, 2024. The primary has been moved up to July 30th to ensure our military and overseas voters receive their absentee ballots.

name: Kari Lake
subject: I never thought I’d write this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
Crazy

| [ ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=301f3d596c024be1a58eeba7288873d2&_e=DIYTbItC3Aj63rh2gLiGRHhmwCdJ0JCWOMIYQKXfsivUJNYTHgw9qaw8FPrj4Bnt5a8A-kPTv1gpIWQLgZZ49eqU81n0lzRFCrWeV_c8EH6FT_99AYq-kwDX2GWbLZ7TWdi0yoN6A_Xbe8BA_mCL80hENLbbpgwMY-yInVye-E4tzhP0K3N0V8w0JsHkDd0gvNvJl6Ht7DWqvkRrgXf0FCHdcJZwRxW6fNn3d45sa38L5mA3AjDGgziSUjL8QMjbMSIIBC6WjsBcLHNpHTQ8cvGWSPMXi8sdJm9vKFNOmhf-XnHMZONE_vfFHlTwcUzLENTdb9uzWgdOMzoiCx_N7k9cRqfdNI-VpT_dO8U55aXHbg0RAsbaLOYNYnwq4aOT03R3wikN60Hjnd2lKKFAhXIdPI60boki0Rn2__f6wAE%3D)

Friend,

If you were to ask me just a few years ago if I ever thought I'd be sitting at my desk writing an email for my Senate campaign, I'd say you were crazy.

I never could have imagined I'd end up where I am today. God's plan can be a mystery sometimes, but I'm thankful for everyone's support and am so proud of everything we've accomplished. This fight is bigger than any one person, and our movement isn't just about saving Arizona; it's about saving this entire county.

Anyway, this email isn't about our journey. It's about fundraising. **I need your help.**

We're less than eight months away from the November election -- although I wish this weren't the way things worked -- we need $$$ if we're going to win this fight.

The Fake News will attack me for free.

The Left will spend millions to stop me.

I can't take these attacks sitting down, but I need support if I'm going to fight back. Grassroots supporters have always been the lifeblood of my campaign -- and I want to ask you one question.

[**Can you contribute $5, $10, $25, or ANYTHING to help me become the next U.S. Senator from the great state of Arizona?**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=301f3d596c024be1a58eeba7288873d2&_e=DIYTbItC3Aj63rh2gLiGRHhmwCdJ0JCWOMIYQKXfsivUJNYTHgw9qaw8FPrj4Bnt5a8A-kPTv1gpIWQLgZZ49eqU81n0lzRFCrWeV_c8EH6FT_99AYq-kwDX2GWbLZ7TWdi0yoN6A_Xbe8BA_mCL80hENLbbpgwMY-yInVye-E4tzhP0K3N0V8w0JsHkDd0gvNvJl6Ht7DWqvkRrgXf0FCHdcJZwRxW6fNn3d45sa38L5mA3AjDGgziSUjL8QMjbMSIIBC6WjsBcLHNpHTQ8cluescqNZAPzahpXWCiEJxgTreewEEko33mkdZbwnxhJn7mYbAJ1U8zqomcwiPEKwyP-TIJZdeWZvtD7weYswBE4VvvPh1tEo8uHtZl8HMsCz4Azmy1x02mFXBC-ydBcfsxTXBBUCexOqauCY7MqwNQ%3D)

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81150832/461536311/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFlNWQzNy05OWU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psYlEeb3UCjO1rgywm2VfR0xPm5CriZaMqNAtSwNf-Q=) This is serious: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81150833/461536312/23043530?refcode=email_031724_social-security&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFlNWQzNy05OWU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psYlEeb3UCjO1rgywm2VfR0xPm5CriZaMqNAtSwNf-Q=)

Congress has the power to protect the retirement benefits millions of seniors rely on every day – _**but Kristen’s GOP opponent has refused to say if he’d protect Social Security.**_

Not if Kristen has anything to say about it. Not on her watch.

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Trump could try to flee the country. He should be monitored and tracked 24/7
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Trump is a flight risk. Make him wear an ankle monitor and track him 24/7](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f38f37e-1c79-472c-bbd8-a7cebd9c1bc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T413146d0-8eec-49f0-96d6-38961c8e0f57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump is facing dozens of charges, and a long stretch in prison. It's believed the main reason he's running for president is to pardon himself if he gets elected. And if he starts falling in the polls, and sees his chances slipping away, fleeing the country may be his best option. [**Which is why he should be wearing an ankle monitor, should be tracked 24/7, and put in prison if he tries to flee.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe888854-a04c-41e2-abbf-fcc609d36111/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump has a host of despots and autocrats ready to give him asylum, most notably Putin in Russia. And a Trump overseas, and out of the range of US authorities would be far, far more dangerous than he already is. Trump is a criminal, and it's time to start treating him accordingly. And we need to take steps NOW to prevent him from fleeing justice and wreaking havoc. [**Add your name, and call for Trump to be forced to wear an ankle monitor.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39e8bdd6-3d2f-42b4-b53a-ff7191321169/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T473d3e5e-700e-4281-a4fc-665ac392b948/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Forward this to others to help spread the word, and build momentum for this action!)
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d96bc35-82a4-4518-8a20-4c4e753d0d0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te70c0168-75bc-4dd0-b44a-a4358442b9f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

And we need to take steps NOW to prevent him from fleeing justice and wreaking havoc. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Forward this to others to help spread the word, and build momentum for this action!) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

clean_body: Next month, Michigan Democrats will face two must-win special elections. Gov. Whitmer is calling on you to help get them to the finish line. Will you pitch in today? | | | | | ---|--- Ahead of two must-win special elections in Michigan next month, Gov. Gretchen Whitmer issued a powerful reminder of how high the stakes are. These upcoming elections are not just local affairs they are pivotal battles in our ongoing fight to elect state Democrats and protect the rights and freedoms of those in Michigan and beyond. Extreme Republicans are working around the clock to roll back our progress to protect public education, advance racial equity, enshrine workers’ rights, and so much more. We simply cannot, and will not, let them win. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Help make sure Gov. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: a quick note before the primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, with the primary coming up, I wanted to give you a time-sensitive update on where things stand:
**How it started:** After _CNN_ named me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, Mitch McConnell personally named me a top target for defeat.
**Meanwhile:** My millionaire GOP opponents started writing themselves massive checks to try to buy this seat, and McConnell-backed super PACs made their largest ad reservation EVER to flood the airwaves in Ohio and defeat me.
**Now:****Polls show me losing ground, with just hours to go before the first real test of our campaign.**
**What's next:** We can't afford to be outspent, especially not with voters heading to the polls tomorrow. **That's why I urgently need your help.**
[**We need to reach our $500,000 goal before polls close so we have the critical resources to compete all the way to Election Day – but right now, we're falling short. Will you please split $5 or more between my campaign and Bob Casey to help us win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-2?refcode=em20240317-2-el&refcode2=2341_552475_iVJHdD&akid=2341%2E552475%2EiVJHdD)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240317-2?refcode=em20240317-2&refcode2=2341_552475_iVJHdD&akid=2341%2E552475%2EiVJHdD)**
Thank you for being on my team, always.
Sherrod Brown

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2341%2E552475%2EiVJHdD)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2341%2E552475%2EiVJHdD)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Team Mazie
subject: Women's History Month
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81151509/461538954/1349703860?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGIxYzM4Mi05ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ty_4EfAbiu8uh0ieJGbmqCWouUOuGzw56RNjbGQu2Yw=) Aloha Peter, For most of my career, I preferred to focus on the work ahead and let it speak for itself. Unlike some of my colleagues, _especially_ on the right, I didn’t get into politics for fame or notoriety. But during Donald Trump’s presidency — when his administration implemented horrific, racist policies and the president himself engaged in bigoted tirades on a near daily basis — I knew I had to speak out, and so I did. I haven’t stopped since. I wasted no time calling Donald Trump’s cruel child separation policy **racist, cruel, and anti-immigrant.** When the ultra-conservative, ideologically-driven Supreme Court majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , I told the truth about what this really is: **An outright attack on women in this country.** And right now, as MAGA Republicans ban books featuring diverse voices and stories about minority and LGBTQ+ communities, I have been clear about what it is: **An absurd attempt to silence us and erase our humanity.** Speaking out has not come without a price. As an Asian woman, and as the only immigrant serving in the Senate, MAGA Republicans and the right-wing media sphere quickly made me a target for their attacks. They distorted my record and unleashed racist tropes in an attempt to silence me. **But I will not be silent._WE_ will not be silent.** When I began speaking out, this grassroots team stood right behind me. And together, our movement made history — flipping the White House and winning the Senate majority in 2020, and _expanding_ that majority in 2022. [**Now, we have the chance to make history again. Together, we can show MAGA Republicans that their attempts to silence us will only make us stronger. If you’re with me, pitch in $10 or any amount that’s meaningful to you today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81151510/461538955/1349703860?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGIxYzM4Mi05ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ty_4EfAbiu8uh0ieJGbmqCWouUOuGzw56RNjbGQu2Yw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81151511/461538956/1349703860?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGIxYzM4Mi05ZmU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ty_4EfAbiu8uh0ieJGbmqCWouUOuGzw56RNjbGQu2Yw=)****

body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35239%2E120265%2EaqbNyA ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

After years of hard work, we're now only 48 hours from our potentially
historic election. I recently accompanied my father, who is battling
late-stage Parkinson's, to cast his vote for me—an emotional moment that
reinforced the importance of our mission.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/6899?t=1002&akid=35239%2E120265%2EaqbNyA ]You can donate to our 100% people-funded campaign here.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/6899?t=1003&akid=35239%2E120265%2EaqbNyA ][IMG]

As Pakistani immigrants, my family has achieved the American Dream. But,
this was only possible through robust social programs that gave us a
foundation to thrive.

Now, I'm running for Congress to strengthen these programs to ensure
opportunity, justice, and equity for all Americans.

I need your support to make this vision a reality. We still need to knock
10,620 doors before Election Day on March 19. Each $1 helps us reach
another voter.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/6899?t=1004&akid=35239%2E120265%2EaqbNyA ]Can you donate $10, $100 or even $1,000 to make sure we reach every
voter in IL-11 before Tuesday?

Together, we can make history. Thank you for your unwavering support.

Sincerely,

–Qasim Rashid

I'm so excited to share with more Marylanders' why I’d be honored to represent them in Congress.

I've protected our democracy before, and I aim to do it again as a Congressman.

But honestly, these ads aren't going to fund themselves! 😂

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3c9d8cc524a4555956225cf0f31e3cd&_t=Nx1lB9PU4xmmQnX6sCZUnYT86UObLuUev2x4VChGgQYztovwNZrH80BKMI-n8RoXFQQaSQ6ajVKFcO2U3D2Sa1tF4jOzcD1TaCVkswGWvgI%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b3c9d8cc524a4555956225cf0f31e3cd&_e=7MwnQqAuDKuTXKYISYmoLLQ-WhJ4T7Tc1eGoDI73M63TmL_B39l4WzWjJV94_Cxzv80MP__kd3l2tamEx25Htb4TsexaSu-R4szJiSg2bnNEtjxb1GDeUy-s8wzBQVQ5KK47hwba0nRoCyjQIEp_P6BcnU8ZLBhx0T1t_fqcl32d7bHdWXCm8rganfIWmcZuPPPC-8DNilVfmNl0O2Y-GWg8xlLtKraRNbW-kGYtYfDr9PGno_wZiKXA_coeqCq4AkDL2vA5GyWAVWRdAIyuTWq5bdgr_371cfJr6q33cXVh076Pnr81PaJrUKyuLvGAKywge063zbAb_6FgAFG3GKmllrCxQZo5DK_PWgsFSetkd_d0aT5gTe0tYLMAWOuPQHOcOgPgPC59bB_p3No9jg%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b3c9d8cc524a4555956225cf0f31e3cd&_e=7MwnQqAuDKuTXKYISYmoLLQ-WhJ4T7Tc1eGoDI73M63TmL_B39l4WzWjJV94_Cxzv80MP__kd3l2tamEx25Htb4TsexaSu-R4szJiSg2bnNEtjxb1GDeUy-s8wzBQVQ5KK47hwba0nRoCyjQIEp_P6BcnU8ZLBhx0T1t_fqcl32d7bHdWXCm8rganfIWmcZuPPPC-8DNilVfmNl0O2Y-GWg8xlLtKraRNbW-kGYtYfDr9PGno_wZiKXA_coeqCq40krOM3h27Kvmureez7V2BpqN-VIeQdYa0sUTLX-JSXeH1neYr8mw-dAQSiv3awhxa2QqvbkBs0E3jnQO0d9m4IDtMHFiwv6Qncqv1joLcZ08Y5ZdzAvLnX_YrCa3_zprRAS4Hrr8ZbAV1Q3LnRZ-cA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3c9d8cc524a4555956225cf0f31e3cd&_t=Nx1lB9PU4xmmQnX6sCZUnYT86UObLuUev2x4VChGgQYztovwNZrH80BKMI-n8RoXFQQaSQ6ajVKFcO2U3D2SayebwXW-O2bYc-wGXdf4qFbUJ5DAF08Jxj2R-B0HYmEt1k4nkN-Qx5JM38nR-GGo6q8VqVLLWRFMjQv7k98f94A%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b3c9d8cc524a4555956225cf0f31e3cd&_t=Nx1lB9PU4xmmQnX6sCZUnYT86UObLuUev2x4VChGgQYztovwNZrH80BKMI-n8RoXFQQaSQ6ajVKFcO2U3D2Sa1tF4jOzcD1TaCVkswGWvgI%3D).
---

body:
did you see what Jamie Raskin just said?
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20998%2E4449941%2ErLhoBS)
---
**Jamie Raskin is fighting BACK against the extreme MAGA Supreme Court:** [ ]() | [10,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: STAND WITH JAMIE RASKIN AND CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR A BILL TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE BALLOT FOR INCITING AN INSURRECTION »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raskin_bill?source=FFR_20240317_EMPET_E3_T0_GM-14D-AC&t=7&akid=20998%2E4449941%2ErLhoBS)
---
**FIRST:** States across the country kicked Trump off the ballot for inciting an insurrection on January 6th.

**THEN:** The Supreme Court ruled that states can’t remove Trump from the ballot using the 14th Amendment – only Congress is able to.

**SO NOW:** Jamie Raskin is fighting back by leading the charge to bring the 14th Amendment argument to the House!!

**[__We need EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT to stand with Jamie Raskin and citizen co-sponsor a bill to REMOVE Trump from the ballot!__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raskin_bill?source=FFR_20240317_EMPET_E3_T0_GM-14D-AC&t=8&akid=20998%2E4449941%2ErLhoBS)**

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
| | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a7a75e39d4c544cc882e297aae59aa41&_e=FQNYjyfcZjriLypkNuvReKovdbjbfe5icCcbFM_7BDlN2zYsuioRWryowv9Q-CjGg67YwNsybr3aM7eDKGAhY8Yl4kD-NyjST0oTb2axS-hlAaYXenFz4mgd8k_IBPrxJzOhX0aDxBupB0Jm2b-5Zb200yhxi9_e59WCnLJsslrVSKFdwyq0yETvpF8fAliWu5s28_8vPXyOr2c6qbrUtpqp7qP3m_W2vO7LDT0zQ0w5m9Gf5QtZtAZ4YNv6NcOp6FtOm04xJTfJn1PEtfHm-rg0_MydXiaOci7cVHr6PZyuWJXN2P0GhgGPNTu2PGN9hL37FNpqXpNVKKQC2DNpzftyxEw5jQOCa8jcoL_xAXu4ADVxOO4RaoBEC8F1soOsNdco0vMFapd98uZKICH3lSW1NYzGQwRxBkQ-Xx7o3TzNdJBqPOeHMwNwnnVJ5F1r)

Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. _That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a7a75e39d4c544cc882e297aae59aa41&_e=FQNYjyfcZjriLypkNuvReKovdbjbfe5icCcbFM_7BDlN2zYsuioRWryowv9Q-CjGg67YwNsybr3aM7eDKGAhY8Yl4kD-NyjST0oTb2axS-hlAaYXenFz4mgd8k_IBPrxJzOhX0aDxBupB0Jm2b-5Zb200yhxi9_e59WCnLJsslrVSKFdwyq0yETvpF8fAliWu5s28_8vPXyOr2c6qbrUtpqp7qP3m_W2vO7LDT0zQ0w5m9Gf5QtZtAZ4YNv6NcOp6FtOm04xJTfJn1PEtfHm-rg0_MydXiaOci7cVHr6PZyY-ETVLtB3R1S8lGBv3zRxuNtyOQ_ZObOiruspjsrAx9Eu8f_sffERPvAL9wvCcCtwjgO-q7GNPVoZGRPnti0PUzgb24K1Cw7xof-0TuKgHFllCj2KNigUBGAxCjX8ZM-J_y9Ys_yx3jTNBA1uF_G5) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a7a75e39d4c544cc882e297aae59aa41&_e=FQNYjyfcZjriLypkNuvReKovdbjbfe5icCcbFM_7BDlN2zYsuioRWryowv9Q-CjGg67YwNsybr3aM7eDKGAhY8Yl4kD-NyjST0oTb2axS-hlAaYXenFz4mgd8k_IBPrxJzOhX0aDxBupB0Jm2b-5Zb200yhxi9_e59WCnLJsslrVSKFdwyq0yETvpF8fAliWu5s28_8vPXyOr2c6qbrUtpqp7qP3m_W2vO7LDT0zQ0w5m9Gf5QtZtAZ4YNv6NcOp6FtOm04xJTfJn1PEtfHm-rg0_MydXiaOci7cVHr6PZzPmTJlwTN1ERyYm_-RGvjd37DVA2FnnnfAVeooCzQVpT8t30N6ABjn-lAKr39xreNV62jAM-NiiZBTSFxIS-8N8xmPlpfriQQr9u4CtOCqO-WXulLXSbcelQ3NH6mDNV5rRfrVWszo06phwZ2QMWYa)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

Happy St. Patrick’s Day, Peter!

I know I join all of you in wishing for a day filled with celebration, great fun, and, of course, lots of luck!

Here at Team Schrier, though, we know running a successful, winning campaign isn’t all about luck. It’s about solid planning, hard work, and a dedicated team surrounding us with the support we need from now until Election Day.

**So instead of hoping we find a four-leaf clover today, we’re reaching out to our biggest support system to create some of our own luck: our grassroots supporters, like you, Peter.
