clean_body: We know winning our campaign isn’t all about luck, but that doesn’t mean we can’t create our own today. Happy St. Patrick’s Day, Peter! I know I join all of you in wishing for a day filled with celebration, great fun, and, of course, lots of luck! Here at Team Schrier, though, we know running a successful, winning campaign isn’t all about luck. It’s about solid planning, hard work, and a dedicated team surrounding us with the support we need from now until Election Day. So instead of hoping we find a four-leaf clover today, we’re reaching out to our biggest support system to create some of our own luck: our grassroots supporters, like you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Arizona Republicans Block Right to Contraception Act, Working to Take Away Reproductive Rights of Arizonans
“Over the last few weeks, Arizona Democrats have demonstrated that we will use every tool available to protect access to contraception. At every turn, Republicans have rejected those efforts. Reproductive freedom is widely supported by Arizonans of all political parties, making Arizona Republicans totally out of step with what voters want from their lawmakers. Make no mistake, if Arizona Republicans retain control of the legislature, Arizonans will remain under threat of losing access to the full range of reproductive healthcare, from contraception to abortion to IVF.”
— Senator Priya Sundareshan
PITCH IN FOR A PRO-CHOICE MAJORITY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-mar2024]
Folks, did you see this?
The anti-choice extremists in the state legislature just BLOCKED the Right to Contraception Act, which would’ve protected all forms of birth control in Arizona, including Plan B, and guaranteed the right of medical providers to prescribe contraceptives and share information about their usage.
But with a TWO seat majority in our General Assembly, Republicans were able to suppress and block the legislation from even reaching the floor.
Our margin for victory couldn’t be any closer. We have the energy to flip the legislature blue and build a pro-choice majority that protects our fundamental right to bodily autonomy, but we need your help today. Can we count on you to pitch in $2 or more right now to help us flip TWO seats and our entire legislature this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-mar2024?amount=2]

clean_body: [] Arizona Republicans Block Right to Contraception Act, Working to Take Away Reproductive Rights of Arizonans “Over the last few weeks, Arizona Democrats have demonstrated that we will use every tool available to protect access to contraception. At every turn, Republicans have rejected those efforts. Reproductive freedom is widely supported by Arizonans of all political parties, making Arizona Republicans totally out of step with what voters want from their lawmakers. Make no mistake, if Arizona Republicans retain control of the legislature, Arizonans will remain under threat of losing access to the full range of reproductive healthcare, from contraception to abortion to IVF.” — Senator Priya Sundareshan PITCH IN FOR A PRO-CHOICE MAJORITY [] Folks, did you see this? The anti-choice extremists in the state legislature just BLOCKED the Right to Contraception Act, which would’ve protected all forms of birth control in Arizona, including Plan B, and guaranteed the right of medical providers to prescribe contraceptives and share information about their usage. But with a TWO seat majority in our General Assembly, Republicans were able to suppress and block the legislation from even reaching the floor. Our margin for victory couldn’t be any closer. We have the energy to flip the legislature blue and build a pro-choice majority that protects our fundamental right to bodily autonomy, but we need your help today. Can we count on you to pitch in $2 or more right now to help us flip TWO seats and our entire legislature this November? |

[](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b7061a6cbaf4cb19f4c37b4ec45fe94&_e=jJSZ6shdMnA_vowLct_iYg6UM8ionIQkQYKZz6GWmCUHVsOTevOppSw6P8DpQvNLt29mVenKj6wQPbZmrYOttl0OwP_paTAuwRHMZjMQfUL4VlVdlEskVscK5ATTRqnjlfrPM5xMvA3BUZj7h0Dv2Ulo-dgF6zNbOw00hBf9qSRpz5Odaz0XaPkoFjMIlQ-i5aTmI3mO75gFPypC0KjH7MG0JbvfZAnaF3vcbFobS5B5PHC3wuKcZxc4HTwuL7ylzzvHlqAkVxkIwVermaLeFoQGRrLz3GNWVnfSHBWJWOvQ3NFFJdi_4U8qdemrYp_A8wKKKzBOpzCWp8iXE36zSict-cQe3gYw7KZ5otMB6PX20NVRZLbcFHsNuLI0-qyw)
Fellow American,

I just passed a bill to ban TikTok because China is using it to SPY on Americans and putting our children at significant risk.

**FIRST,** my opponent during our last campaign raised hundreds of thousands of dollars by pumping out content on TikTok.

**THEN,** through official Congressional hearings, it became very evident that China was manipulating American youth on this dangerous app.

**OF COURSE,** that didn’t stop liberal politicians from flocking to this app (they’ll do anything for a quick buck!). So, I have to wonder...do they even care that they are helping China corrupt American youth?!?

**NOW,** TikTok is forcing users to call Congress if they want to continue using the app. So, they’re calling and reporting names like “Deez Nuts” and “Mr. Bend Over.” This is what China is doing to the minds of America’s youth.

| [**STOP CHINA FROM BRAINWASHING AMERICA’S YOUTH**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b7061a6cbaf4cb19f4c37b4ec45fe94&_e=jJSZ6shdMnA_vowLct_iYg6UM8ionIQkQYKZz6GWmCUHVsOTevOppSw6P8DpQvNLt29mVenKj6wQPbZmrYOttl0OwP_paTAuwRHMZjMQfUL4VlVdlEskVscK5ATTRqnjlfrPM5xMvA3BUZj7h0Dv2Ulo-dgF6zNbOw00hBf9qSRpz5Odaz0XaPkoFjMIlQ-i5aTmI3mO75gFPypC0KjH7MG0JbvfZAnaF3vcbFobS5A34KDc5onnT4XQ999_verE9fvAvZlOIPBmiRQobn5OyAlL6-rbdK3NJqCBqdSys_-Z1j_g0gpKtZRMOpd1ewazIx6AzJeof0_ADxM7lMjBNeG3K9GoqO-c-QUFkPXzMC8IHMPznlfknjJdisdFeGeY)
---

This can’t be the future of America, which is why I passed this bill in the first place. It’s simple...we must STOP China from SPYING on Americans. **We can’t just sit back and do nothing while China is actively undermining our security.**

[**JOIN ME: STOP CHINA FROM SPYING ON AMERICA**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b7061a6cbaf4cb19f4c37b4ec45fe94&_e=jJSZ6shdMnA_vowLct_iYg6UM8ionIQkQYKZz6GWmCUHVsOTevOppSw6P8DpQvNLt29mVenKj6wQPbZmrYOttl0OwP_paTAuwRHMZjMQfUL4VlVdlEskVscK5ATTRqnjlfrPM5xMvA3BUZj7h0Dv2Ulo-dgF6zNbOw00hBf9qSRpz5Odaz0XaPkoFjMIlQ-i5aTmI3mO75gFPypC0KjH7MG0JbvfZAnaF3vcbFobS5DIFK7dmGOsNg20tcGKuEop2h6YmN5N9h2qV-oFlobzwHBdTPfiuVt2t6yFYVmGlKayF7rsiWYqo3lpVCXfWbR4z5gXzuRm2GlcKd1jcf5mDzOuRUNOvPvhwISoiQSyokQCMRiNzaBh84Fc1kr9LkJF)
---

When I say I’m fighting for the future of our country, this is what I mean. America’s youth is our future, and it’s our job to protect them before it’s too late.

**[So, I need you to join me today in the fight to save the future of America.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b7061a6cbaf4cb19f4c37b4ec45fe94&_e=jJSZ6shdMnA_vowLct_iYg6UM8ionIQkQYKZz6GWmCUHVsOTevOppSw6P8DpQvNLt29mVenKj6wQPbZmrYOttl0OwP_paTAuwRHMZjMQfUL4VlVdlEskVscK5ATTRqnjlfrPM5xMvA3BUZj7h0Dv2Ulo-dgF6zNbOw00hBf9qSRpz5Odaz0XaPkoFjMIlQ-i5aTmI3mO75gFPypC0KjH7MG0JbvfZAnaF3vcbFobS5BmDaho2dV_FOQyVZHXmi8aFnps0opvFiJGvb9p8Qr-N83e5WR2X2jC4XfnFqPehZuZQcp0d38NUVhy71y3knHlWj6-UbJ3dm8wp4xYMNqxj25BPDCZSZ3L3QQvbMA3WFR-OuwxfIA8bZKy8_fPjgfC)**

Thank you,
Buddy Carter

clean_body: | Fellow American, I just passed a bill to ban TikTok because China is using it to SPY on Americans and putting our children at significant risk. FIRST, my opponent during our last campaign raised hundreds of thousands of dollars by pumping out content on TikTok. THEN, through official Congressional hearings, it became very evident that China was manipulating American youth on this dangerous app. OF COURSE, that didn’t stop liberal politicians from flocking to this app (they’ll do anything for a quick buck!). So, I have to wonder...do they even care that they are helping China corrupt American youth?!? NOW, TikTok is forcing users to call Congress if they want to continue using the app. So, they’re calling and reporting names like “Deez Nuts” and “Mr. Bend Over.” This is what China is doing to the minds of America’s youth. | This can’t be the future of America, which is why I passed this bill in the first place. It’s simple...we must STOP China from SPYING on Americans. We can’t just sit back and do nothing while China is actively undermining our security. When I say I’m fighting for the future of our country, this is what I mean. America’s youth is our future, and it’s our job to protect them before it’s too late. Thank you, Buddy Carter | ---|--- Paid for by Buddy Carter for Congress

name: JD Vance
subject: Closing the curtains…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=49253ae1041345689729e8085b5fdd16&_e=JNY84gitiCFjHm321SeZTx1zdOpEnUcQOIQgcG02vnyMI-s9BRMfC3avgX12jnwC21_hEY-3VvTYPGXv6I2cDqNLYBUJRlPS8vt2yNhPH6Ssx_t78JhZcxoxBM03a1rHjlQNvvWePBXb_MXawKdhFSFWmnqkGAmmIz3HhLf0oxDaYn0PlScNwein8d4VqB2a-wuZhtnt6zT28mQT8zXYS7iopBrnP9Mtpw05xXUU6nB5a8KbMsAhy2rfOZlDYDNck4gxooovEiYPcRW5Vt_DxW2BVKOwNOT5KvjpNChf1VSNexauZnTRCgpgDxo-DhsvTCTisO7dXCihWtKaQjy-Ram-b9S02CpV9pKofFTeGgNgVqAliDtyL3F_-oL0UJ22wP078ye84LpYQZ3LA0ZikKNe_CzEeTqdudjeKYulab4%3D)
---

Guys.

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!!** The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. Chip in to help me keep going.

[At this point, if I don't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race again. Help SAVE AMERICA now!](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=49253ae1041345689729e8085b5fdd16&_e=JNY84gitiCFjHm321SeZTx1zdOpEnUcQOIQgcG02vnyMI-s9BRMfC3avgX12jnwC21_hEY-3VvTYPGXv6I2cDqNLYBUJRlPS8vt2yNhPH6Ssx_t78JhZcxoxBM03a1rHjlQNvvWePBXb_MXawKdhFSFWmnqkGAmmIz3HhLf0oxDaYn0PlScNwein8d4VqB2a-wuZhtnt6zT28mQT8zXYS7iopBrnP9Mtpw05xXUU6nB5a8KbMsAhy2rfOZlDYDNck4gxooovEiYPcRW5Vt_DxSHKN39ld7whEQcC94X2oO1bpE0AlBjtjkJHefqao92hpN6HcfKrZlVS_8UCyMDqxZ7erSIcpH0IJHZUgc471_1cOFv_Er0i5AnG3Nzsfc-WIeLGemlYoV_DngDM6xxMKEE8BCHOZYygyoMjjxilFxE%3D)
If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can.

[If you chip in just $25 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=49253ae1041345689729e8085b5fdd16&_e=JNY84gitiCFjHm321SeZTx1zdOpEnUcQOIQgcG02vnyMI-s9BRMfC3avgX12jnwC21_hEY-3VvTYPGXv6I2cDqNLYBUJRlPS8vt2yNhPH6Ssx_t78JhZcxoxBM03a1rHjlQNvvWePBXb_MXawKdhFSFWmnqkGAmmIz3HhLf0oxDaYn0PlScNwein8d4VqB2a-wuZhtnt6zT28mQT8zXYS7iopBrnP9Mtpw05xXUU6nB5a8KbMsAhy2rfOZlDYDNck4gxooovEiYPcRW5Vt_DxXkVftZcf4D__MtfCWtqRUw-RZTDvh8VqAVI3xPgSMYcNNX7ACMJF9L88G7vGxK--Mpj04-AJxv-yPm32YSZet1qaZJH2Px6ACT7-Gyyq8coYxHk2pUpX8Tjp37ClpzsFJGtmMLt-pPKUIc3BGnxecg%3D)
I'm humbly asking you, as someone who has been fighting my entire life, will you help me out?

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Stay Informed with Team Kennedy Newsletter Updates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Get the latest event stops, campaign news, and best-selling merch listings.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[**Online Event**](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=3) \- Sunday, March 24th at 5:00 PM
Join us for a virtual celebration of Women's History Month with RFK, Jr. and Amaryllis Kennedy. Hear inspiring stories and engaging discussions with special guests including actress Drea de Matteo and influencer Jessica Reed Kraus.
[San Diego, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/san-diego-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=4) \- Saturday, March 23rd at 6:00 PM
The event will include a private sunset reception followed by cocktails and heavy hors d’oeuvres, a fireside chat, Q&A, a photo opportunity for all. Please support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at this exclusive in-person event.
[Oakland, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=5) \- Tuesday, March 26th at 11:00 AM PDT
On Tuesday March 26th, in Oakland, California, Mr. Kennedy will announce the partner that he has chosen to help lead America into a brighter vision of peace, prosperity and unity. We would be honored for you to join us.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/cesar-chavez-day?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=6) \- Saturday, March 30th at 3:00 PM
Celebrate Cesar Chavez with RFK, Jr! Join us for a day of Mexican food, drinks, culture, voter registration assistance, and inspiring remarks from Mr. Kennedy and other special guests.
[Dallas, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/dallas-texas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=7) \- Sunday, April 14th at 4:00 PM
Elevate your support for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s presidential campaign at an intimate fundraising reception. Enjoy delectable hors d’oeuvres and cocktails while partaking in a fireside chat and an inspiring Q&A session.
[Palos Verdes, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/palos-verdes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=8) \- Thursday, April 18th at 6:00 PM
This private reception is an opportunity to see and hear RFK, Jr. up close and personal. It includes remarks by the candidate, an intimate Q&A, and photo opportunity for all.
[Detroit, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-detroit?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_3_17_24_a4&n=9) \- Sunday, April 21st at 7:30 PM
We are thrilled to host our second “Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr.” featuring the comic genius of Rob Schneider, Dave Landau, Heather Jay, Fahim Anwar, Mike Binder, Tre Stewart and other surprise guests!
|
* * *
---
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Vice Presidential Announcement in Oakland, CA
**The time has come for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to announce his running mate for the 2024 presidential election.**
Because of your support, this is now the most successful independent campaign in history. Together, we have shown the world that Americans really are tired of the vitriol and division. Americans are looking for a leader who can “Heal The Divide.”
**On Tuesday March 26th, in Oakland, California,** Mr. Kennedy will announce the partner that he has chosen to help lead America into a brighter vision of peace, prosperity and unity. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: the only Jewish woman in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
"To leave the world a better place than how we found it." |

Hi Peter, it’s Jacky Rosen. The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it. But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, [could you still split $15 between me and Defeat Republicans to help us keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81152916/461543460/1476814235?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240317_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkOGMwOTE4LWFiZTQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JCuTAM65x0NZpiC6AEpBG6EymdQ_PUACq7nXmZwiDA=) Peter,

My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress.

In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – to leave the world a better place than how we found it.

I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. But I need your help.

Right now, polls are showing me locked in a dead heat with Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – who just set a major GOP fundraising record in the race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:

[If you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities we love, will you chip in $15 or more today to help me and Defeat Republicans defend my seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81152917/461543461/1476814235?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240317_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkOGMwOTE4LWFiZTQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JCuTAM65x0NZpiC6AEpBG6EymdQ_PUACq7nXmZwiDA=)

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: Hope over fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter, we want you to remember something. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tCu5zo5UDj_0UiGoPEQMuBwIfr5CI6cvgPr7x2SujELyJlM2cO--HOvOyhmLXbdMrugQD7G0Y7aIyklntmzMA761Eabxw80U_f6XvqNXrOZBfKSGkfVBrdTQlFbZzzDORIi9GEEpLMmVsbQGl2AyYoaok-gYu_j381AfRsTnH6eRkltMdrBKsX9ads3L-Q_gF071sqIIcT6fucaD9eEMd1yOHaSLerAlH2z9h-GMGzkR9XL68KEWU4ewD4iNODU-uOets1G1fzXBB4lF-L40aSkqwhM-FVCGyhq_eJHeEik8VqJPcQQji8E7hEnQ9xxSSot_GbBEXqyisIjVQQqEc7mkaGdjAlBbeF2Lv9tP5cNdX6TC2LnCMsV-DeuI1mm7lhgXJv8KEK-9PaO0XhV8ezF-qB8MVKXO_VHNexzZ50PwlyVP1s47CktBesXaQRK7qNYNm9PFl0x-ToVesGlg45w/44q/-wAkiI-TQGeRO5P6NYBNWw/h0/h001.8a14573vOUOsfVLGqFS075O74BQc_RIC-A4jUlIUKvs) Now, remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember the relief knowing that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer and the hope you felt that we were getting America back on track. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tCu5zo5UDj_0UiGoPEQMuBwIfr5CI6cvgPr7x2SujELyJlM2cO--HOvOyhmLXbdMrugQD7G0Y7aIyklntmzMA71rRIKq8fGiO9mHSwTNYvmpD9kl9I7kKDD4scU4XuD07NKBENoGCmJv1BlFaW9JMGNhIDj979GW7ZxoWuxfTh8VdMjK3jExKGpJuSEAAAMRa4Os1Bj-gVy_-LbRB4HZAo09j_XkwCe9wV6K3cwJk0AFbg5DQB2B8EwcdEydmoS4Q9vQYln1TNzWWyCnY5W24BiOCcSomxQSW2GfeJ1VCZhHUtxFG7KpXFX_imdWaXVavAAe8-BBqQtiPhyM6jtF25lnSe6wTS4GMDr7ePUoLmR4rXt-BLMFSeOV3m4BSanAwW9M9Cq7DX6FHV_oDCIR_HN7rwF_cVoViYQmew9DCVJAPSpuprs0K6QWtUODKf7epz9gtcHf22KE9eVp01r8f2g/44q/-wAkiI-TQGeRO5P6NYBNWw/h1/h001._EyGVBfOVmTk86YvKX8m6JE2cCnGQWDbJyW1Wxj2rO8) We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. It might be wild to think, but you -- yes you, Peter -- have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do to keep Joe and Kamala in the White House is quite literally funded by folks like you making the decision that we can’t go back... we can only go forward. **We don’t expect anyone to donate every day, but with Joe and Kamala facing millions in attack ads, they’re counting on you to make today the day. That’s why we’re asking:** [Will you chip in $25 or more now to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign? clean_body: | | | Peter, we want you to remember something. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now, remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember the relief knowing that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer and the hope you felt that we were getting America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. It might be wild to think, but you -- yes you, Peter -- have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do to keep Joe and Kamala in the White House is quite literally funded by folks like you making the decision that we can’t go back... we can only go forward. We don’t expect anyone to donate every day, but with Joe and Kamala facing millions in attack ads, they’re counting on you to make today the day. That’s why we’re asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, Peter. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Biden-Harris

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1234%2E135344%2EuWF1_R)

Friends -
We’re guessing that you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and holler "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!"
But we’re reaching out to you right now in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why:
This month our campaign is going to be making some very important budget decisions. The kind of decisions that will ultimately help determine whether or not we win this race.
Because the truth is that it's going to take a significant amount of resources to win in November. It will require ads, organizers, polling, research, and travel to keep Elissa out on the campaign trail taking her message to voters.
Michigan is too competitive of a state for us to leave anything up to chance. And the only way we'll be able to fund the kind of campaign that can win in Michigan is with your support. That's why we're asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to help Elissa Slotkin defend Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240317-1-700&t=2&akid=1234%2E135344%2EuWF1_R)**

That's why we're asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for adding your donation today. When we send Elissa to the U.S. Senate this November, you can know that your donation today made a big difference in making it all possible. \- Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d7a6a2599724a5c8c9035bbbfd1e48b&_e=2UOpBrlsdNdoYwh_kxKLYFCae-eAaSS8g3xQbXQhkIdAUfAoYZ-6LYSWK_R_1_IlIs3bM7EoaxXRj-Vfic7vzsdQz9drORcZBV5KqfYjPF9RHGexfm7jx7oF2mCDDHRet0x_2PuBKQaQ3l6TQ4-DgCvrbaYOWQWLWrcTp_4k331f_0OQsFgIfBCSW8dHijHkWpTMcQcw4bLISrsJlz5qT4tNn27kxAZyStYawzkh8XcghvaEUTM0RDFDxwrrIephd8zCLPTICw0aEOzAEPhKKeS7xtU-_ZZXm0bWfmAYci_jd0Vcup10BEWY1JcVVkNW99uIElZu2Yx0Q9mHF4lhmIx8d6G5SGhZ09kD-a2LV6_rLgNXXrrZ2VnwP4kw6ZEWTJ8cLYyFMxmjcZByCug1KI3cY3nSPIaIEtdqVbwN2wY%3D)

Fellow American,

JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P.

Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the November election. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out of touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, **[and if we don't fight back, our nation will be unrecognizable to our children and grandchildren in years to come. ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d7a6a2599724a5c8c9035bbbfd1e48b&_e=2UOpBrlsdNdoYwh_kxKLYFCae-eAaSS8g3xQbXQhkIdAUfAoYZ-6LYSWK_R_1_IlIs3bM7EoaxXRj-Vfic7vzsdQz9drORcZBV5KqfYjPF9RHGexfm7jx7oF2mCDDHRet0x_2PuBKQaQ3l6TQ4-DgCvrbaYOWQWLWrcTp_4k331f_0OQsFgIfBCSW8dHijHkWpTMcQcw4bLISrsJlz5qT4tNn27kxAZyStYawzkh8XcghvaEUTM0RDFDxwrrIephd8zCLPTICw0aEOzAEPhKKSQcEybfjysK-da1nPoSoMNkVD9OiYo0rW-vVBj6asXGxfoKXkVGzLrOtaSjaiAHtB2FFbArxoO4ygRtJ0J8AoiGZncKltMgJuKQK-fzKzpebx4tRrQdsW9JIcoLoORb3jTya2vMA0IlM185CnGlDH4%3D)**

Unfortunately, this isn't stopping here. More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend each and every conservative running for office, and it's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement. These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and major donors to make a major "blue" impact in November. They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear.

**[So please, Friend, donate anything you can A-S-A-P. Even $5, $10, or $15 will help to ensure Dems aren't outspending us across the country.](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d7a6a2599724a5c8c9035bbbfd1e48b&_e=2UOpBrlsdNdoYwh_kxKLYFCae-eAaSS8g3xQbXQhkIdAUfAoYZ-6LYSWK_R_1_IlIs3bM7EoaxXRj-Vfic7vzsdQz9drORcZBV5KqfYjPF9RHGexfm7jx7oF2mCDDHRet0x_2PuBKQaQ3l6TQ4-DgCvrbaYOWQWLWrcTp_4k331f_0OQsFgIfBCSW8dHijHkWpTMcQcw4bLISrsJlz5qT4tNn27kxAZyStYawzkh8XcghvaEUTM0RDFDxwrrIephd8zCLPTICw0aEOzAEPhKKTA-6eug2-fBl5aTD_y3FxxvSELzJ6NcpELcFUJi0UnJ0sUKBmKpgaPyidBzv2YZkbOHPv2koyQheHykW7aUH6D4WTfjb7dEzFNjzLBD5jI5myMfQ9VICwFyjIdk0vl-8g1KM07AYitdJHTyD982Bjk%3D)**

**[With a committed team like ours, I KNOW we can make a difference and win this year. But we have to start now.](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d7a6a2599724a5c8c9035bbbfd1e48b&_e=2UOpBrlsdNdoYwh_kxKLYFCae-eAaSS8g3xQbXQhkIdAUfAoYZ-6LYSWK_R_1_IlIs3bM7EoaxXRj-Vfic7vzsdQz9drORcZBV5KqfYjPF9RHGexfm7jx7oF2mCDDHRet0x_2PuBKQaQ3l6TQ4-DgCvrbaYOWQWLWrcTp_4k331f_0OQsFgIfBCSW8dHijHkWpTMcQcw4bLISrsJlz5qT4tNn27kxAZyStYawzkh8XcghvaEUTM0RDFDxwrrIephd8zCLPTICw0aEOzAEPhKKfG0G8MEXAmTT6Lj8aGxd4BBUg7bSsql7ONloF0yqxCPsWxjNUW6YHANYW5yJn9Y7A4Rh8Fqxk1NWHhqRCMNUXEG5JZsVddpli_1J290clTYKHOUs8Q11_V2K_jT_M7Pa19qu6U17OwHQ_39K7xt4DE%3D)**

-JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our

clean_body: | Fellow American, JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P. Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the November election. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out of touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, Unfortunately, this isn't stopping here. More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend each and every conservative running for office, and it's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement. These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and major donors to make a major "blue" impact in November. They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear. -JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Friend,

**The voters have been abundantly clear.**

All across the country, exit polls have indicated that the top issues of the American electorate are **illegal immigration, migrant crime, and the open border.**

I couldn't agree more. President Biden and the Democrats have completely abandoned their duty to protect and defend the United States and uphold their oath to the Constitution.

The impacts are being felt far beyond the border states in all regions of the country. This includes Indiana!

We are a nation of laws, and we need leaders in Washington who will uphold the law, secure our borders, and clean up the disaster that has been left for us.

body:

Derek -- We wanted to take a minute to thank you for your support during this crucial election year. It's been a little over a week since we sat on the edge of our seats waiting for Super Tuesday results to come in and listened to President Biden speak during the State of the Union Address -- a shining example of his capable leadership over the past three years. With so much on the line in November, supporters like you are helping sustain this team fighting to secure another victory for Team Biden-Harris and wins for Democrats nationwide. It takes an effort from _each and every one_ of the members on this team to mobilize voters across the nation, elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and protect our values and freedoms. A $7 donation from you _right now_ will help ensure we have the tools and resources we need to defeat Trump and his MAGA allies. clean_body: Your support makes all the difference. | | Derek -- We wanted to take a minute to thank you for your support during this crucial election year. It's been a little over a week since we sat on the edge of our seats waiting for Super Tuesday results to come in and listened to President Biden speak during the State of the Union Address -- a shining example of his capable leadership over the past three years. With so much on the line in November, supporters like you are helping sustain this team fighting to secure another victory for Team Biden-Harris and wins for Democrats nationwide. It takes an effort from each and every one of the members on this team to mobilize voters across the nation, elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and protect our values and freedoms. A $7 donation from you right now will help ensure we have the tools and resources we need to defeat Trump and his MAGA allies. We’re depending on the continued support from our grassroots movement to make sure the grave threat to our democracy and our freedoms doesn’t become our reality. If you can step up with a $7 donation today, use your personalized link below to make your gift: Thank you for everything, we hope you’ll join us. body:
During the last campaign, we got out-spent – by millions and millions of dollars.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81154053/461547437/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA3YzA0NC1iNWU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gKlHTgMz6B9V6oedcHoXyUkANbJDIW5Z-Hkx6Z79Yo=&emci=dd701687-b4e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=2007c044-b5e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress.
We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81154055/461547439/1610638071?refcode=em20240317pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2007c044-b5e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA3YzA0NC1iNWU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gKlHTgMz6B9V6oedcHoXyUkANbJDIW5Z-Hkx6Z79Yo=)
Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and with Lauren Boebert now out of the race, I know he can win this time. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022.
**During the last campaign, we got out-spent – by millions and millions of dollars.** It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads.
**If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and win this critical seat, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now.**
**We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but right now, we still have $5,217 left to raise.**
[**Please, can my husband Adam Frisch count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to his campaign – every dollar you can afford before our fundraising deadline – and help him win this critical seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81154056/461547440/1610638071?refcode=em20240317pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2007c044-b5e4-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA3YzA0NC1iNWU0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gKlHTgMz6B9V6oedcHoXyUkANbJDIW5Z-Hkx6Z79Yo=)

clean_body: During the last campaign, we got out-spent – by millions and millions of dollars. Hello, After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress. We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes. = Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and with Lauren Boebert now out of the race, I know he can win this time. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022. During the last campaign, we got out-spent – by millions and millions of dollars. It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads. If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and win this critical seat, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but right now, we still have $5,217 left to raise. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ll admit, the first campaign was hard – for the whole family. But we’re all-in win this November. Thank you for being on this journey with us, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=f99d92c77bc7406a8835fa44f75284db&_e=VOu_9LQadTIRFcKjwtpabXBEbM3Q-XgszrqG5AJrrkrryiXv4qXQ5CH0GMnJliNR9SpgqA72N67Gqog8A9nw7SYodkwonWRbCqjmclInc4-N0af3OnQd90K7f8tEcsSoq8Dg6JvxNDGyJpA8z4Ue1EZtef7XwUN13sQtgrGwOhx6G7wsC6T8Rgx9OXCuciNGE2WLfPHJpXa5cWeuQHIf0wR6esaGn3YiEWLEe8hKSMKIPBKNIqnZMHN7po9ifoshUYP2IJbEeSZR9HPrT4gdllpjE2yBC34kpUqkxDEbn8tOiwiMipNaAzwvYA_N5qn1Gi_qcq77-UebXiabjAM4U9o7BXojb7lGsPeJPl8qI11-qKMKQpooLKhF_Ve31HSwFbdda61wf5IA0M0CVDvwyROtlzsB6nuaQheEj8SaYYeyOUWfm_A2InBjpGU7FrDx "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. _Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. clean_body: I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. | | | | | Friend, I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you. With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - one single dollar - we'd be able to hit all of our goals. | | "DONATE $1 >>" | | "DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN >>" Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community. I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals." | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF ALUMINUM FOIL >>" Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether. I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight. | | "DONATE TODAY" | Marco Rubio | | | * "Marco Rubio Endorses Young Kim" | "JOIN MARCO!" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: this is how out of touch Republicans are…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EalXEU8L8Wnaa-P7p5pikg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn2gJdP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMxNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZjZG1jPTJkakN1M0JJb2lCTlJMUzhWNU1Xa3FLZWlWMSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZGpDdTNCSW9pQk5STFM4VjVNV2txS2VpVjEmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmRqQ3UzQklvaUJOUkxTOFY1TVdrcUtlaVYxVwNzcGNCCmXvXX33ZUJlUl1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter, I released my first-ever financial disclosure form as a member of Congress a few months ago. And get this: Republicans are attacking me on social media for... _trying to make ends meet during my campaign._

They can attack me all they want, but I have _no_ shame. The truth is, our political system makes it _really_ difficult for regular people like us to run for office. And I think Congress would work _a lot_ better if more working class folks were _able_ to run for office. But Republicans are pushing the idea that, because I don’t come from money, I shouldn’t have a seat in Congress. I’m going to keep fighting for those who are often ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I can’t win without your support, Peter. **[**_Can you contribute $27 to keep me in Congress and strengthen our movement in the face of these Republican attacks?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/vZLh2bb2FSxuvfYse31PJA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn2gJdP0TZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMxNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZGpDdTNCSW9pQk5STFM4VjVNV2txS2VpVjEmcmVmY29kZTI9MmRqQ3UzQklvaUJOUkxTOFY1TVdrcUtlaVYxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJkakN1M0JJb2lCTlJMUzhWNU1Xa3FLZWlWMVcDc3BjQgpl711992VCZVJdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)** | | | [DONATE $27 NOW →](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/vZLh2bb2FSxuvfYse31PJA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn2gJdP0TZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMxNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZGpDdTNCSW9pQk5STFM4VjVNV2txS2VpVjEmcmVmY29kZTI9MmRqQ3UzQklvaUJOUkxTOFY1TVdrcUtlaVYxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJkakN1M0JJb2lCTlJMUzhWNU1Xa3FLZWlWMVcDc3BjQgpl711992VCZVJdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
---
Peter, I drove for Uber while I first ran for office. I had bills to pay and no income, so that was my option, and I took it – like millions of people do every day.

And I have no doubt that tons of those working class people skip running for office because they can’t afford to step away from their job (or jobs, plural).
Instead of demonizing people for their struggles, we should be lifting the working poor up. We _need_ and _deserve_ representation that looks more like us and has struggled like us, Peter! And at an even more basic level, everyone deserves to be able to put food on the table and gas in the car – whether they drive it to a campaign event or just to work and school.
**[**I hate asking for campaign contributions, but it’s the only way working people like myself can break into the system and fight for real solutions to the problems that so many Americans face._My campaign needs to raise $5,415 by midnight to stay on track of my weekly fundraising goal. Can you chip in $27 to keep me fighting for all of us in Congress? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/vZLh2bb2FSxuvfYse31PJA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn2gJdP0TZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMxNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZGpDdTNCSW9pQk5STFM4VjVNV2txS2VpVjEmcmVmY29kZTI9MmRqQ3UzQklvaUJOUkxTOFY1TVdrcUtlaVYxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJkakN1M0JJb2lCTlJMUzhWNU1Xa3FLZWlWMVcDc3BjQgpl711992VCZVJdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)**

clean_body: | Peter, I released my first-ever financial disclosure form as a member of Congress a few months ago. And get this: Republicans are attacking me on social media for... trying to make ends meet during my campaign. They can attack me all they want, but I have no shame. The truth is, our political system makes it really difficult for regular people like us to run for office. And I think Congress would work a lot better if more working class folks were able to run for office. But Republicans are pushing the idea that, because I don’t come from money, I shouldn’t have a seat in Congress. I’m going to keep fighting for those who are often ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I can’t win without your support, Peter. ~~ | | | ~~ Peter, I drove for Uber while I first ran for office. I had bills to pay and no income, so that was my option, and I took it – like millions of people do every day. And I have no doubt that tons of those working class people skip running for office because they can’t afford to step away from their job (or jobs, plural). Instead of demonizing people for their struggles, we should be lifting the working poor up. We need and deserve representation that looks more like us and has struggled like us, Peter! And at an even more basic level, everyone deserves to be able to put food on the table and gas in the car – whether they drive it to a campaign event or just to work and school. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ Thanks for always having my back, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

name: Lorinser for Congress
subject: Trump's "bloodshed" comment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Trump's "bloodshed" comment
Friends, have you heard about Trump's recent statement where he said there would be a "bloodbath" if he loses the election? We can't just ignore it.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
We can defeat extremism in rural America. Dr. Bob Lorinser is running for Congress against Rep. Jack Bergman, who has proudly endorsed Trump. We must stand up to fear-mongering, and every contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] can help us succeed against it.
Your donation will be processed immediately if you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friends,
Most Americans believe in unity and democracy, not violence or threats. It's disappointing that a leader like Trump would insinuate the possibility of bloodshed. We need leaders who inspire positivity and respect, not division and fear.
As disgusting as Trump's comments are, they underscore why Bob Lorinser is precisely the kind of leader we need.
Bob wants us to use our voices and votes to ensure that our democracy remains intact and that the peaceful transition of power continues.
Dr. Bob believes that our strength lies in our ability to peacefully engage with one another, exchange ideas, and work towards a better future for all.
By supporting Doc, we can work towards a brighter, more inclusive future, free from the specter of violence. So, join us, let's stand together and elect a leader who inspires and unites.
Thank you for contributing to a different kind of campaign; one centered around civility, decency, democracy, and holding accountable those who undermine it.
Grateful,
Team Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER
